name: Hillsdale College via Trump Train News
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze9vj2eki07uanodme9basg6vrok9ecvlr3qdbe8_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cpimcoj1chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z719514fo1teuep6jsh6hr5l998qu3tsk6c2a9v0_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cpimcoj1chh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5pfrqogfebapi9tpv0n7lf8linf5el5t619vjj0_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cpimcoj1chh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkomg1u0ts9hi0s0uaekc60rlvrj7pta5isjahgo_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cpimcoj1chh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgalb5imuguck8vqchkvu8r0i0ovm9vta6blpbio_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cpimcoj1chh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Hillsdale College via American Briefing
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zfno8768t8nbg3okmomujiuogh7gohqvrahq3dsg_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cpimcoj1chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3dvbe7tja87gnaa4vupdnb7orug5vgi7n7k5j28_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cpimcoj1chh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---

---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ze6jpf8bs9n36c4ci2b8484sl941qahi27q2gm68_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cpimcoj1chh2bs).

Hillsdale College

name: Sam Brown
subject: We just had an important discussion
body:
I just had a thought

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcse2eocn3ce457hdbv8qr3j7r54gvsc6anog650_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cpimcoj1cth2bs)
---

Friend, thank you for opening this message and giving it a read.

My wife and I just sat down and had a conversation on our fundraising performance to start off the year.

Listen, I'm never one to panic, but it's important to consider the fact that our final January numbers, when we hit close of books on the 31st, will ultimately set our pace for the remainder of 2024.

**[Every single dollar that we are behind pace each month before November is another dollar LESS in our pockets when it hits CRUNCH time and it becomes absolutely vital that we are able to reach and activate every voter we possibly can before the election.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi6k8qht8ofruajh71ctljvjgjq1otke4i5hd78o_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cpimcoj1cth2bs "Every single dollar that we are behind pace each month before November is another dollar LESS in our pockets when it hits CRUNCH time and it becomes absolutely vital that we are able to reach and activate every voter we possibly can before the election.")**

_The radical left is running every play in the book to keep us from securing our Senate Majority and the longer we wait, the less time we have to stop them!_

But Friend, it's not just me who needs help.

**[President Trump is counting on having a team of trusted patriots in the Senate as part of his battle plan to save America! I'm prepared to be on that team.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4qehbta3dc6iuf4hb5ju93gvc98l0luj9scaclo_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cpimcoj1cth2bs "President Trump is counting on having a team of trusted patriots in the Senate as part of his battle plan to save America! I’m prepared to be on that team. ")**

I'm running for Senate because I know I can be the America First warrior that President Trump needs to get this country back on track.

**[So can I count on you to get us towards our critical goal before midnight tonight?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z85hd4lpn46982gf7cris864s6aj2bvacr32q8ao_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cpimcoj1cth2bs "So can I count on you to get us towards our critical goal before midnight tonight?") **

Thank you for your support.

Duty First,

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpb3dredr6srj7tism7362keeu5n045es0h7o4a8_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cpimcoj1chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjbqtu902qltl88la0arnfj0leu34tl13m7bv5e8_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cpimcoj1chh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfd72ioh67htgrarv0918nrgbuvbtbkom3d7oja0_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cpimcoj1chh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze2o2es4vfhmiceckjruesq20v5uauu1pjerqh4o_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cpimcoj1chh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: David Horowitz
subject: Barack Obama's Revolution
body:
I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2icd67v80i1d8soov1c573kqnj6ftej8eo634m8_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cpim6o76cdh2bs)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1nv29a2bt7lmjipnprj8fo6j1kp48pog4ab6ro8_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cpim6o76cdh2bs)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqb9n58pob75vu2cou30klp4ornosqtq82hkehao_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cpim6o76cdh2bs)**

name: Your America
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39587%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uq4zP23dFYWXV2YkNPNJLg&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39588%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LkedzSTNwkXlz1rX5UjxWQ&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39589%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ya%2b2UzrvLx08urry2ZpKEg&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39580%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ro8aB14X5pyAf9GOqsJINg&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Your America News
---
_Your America News • PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: David Horowitz
subject: Barack Obama's Revolution
body:
America is on the brink of destruction.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za1furhktg5bmd02dmq2k36evdqkvig079uhr1i0_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cpim6o71c3h2bs)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl8k72nph1u0d8jr77otfer5dsefrov4p6tfqtno_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cpim6o71c3h2bs)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. name: American Update
subject: Food shortages are coming
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_“Food shortages are coming.”_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c682648%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=n3h%2fYVUeAcKGgIPwiNWZaA&sysid=1). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c682649%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RQZvLTLxYBuJ6kW8G6a8rA&sysid=1) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c682640%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1RL9Gl6Qg6nvz0Yl19rL0w&sysid=1) on these survival food kits while you can.
---

Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling . When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. on these survival food kits while you can. American Update PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

Democrats in their attempt to sabotage our elections rallied millions of their supporters in favor of ERASING Voter ID laws across the country.

name: Trump Train News
subject: An Education in Character
body:
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
While in exile, Dante wrote one of the greatest epic poems

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr83mql675e2o2pdehqdqv6ru8il01ums4h4nhk0_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cphm0ob4chh2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow citizen,
Over 700 years ago, Dante Alighieri was exiled from his beloved Florence. Stripped of his property, he spent the rest of his life as a guest in foreign places.
While in exile, Dante wrote one of the greatest epic poems, _The Divine Comedy_. Taking an imaginary journey through the three realms of the afterlife—Inferno, Purgatory, and Paradise—he encounters old enemies and cherished friends, crooked politicians and great statesmen, infamous sinners, and holy saints.
The result is a profound education in character, as the poet learns how to order his soul to lead a free and happy life. And _The Divine Comedy_ is a delight to read.
**This is why Hillsdale College has produced an online course, “Dante’s _Divine Comedy,_ ” about this monumental work of literature. **
---
| | And now, the course about this timeless masterpiece is available on DVD for your home library, Bible study, or book club.
You can receive the DVD of **“Dante’s _Divine Comedy_ ” **in a handsome box set for a gift of $100 or more in support of Hillsdale and its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, like free online courses.
We**** produce our free online courses, as we do all of our work, without accepting ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
Our work is entirely dependent on the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z860o3cmeeipujqdemgumb16mit1kpa1vb4mmp8o_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cphm0ob4chh2bs)
---
| | With your tax-deductible gift today, we can enroll tens of thousands of Americans in online courses, as well as reach and teach increasing millions for liberty. Please support Hillsdale’s educational outreach on behalf of liberty and receive your DVD of **“Dante’s _Divine Comedy_ ” **by giving your best tax-deductible gift of $100 or more today using this secure link:
**_[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-dante-divine-comedy-course](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1i5ltqai6fbn3ncrbpng6jpk05vnho08m2ejcgg_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cphm0ob4chh2bs)_**
We are deeply grateful for your friendship and support.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Anthony D'Esposito
subject: Critical Support Needed for Mazi Pilip in NY-03
body:
Peter,

In the heart of New York's 3rd Congressional District, Mazi Pilip stands as a beacon of perseverance and dedication. Her journey from humble beginnings to her candidacy for Congress is a powerful testament to the American dream.

Mazi's unique background as a black Jewish immigrant who came to America legally showcases her deep respect for our laws and traditions. Her service as an IDF veteran further exemplifies her commitment to defense and security, principles she carries forward in her staunch support for law enforcement and border security.

name: Sam Brown
subject: We just had an important discussion
body:
I just had a thought

| |
---
| | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c682774%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jQ4090sXXp2Giu6UJqtzvQ&sysid=1)
---

Friend, thank you for opening this message and giving it a read.

My wife and I just sat down and had a conversation on our fundraising performance to start off the year.

Listen, I’m never one to panic, but it’s important to consider the fact that our final January numbers, when we hit close of books on the 31st, will ultimately set our pace for the remainder of 2024.

**[Every single dollar that we are behind pace each month before November is another dollar LESS in our pockets when it hits CRUNCH time and it becomes absolutely vital that we are able to reach and activate every voter we possibly can before the election.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c682785%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gGxBi%2bYkeaC5O8LS2ihMGA&sysid=1 "Every single dollar that
we are behind pace each month before November is another dollar LESS in our
pockets when it hits CRUNCH time and it becomes absolutely vital that we are able
to reach and activate every voter we possibly can before the
election. ")**

_The radical left is running every play in the book to keep us from securing our Senate Majority and the longer we wait, the less time we have to stop them!_

But Friend, it’s not just me who needs help.

**[President Trump is counting on having a team of trusted patriots in the Senate as part of his battle plan to save America! I’m prepared to be on that team.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c682786%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BP%2fZbEXDFsfiKIgUQuU4TA&sysid=1 "President Trump is
counting on having a team of trusted patriots in the Senate as part of his battle
plan to save America! I’m prepared to be on that team. ")**

I’m running for Senate because I know I can be the America First warrior that President Trump needs to get this country back on track.

**[So can I count on you to get us towards our critical goal before midnight tonight?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c682787%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YSGPPmD2p%2f4JYHx7%2fFDJRQ&sysid=1 "So can I count on you to
get us towards our critical goal before midnight tonight?") **

Thank you for your support.

Duty First,

---

name: Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: January 6 Committee Obstructed Justice
body:
We’ve just learned the January 6 Congressional Committee deleted 100 encrypted files of what really happened at the U.S. Capitol building on January 6, 2021.

| [ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39506%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6hXXLUf4Y2zMyRahIsAg2A&sysid=1)

| |
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39507%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8KUG%2bW53MMj3H3o66913sQ&sysid=1)Dear Patriot,

**[Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more now to fully fund my NEW crucial lawsuit to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS and our efforts to TAKE ON JOE BIDEN’S ROTTEN CRIMINAL REGIME IN COURT.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39508%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0W9iXfEfCjgaokPQi2xtRg&sysid=1)**

We’ve just learned the January 6 Congressional Committee deleted 100 encrypted files of what really happened at the U.S. Capitol building on January 6, 2021.

Yes, you read that right.

**U.S. Congressmen erased evidence that can clear my clients and other January 6 peaceful protesters ... evidence that can save their liberty and their lives!**

What they’ve done to innocent Americans is a CRIME. They belong in PRISON for obstruction of justice.

What’s more, they know they committed a crime.

As you know, most of those Congressmen are corrupt and dishonest lawyers.

**Lawyers are sworn officers of the court, who’ve taken an oath on the Bible to uphold the law. They know they have a legal duty to make sure a defendant gets ALL evidence that can clear him of criminal charges.**

I’m sick to my stomach at this horrifying betrayal of our fellow Americans.

And I know the House Republicans won’t touch this with a ten-foot pole.

It’s up to you and me.

**Freedom Watch lawsuits, our People’s Grand Juries, and People’s Trials are the path forward to bring politicians to justice and FREE January 6 patriots.**

**[Patriot, please help me fight peacefully and legally for January 6 peaceful protesters with your crucial gift of $25, $50,$100 or more right away](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39509%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Tt8CVBYEc%2btbDHhtwXrFcQ&sysid=1)****[.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39500%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7BQPQz7p4r6nFLTs5DrOtA&sysid=1)**

I’m counting on you.

In Justice,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

I’m prepared to be on that team. ")**

I'm running for Senate because I know I can be the America First warrior that President Trump needs to get this country back on track.

name: Conservative Broadcast
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/VEnBQiRlbYEiVz-AieoUoQ~~/AARclAA~_aUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/VEnBQiRlbYEiVz-AieoUoQ~~/AARclAA~_aUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/VEnBQiRlbYEiVz-AieoUoQ~~/AARclAA~_aUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/VEnBQiRlbYEiVz-AieoUoQ~~/AARclAA~_aUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Conservative Broadcast
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

# Saturday, January 27th, 2024
---|---
**Happy Saturday!** On this day in 1880, the U.S. Patent Office issued Thomas Edison a patent for his "electric-lamp." It was a improvement on existing designs for lamps, and it propelled America into the era of electric light. ([Original Patent Photo](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FuwyAQQL8Gb0FwYJAHhi5s6drRonAxV2GI7Guq_H3VqmPnp6en93Zdr4ka9e017Rj4NtaUmR646gv4C9jVTiXcEAHNhEF75Yyzi3NTDe_Z5Nki-sUqLGCSQgPJK4BFq9nBRAEUWKXBazXPoGTSkHTxVpclF2Ot-BGJxyE_BnWueGvP8cBD5rFPLVTm-ynMi4AoIKYdD8qpVzp5HE95ksTyKSA22ipT3wTEPyYg3hNj51NAxLJSz7LyPh2h3L-oNTqdF1Zte6L22-J_z78DAAD__7O4Wpg)) What are you up to this weekend? Hit reply and let us know if you're doing something interesting, and we'll respond with our plans. (If your weekend activities are particluarly neat, you might get a shoutout in our next edition!) Have you signed up for _The Flyover_ yet? If not, you can fix that [with one click](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFu8yAQAOCngS3RcVzgZ2D4pchT07WjReGwr8V25NBUffuq6tjs3_S9XMZLkibr9JwWjr1uY8pd7jyaA_oD0ki6xMqMbDVH48FZR8E5PcdKpvxj8sVj5vJaA6RMAQIRBF9T1hIRkMCgN3A6IRyTwWSKJ1NCLpZIEXCRvu3Ht03WPnNtX9ud92PeFt3i3Pv1pux_hYPC4S9ROFzSJPlJ1vcfYwdW9lyun9Ka3JxXBNOSpP1a99EXZc8Eeo-Pje4PA74DAAD__zuQW2A). Today's edition is brought to you by the good folks at [4Patriots](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL9ugzAQh5_GbETns7HD4CFShNSBblVHZOxzco0JCJxUffuKSt0y_v4Mn77Pfug9Z75f3v1ErqR58KHwkwZZo61RD7qKLhEhqYqctGCU0a0x1dWBOR5JJUtjsCYZHakNNhxNSOM4JmordgioQaKV0DQIBy_Ry2i1jG2ISmuhgSKXeT18zXwvV0r5Z37SegjzVGV3LWXZhDoJ7AR2einrTap9E9iFzOEmVFfWJ0ehzlI1gALNqXs77xHaRqDxKQ3bY9yLtlH1P069AWAAkALNo0xD8NPi-XIX6vzR9_Xrb7W6uHxzzrwZKzRcJs_5j7S89PYbAAD__w4fZho). Check out their survival kits if you'd like to buy a little peace of mind.
|
---
## Trump to Pay $83 Million
A federal jury has decided that former President Trump [must pay](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFy6yAQheGnQR0aWGEwBcVt1Pm2KTUbWGw8IDSIWPHbZ5Q69XeKM__Hbblhymm9_8dCrse6oO_pRYvkYDioRQ3BRSKgaSAnjdCTVlbr4eEI4oUEarQ2KGPAWyuv0XxaQoxK6iE5EKCEBCPF5QJiRAkog1EyWB8mpZgSFFKvbXzWtPYHxfyuL2qjr2XI7tH7trPpH4OZwXwcxxjr90rHfjqDeas59eR3BnNvX2XjtQVqFPiGb15qI34VvKScU1058Sfhyj22VnPmgSIW7Kf0ljAPzYXtOLe7NkyJe8GUf3_0P6v8BAAA__8Hg2Xe) E. Jean Carroll $83.3 million in damages. Carroll says that Trump forced himself on her in 1996--a claim that he's vehemently denied. A previous trial, which Trump did not attend, concluded that he was liable for sexual abuse and defamation. Trump [did attend the latest trial](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1u8zAMAJ_G3hzoh5HkQcO3ZMu3djRokUpYyJahqAn69kU6dzzccMB9XJcrSpH99h83jj3XBVOXJy96Mn4ysMBIMTMbtiNH7ZWzDmbnxntEAGIFXqPPDle7JgTIKyX0Vrs5jRKNMqC08Vqdz0adUBvU5EHTnMgCDKCYpNd2-qyy9zvn8l2f3E6pbmOJ996Px2D_DeYymAseO78eb_WG1iUVHsylt6_tmBK2VkuZiDNu2KXuU2-CZWJgDOtsE_Fq5nD2wUHOFEjDyiGEsUU6XlKKPJwfQN02lPLb73_e-AkAAP__jSRgrQ) (which would determine how much he was liable for) and he had several run-ins with Judge Lewis A. Kaplan, who threatened Trump after he said "witch hunt" and "con job" within earshot of jurors. At one point during yesterday's proceedings, Trump [walked out](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO4yAQQL8Gd1gwxnAuKK5xl2uvtCYwdibCYGESa_9-tam3esVrnt7_23JDTpy3f7iTb2tZMDR-06IlOAlmMV30KxHQ0JHXTtnBmsna7uFx0pFWpaJFNA7AabR_pnifwjjelcaOPSgwSoPTahxB9agBdXRGxynEwRhhFEVupfbPwrk9aE1f5U21D2Xvkn-0dpxi-CtgFjBf19Xne8h0nT9ewHyUxI3DKWCOJWOKstXXfgiYP5Qkn4RZBqy1pCRbZUwypHJy3iTW7bVTbqesIaMeRjfarvp4XJwSn9YJo7YdOX1i2q9rvgMAAP__zrRm3Q) with the Secret Service in tow. After the ruling, he had this to say: "_Absolutely ridiculous! I fully disagree with both verdicts, and will be appealing this whole Biden Directed Witch Hunt focused on me and the Republican Party_."
## Biden Sides with Environmentalists
[President Biden](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGO6yAQQNGvsTsswBiUguI16fLaLa0JjOOJMFgwsTd_v8rWW5_m6n7d5htQovz4Dxt6XsoMgenAWQnthDaz6aNfEDWOPXrlpB2tuVjbr95INOgmE-QE90VZDeC0c6ikndQ9Lj15LbWRSjslp0nLAZQGFZ1R8RLiaExnJEbiUodnocwrLuldDqxDKFuf_Mq8t2781-lrp6_neQ5L-c54to93-rqXREyhfXAlRrGWV0OxQuImMJe6lVcTGfhVIYkHNLHX8sTATRwUuNS3wHxQLXnDzJCoceurj_tJKVGzrjPysQGl3x7-885PAAAA__-QO2pe) has halted the permitting process of several proposed liquefied natural gas projects, and he cited environmental concerns as his motivation. Environmentalists cheered the decision, while energy officials viewed it as a win for Russia and a loss for American allies and jobs. Demand for U.S. natural gas exports has spiked in the [European and Asian markets](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFy6yAQAL9G6vDAgcAqKF7jzq9NqUF3J_sySGgQtpO_zzh1yp1tdvbjOl2TZNlu_9PKsS1lStjkyZNREBS4yfUUF2Zg23M0QXvr3eh9f48BZyJkBA8jAAZD4zkM7NGCW0awvUTQ4LSBYPQwgD4lA8lQcIZGJOtc5zSTtFJPn0W2duclf5cn1xOWtc_x3tp-dPZfB5cOLmnf-HW81RtqE8zcwSVvN8Vfe6ntULMQb4ofteysMMuaGqv6OA5JyiLMC50Hi5oGO1iTfAizcTBrPdKMfY20vyRnOXzonL6tSfJvSPtzy08AAAD__3CmYs4) since war erupted in Ukraine, and U.S. officials are asking for time to study and evaluate the potential impact of future natural gas production. President Biden said the pause in energy permitting was necessary because climate change is ["the existential threat of our time."](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFy8yAQBOCnQd1p4ISk3wXF36hz2pQaDGf5PAgYwFb89hm7TrvbfLvf5_VsOXDcvuxOpl3Tal3jJ60KcAbUq-68uRIhDR0ZNctpmPRpmrqbGZ12Tl4u42lG1IoGJCKv5DT-0yPS3LFBiVoqnJUcR5S9VWiVn7XyJ-cHrYWW5Lml0t8Tx3aja3ilJ5Xepb0L5tZarmL4L3ARuBzH0Rd6NCr13QtcLo_KkWoVuFCksr3eGXuKkO2jUgWbc0lPGyDSASFuQD85lQa5pDu5VuHgCC7wbhvBZzfXVuGtBqkAJ4FLV4zPB4fAdZqFlttuOXyA7c-7fgMAAP__541tEQ) The review is expected to take several months.
## Native American Artifacts Removed
In response to new federal regulations, the American Museum of Natural History in NYC is [removing two displays](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO4yAUAL8GOiJ4EIgLimvc5dorLQ4e4e1iE2GSrP9-la23Ho1Gmn_X5Rqo0nb7G1b0I7clxEFPXJQAJ8AshiefEQE1R6-ctNqayVpevNYIOcuk5UUiRqvdxQV3ztFOSZl84eRBgpEKnJLnM8hTUBBUckalKSZtDDMSE43WTx-NtlEw16M9sZ9iW3n1ZYz7zvQfBjODeRQsVOubMZjvrVI8GMzGaDVJK7YwHj1UUWgfrR9ifez4WMWGL3G0_ilibTttN4Ffhf7T2N8CPVGEFTvFsDGYeffp_qJaabeOGXlbA_30-Pj1zHcAAAD___feZiY) dedicated to Native American tribes from the Eastern Woodlands and the Great Plains. Nearly 10,000 square feet of Native American exhibitions are now silent as staff and visitors are [prohibited from visiting](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFvwyAUhH8N3ojgQXA9eOjiLV07Whie41dhiOAlaf595czdTnen0-n7vswXT4ny9cvvOPJaZh-YHjhrCb0EO9sujisioOlw1L1yxtnBuW4bTfTm7IaIcXHmI0BUzgwRIi5xWaMPHY2gwCoNvVbnM6iT1-B17K2OQ4jGWmEVRuJSTz-FMm-4pld5YD2Fsndp3JhvTZhPAZOAKb9upfERCZiOYQGT0od2AqYduZZ3K8j93vC-y7LK7PlefZIbNS71JUMqjfL18OmB0u9YKfgs8XejhbjJjE_JlRafZCi5YWaZ_LMJmLo6xtuTUqLmemHVdfeU3kf5X2x_AQAA__-NbXCc). The new laws require permission from Native American tribes before displaying any "_human remains, funerary objects, sacred objects, or objects of cultural patrimony_ ," and museums across America are rushing to empty or paper over their displays.

clean_body: A federal jury has decided that former President Trump E. Jean Carroll $83.3 million in damages. | | | | | | Saturday, January 27th, 2024 ---|--- Happy Saturday! On this day in 1880, the U.S. Patent Office issued Thomas Edison a patent for his "electric-lamp." It was a improvement on existing designs for lamps, and it propelled America into the era of electric light. () What are you up to this weekend? Hit reply and let us know if you're doing something interesting, and we'll respond with our plans. (If your weekend activities are particluarly neat, you might get a shoutout in our next edition!) Have you signed up for The Flyover yet? If not, you can fix that . Today's edition is brought to you by the good folks at . Check out their survival kits if you'd like to buy a little peace of mind. | Trump to Pay $83 Million A federal jury has decided that former President Trump E. Jean Carroll $83.3 million in damages. Carroll says that Trump forced himself on her in 1996--a claim that he's vehemently denied. A previous trial, which Trump did not attend, concluded that he was liable for sexual abuse and defamation. Trump (which would determine how much he was liable for) and he had several run-ins with Judge Lewis A. Kaplan, who threatened Trump after he said "witch hunt" and "con job" within earshot of jurors. At one point during yesterday's proceedings, Trump with the Secret Service in tow. After the ruling, he had this to say: "Absolutely ridiculous! I fully disagree with both verdicts, and will be appealing this whole Biden Directed Witch Hunt focused on me and the Republican Party." Biden Sides with Environmentalists has halted the permitting process of several proposed liquefied natural gas projects, and he cited environmental concerns as his motivation. Environmentalists cheered the decision, while energy officials viewed it as a win for Russia and a loss for American allies and jobs. Demand for U.S. natural gas exports has spiked in the since war erupted in Ukraine, and U.S. officials are asking for time to study and evaluate the potential impact of future natural gas production. President Biden said the pause in energy permitting was necessary because climate change is The review is expected to take several months. Native American Artifacts Removed In response to new federal regulations, the American Museum of Natural History in NYC is dedicated to Native American tribes from the Eastern Woodlands and the Great Plains. Nearly 10,000 square feet of Native American exhibitions are now silent as staff and visitors are . The new laws require permission from Native American tribes before displaying any "human remains, funerary objects, sacred objects, or objects of cultural patrimony ," and museums across America are rushing to empty or paper over their displays. Johnson also promised to move quickly on an impeachment vote for Homeland Security Chief Alejandro Mayorkas. ➤ Twenty-four Republican governors issued a joint statement affirming their support of Texas Gov. Greg Abbott's efforts to secure the U.S.-Mexico border. They believe President Biden has abdicated his constitutional duties to the states. ➤ The White House conditionally offered to share unredacted Jan. 6 committee records with Republicans, but it will not issue copies of documents. The administration demanded investigators maintain the anonymity of witnesses and not release operational details. | Flying together with: MEAT WARNING - High Alert: Shocking Meat Shortages Are Coming. It was also the 10-time Australian Open champ's first loss in the semi-finals. ➤ Vince McMahon, former CEO and chairman of WWE wrestling, has been accused of sexual assault and trafficking by Janel Grant, a former employee. name: UTTERLY HUMILIATED
subject: It's hard to express how we feel at this moment...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by BILL PAC
body:
Democrats in their attempt to sabotage our elections rallied millions of their supporters in favor of ERASING Voter ID laws across the country.

| |
---
| | | | |
---
| | | It's hard to express how utterly humiliated we feel at this moment.

Democrats in their attempt to sabotage our elections rallied millions of their supporters in favor of ERASING Voter ID laws across the country.

_**In response, Republicans started our own petition to protect these laws and ensure every election in the country is safe and secure.**_

But the number of responses we got was embarrassing... and the defeat we may face in the next election because of it will be even more heartbreaking.

But we've got another chance, Friend. This fight is too crucial and our election integrity is too important to quit. **[So we're asking ONE FINAL TIME: will you sign the petition and help us secure our elections right here and now?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b47b67ed60fc418abab08839d721276a&_e=5GaPElNL0o2_OR86HqC9jO8JR47nZ3PJllsSJn2b5e9ymz7ns6TloVW86_R-I4tsG6zNQgjmQuTOt6PjE_tLRkJv3Bk0BzCWkMqhBgnyy85itUfYD7iuOGE7rjJ6MU-UNfN6PuJSW7SerqTR6sdOn7gz69mOOSCdpzqAlLjswOETuX4Wu_wYMzCHTf69KtMDNHX6ajqWURFJd0iJ_qhT5yFUCRD-XBJC6_iPBhTyNm17Uy5uMcjhpK8rmg1HWlhnjrPlE-ztFq8dFkOYXgMgHEZNBILqEOQLUbmpmuVqtsCOqZDsfj9_utMqpmC7itKNZ38ZDAtbm2zw4oQSHcMb-1lWR-44ORj7pF-rJWfRSdaoJcOysD-ZXqRJ2I-VluEUBwBxyPKPx9XcftFBybCfAiKmKGwPfCaGKD1HnN-z5ituNzLsVUuPqwHsQuj_3JjRDo3roy4ECCwRC1AlI3k5qdbmSQQw9-kEna3vrncyOtCK3M3s3MlNLM-HvlTd40bl "So we’re asking ONE FINAL TIME: will you sign the petition and help us secure our elections right here and now?")**

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: 5 Things I Learned From Billy Graham
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDI3LWNlY2Y3ZGJlNjQ2ZjRmYWRiYjE4Y2M5ZDgwNjcyNjFlIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B0di5vcmcvbm5hLzUtdGhpbmdzLWktbGVhcm5lZC1mcm9tLWJpbGx5LWdyYWhhbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1iaWxseV9ncmFoYW0mdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfTExPNDU5MjMifQ/_vFtdclHrOPazDyVm4tZyg)
---
Hello, Billy Graham was the greatest evangelist since the apostle Paul and a member of First Baptist Dallas for more than fifty years. I’m sure the first words he heard upon his arrival in heaven were, ‘Well done, good and faithful servant!’”Legendary evangelist Billy Graham passed away on February 21, 2018, at his home in Montreat, North Carolina, at the age of ninety-nine. I was heartbroken when I learned of his passing, but at the same time, I was glad for Reverend Graham, because he was finally where he had always longed to be: home in heaven.In many ways, I’m a Christian today and pastor of First Baptist Dallas because of Dr. Billy Graham’s ministry.
---
| | [](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDI3LWNlY2Y3ZGJlNjQ2ZjRmYWRiYjE4Y2M5ZDgwNjcyNjFlIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B0di5vcmcvbm5hLzUtdGhpbmdzLWktbGVhcm5lZC1mcm9tLWJpbGx5LWdyYWhhbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1iaWxseV9ncmFoYW0mdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfTExPNDU5MjMifQ/R4XO16FCl35n5q6Qm0YNYg)
---
| Billy’s faithfulness to preach God’s Word led my mother to Christ and in turn taught me that God is the “respecter of no one." Meaning it doesn’t matter your race, your age, or your background anyone can be saved by faith in Jesus Christ!
---
| | As I think about Billy Graham and his extraordinary life, there are at least five important things I learned from him, and these lessons can transform your life as well.
---
To share these important lessons I created a free resource, _5 Things I Learned From Billy Graham._ This is not a personal memoir or a book of nostalgia, it is a summary of the lessons I learned from this great man and I want to share them with you so that you can deploy the same principles in your life, too!
---
[Request my free resource](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDI3LWNlY2Y3ZGJlNjQ2ZjRmYWRiYjE4Y2M5ZDgwNjcyNjFlIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B0di5vcmcvbm5hLzUtdGhpbmdzLWktbGVhcm5lZC1mcm9tLWJpbGx5LWdyYWhhbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1iaWxseV9ncmFoYW0mdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfTExPNDU5MjMifQ/nzgV_e9dSWy9bxTfL_1e7A)
---
I believe so much that valuable lessons can be learned from Billy Graham that I would like to give you this resource as a gift from _Pathway to Victory_. God bless you,Dr. Robert Jeffress
---
Liberty Ledger P.O. Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178 If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.libertyledger.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDI3LWNlY2Y3ZGJlNjQ2ZjRmYWRiYjE4Y2M5ZDgwNjcyNjFlIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/f4onk4km0Komt5oZK_chHQ) to unsubscribe.

name: Full Mag News
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bdc83cb0e15a4afcafdd7ea670afef39&_e=C7DwGnpWa6L7YX5Q0CsFV8FrqZV-kYHLjdS_5mBlysIywmcqKvjtihGvQgzPeTLT0HAa5Xb6VM_cejzbwUdlvk6MqyjdxJe7ACW6R61hvGlgI3ULR1sufheDC-arhvzYbCj0SlvLbHMap-sYosaLsA1BCPbmeOfnrVAkG3zNuINMqI0jmOBi4pdCWeYL5aa5Kv-vAEc4u0iIeWFHW4905-zlsGE2eHYLAsZXTCrxYULNBiBzfJ_3EjuME5p3JSgjr77QHq3qV9biH7tVchCe-Pinh2lxJClt4JaONT97RizyasLSmygQWHiIXaDhyfUBU6EVmT0uRgZDLbonhONQsiszIJddoK_dCKAdUMATlpYVDpEKH9GHRc-I0eyXQdgYQ8EPxR5BlQbrnnEYgWyR7bLr4k_uMToVdsTM7oaBZ8rehFKLq86RmK3MxojKeLg6)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bdc83cb0e15a4afcafdd7ea670afef39&_e=C7DwGnpWa6L7YX5Q0CsFV8FrqZV-kYHLjdS_5mBlysIywmcqKvjtihGvQgzPeTLT0HAa5Xb6VM_cejzbwUdlvk6MqyjdxJe7ACW6R61hvGlgI3ULR1sufheDC-arhvzYbCj0SlvLbHMap-sYosaLsA1BCPbmeOfnrVAkG3zNuINMqI0jmOBi4pdCWeYL5aa5Kv-vAEc4u0iIeWFHW4905-zlsGE2eHYLAsZXTCrxYULNBiBzfJ_3EjuME5p3JSgjr77QHq3qV9biH7tVchCe-Pinh2lxJClt4JaONT97RiwN05BisZkEzalBc8tVXZD5avg8KuI2VBwjx7jIWdmhc15PSSR6h2T9HWqTkYG7n0Hm52FdR-ZI94nuPH5iWMY48SQ3C3CMvbqTVl5t5uaviVKMDvmOmip3dxicfagp8NCXdr0GzP6FJF9Of9ziBJ-p)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bdc83cb0e15a4afcafdd7ea670afef39&_e=C7DwGnpWa6L7YX5Q0CsFV8FrqZV-kYHLjdS_5mBlysIywmcqKvjtihGvQgzPeTLT0HAa5Xb6VM_cejzbwUdlvk6MqyjdxJe7ACW6R61hvGlgI3ULR1sufheDC-arhvzYbCj0SlvLbHMap-sYosaLsA1BCPbmeOfnrVAkG3zNuINMqI0jmOBi4pdCWeYL5aa5Kv-vAEc4u0iIeWFHW4905-zlsGE2eHYLAsZXTCrxYULNBiBzfJ_3EjuME5p3JSgjr77QHq3qV9biH7tVchCe-Pinh2lxJClt4JaONT97RiwWQ9rz0XHpgfv69bEDm-AiHcmAbC9TS3R4aQhKzH0vHlXW0S9hglruLeuiufCLL2e-Iu30qEJi7I3ck3_-d0vvACrhdHdtXfWgvBheP18hQ2PLghjOJxUILCPQNwsP-T1UIpaSmOZ1sWT59DpIbcu3)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bdc83cb0e15a4afcafdd7ea670afef39&_e=C7DwGnpWa6L7YX5Q0CsFV8FrqZV-kYHLjdS_5mBlysIywmcqKvjtihGvQgzPeTLT0HAa5Xb6VM_cejzbwUdlvk6MqyjdxJe7ACW6R61hvGlgI3ULR1sufheDC-arhvzYbCj0SlvLbHMap-sYosaLsA1BCPbmeOfnrVAkG3zNuINMqI0jmOBi4pdCWeYL5aa5Kv-vAEc4u0iIeWFHW4905-zlsGE2eHYLAsZXTCrxYULNBiBzfJ_3EjuME5p3JSgjr77QHq3qV9biH7tVchCe-Pinh2lxJClt4JaONT97RizwZtd5loYpSSheskF5Zr2STUvtR7dYOHTnMhBiyFyhg7a8nZcAl7F7O_PxQy-dpz9znrygDMLeDVj5Ay5ISbhjiyXKAHOCAilQAkKQtz_t3LRVilJqkWLETuer6sdEy6PWYSCRaTJ6jKczu_TFuuEL).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

clean_body: His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century. That's why we produced "" which you can now own on DVD. | | | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including: good and evil, conversion and faith, prayer and the Bible, suffering and death, * heaven and hell, and much more. Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis and After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity. That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with . Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Full Mag News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Texas Is Securing America’s Border

body:

|
Peter –
This week, we saw an outpouring of support from Governors across the country who are backing up my home state of Texas as Governor Abbott works to secure our border. There has been a lot of back and forth between the White House and Texas over this issue, and the Supreme Court has even gotten involved (though their ruling is more nuanced than the commentary would suggest). I am going to dive into all of this below.
We are rapidly approaching our primary here in Texas, the first step to my re-election to Congress. I cannot win re-election without the support of committed patriots like you from across the country. If you are able to make a contribution to my campaign, even just a small amount, it will go a long way to ensure I am able to continue fighting for the issues that matter most to you in Congress.

| TEXAS HAS A RIGHT AND OBLIGATION TO DEFEND ITSELF
---
|
---
| |
---
| [CLICK HERE TO READ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001a_7lxqLZi0Lcnar18qw8ANVhf7dHpGfpWPRqCbEHh9XWTa0q8H3mreQfvUovvRK1P8KzrYT_YjRihPZZYRT_DwHAvh3W-l-ZpMd5uysYleurKp9v6Eig7fdJwbpGbZxMfe5r5NURUC-C_hsyDZ4SLuUgjCEtMd2dbpcO0hh177NJyf8dUK_naXGSA71sv4wi4hSXTtH1oWg3ufq6Z5awud6_93mT3TaqaXnCGeGJZRslHp7ga30UjhtOk3eppocD_jBrgmhRvOijd16MRVTOGg==&c=GKRNCv0foml5H_tJDYrlVB714Mj-kRi3HOZyUwSgpompunni4p3OoQ==&ch=g_Km87n0dYjw0sYDWIXsY6DFVoczbMoL_Zl8XEbWahdbQZWsXbuEhA==)
---
| Governor Greg Abbott is rightly going on the offensive against the Biden Administration as the White House tries desperately to stop Texas from implementing its own measures to secure our southern border.
Joe Biden has fought against Governor Abbott's efforts to put floating barriers in the Rio Grande, set up razor wire on the Texas-Mexico border, and take control of arresting illegal immigrants who have crossed into our state. Greg Abbott is fighting back, arguing that Texas has a right to self defense and security. That argument is strong.
As Abbott notes, "The federal government has broken the compact between the United States and the States. The Executive Branch of the United States has a constitutional duty to enforce federal laws protecting states, including immigration laws on the books right now. President Biden has refused to enforce those laws and has even violated them."
This dereliction of duty has serious consequences. Texas is on the front lines of millions of illegal immigrants pouring into our country. Mexican drug cartels have operational control over the border, and deadly fentanyl has poured into our country.
Texas has a legal right and a moral obligation to defend itself, even if Joe Biden doesn't like it.
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| AMERICA'S GOVERNORS SUPPORT TEXAS
---
|
---
| [CLICK HERE TO READ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001a_7lxqLZi0Lcnar18qw8ANVhf7dHpGfpWPRqCbEHh9XWTa0q8H3mreQfvUovvRK11S4xogfeTNHOZerbNtsXjoyzeprMGduTkYKrvdnSaEwTUZu8txpd0sYEA3vJl5R5QFrG3bC9lXuY8AsWEJ708IDm83yAGjI9RUCQu0Ii-OtJuCrYxUONIzUvR0nx33SkB6cggTodJKZInTOv3Omw2PX2nKuMfLrbubjRS2SbBWuBHw7UCA4QcWzvXJWhU9za&c=GKRNCv0foml5H_tJDYrlVB714Mj-kRi3HOZyUwSgpompunni4p3OoQ==&ch=g_Km87n0dYjw0sYDWIXsY6DFVoczbMoL_Zl8XEbWahdbQZWsXbuEhA==)
---
| Joe Biden is doing everything he can to avoid the most basic function of his office: secure the homeland. He has ignored federal immigration law and refused to take any decisive action to stop the surge of illegal immigration we've seen since he took office.
But it's more than failure to take action. Biden is actively stopping Texas from implementing its own measures to stem the tide of illegal immigration that impacts my state more than any other.
Right now, Governor Greg Abbott is fighting back against the Biden Administration on multiple fronts. Joe Biden has threatened lawsuits over Texas' seizure of Shelby Park near Eagle Pass. And Texas is engaged in a legal battle with the Biden Administration over cutting razor wire Texas set up to prevent illegal immigrant crossings.
To state the obvious, securing America's border is not Texas' job. It's the federal government's job. But since the man in charge of the federal government - Joe Biden - refuses to do anything to secure the border, states need to step in and Texas has the greatest incentive to do so because we are bearing the greatest brunt of this crisis.
Thankfully, America's Republican governors have rallied to support Governor Abbott, expressing that Texas has a right to self defense that is guaranteed by our constitution. That kind of support will be critical as these legal battles heat up and as this illegal immigration crisis continues to run rampant.
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| WHAT THE SUPREME COURT REALLY SAID IN ITS DECISION ABOUT TEXAS
---
|
---
| [CLICK HERE TO READ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001a_7lxqLZi0Lcnar18qw8ANVhf7dHpGfpWPRqCbEHh9XWTa0q8H3mreQfvUovvRK13E3U-tocGnlM0yQu7LrA-LA6HUJu47nG1oWW_-0D85Z9jS6Gb8cJk_xApxYddh1I5hoxyi4VlTTkGUnilcxkz4R5h67cqy8pbdOb0Te6L2incXYFztDNsPxxZoCPvg-G8mtSkeFootpmeAtK8Tvt18kb7bMgaOqLvv2nK7qYWwE=&c=GKRNCv0foml5H_tJDYrlVB714Mj-kRi3HOZyUwSgpompunni4p3OoQ==&ch=g_Km87n0dYjw0sYDWIXsY6DFVoczbMoL_Zl8XEbWahdbQZWsXbuEhA==)
---
| As I mentioned earlier, Texas is engaged in a legal battle with the Biden Administration over razor wire Texas set up to stop illegal immigrants from crossing into Texas. It's a commonsense measure - razor wire naturally deters people from trying to cross into our country illegally. So, naturally, Joe Biden wants Texas to remove it.
The Supreme Court weighed in this week, ruling in a 5-4 decision that the federal government could not be barred by a lower court from removing the razor wire. The commentary surrounding this decision has been unsurprisingly ridiculous, with many on the left cheering the decision while accusing Texas of "defying" the Supreme Court.
Andy McCarthy of National Review has a great piece explaining the decision in detail, which I encourage everyone to read above. Here is an excerpt:
There is a great deal of moronic commentary accusing the State of Texas of defying the Supreme Court. In point of fact, the Supreme Court did not order Texas to do anything. It vacated an order by the Fifth Circuit that, during the pendency of an ongoing lawsuit between the feds and the state, barred federal authorities from cutting concertina wire that Texas has installed in parts of its 1,254-mile border with Mexico. That is, the Supreme Court (with no opinion, and over the objection of four justices, who also did not write) held that, for now, the lower courts may not prevent the federal authorities from dismantling barriers.
That Supreme Court action did not direct Texas to do anything. The Court did not presume to tell Texas that it could not take action to protect its territory and exclude intruders -- to have done so would have been constitutionally dubious for the reasons Justice Antonin Scalia explained nearly a dozen years ago in his [Arizona v. United States opinion](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001a_7lxqLZi0Lcnar18qw8ANVhf7dHpGfpWPRqCbEHh9XWTa0q8H3mreQfvUovvRK1UbOkkcxeNvW-XUXAoRjvVTsxiBrcg8usbJ55nvsGpLdlDb2y8FV23O7lIC8loauJltRio8IdtFu-ZxHKx-hNoJgxlF8ZnaofmserdvGpVAWOgBSTSNCT9efUJEztE-ahKZrXokpeznlXxM_frBoSsoopVnV2ESpV&c=GKRNCv0foml5H_tJDYrlVB714Mj-kRi3HOZyUwSgpompunni4p3OoQ==&ch=g_Km87n0dYjw0sYDWIXsY6DFVoczbMoL_Zl8XEbWahdbQZWsXbuEhA==) -- which [Governor Gregg Abbott has explicitly relied on](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001a_7lxqLZi0Lcnar18qw8ANVhf7dHpGfpWPRqCbEHh9XWTa0q8H3mreQfvUovvRK1pjHEbZupLxIWzVjOh4Vs-nie9yE6jtoXUv8bgzeBXLpqm520MaV665ABew8bD7Xuu0hNIU3sewFJJsV4jayM9G6eY-obmDBqlFjoMdjzBT2Shtu90IbRgl8CFeTVumhD2wqR33jjgl6zr4217p65Qg==&c=GKRNCv0foml5H_tJDYrlVB714Mj-kRi3HOZyUwSgpompunni4p3OoQ==&ch=g_Km87n0dYjw0sYDWIXsY6DFVoczbMoL_Zl8XEbWahdbQZWsXbuEhA==), and which should be [read, reread, and memorized](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001a_7lxqLZi0Lcnar18qw8ANVhf7dHpGfpWPRqCbEHh9XWTa0q8H3mreQfvUovvRK1JRXh1lJVmwLuODQvl9MhcAMu1UAUiJxoBq07cOAPi8_M89N3I8XOie80ktIwxxg7CaOd5KvwgSzdZqBN_2IYh-dUfXp40WtRC2WlzY1faQOZUgLGm1QQIxsvJa8aeCvnv2gwca0e6RKPV9CFU7A5DLUWDX3-a1xJ&c=GKRNCv0foml5H_tJDYrlVB714Mj-kRi3HOZyUwSgpompunni4p3OoQ==&ch=g_Km87n0dYjw0sYDWIXsY6DFVoczbMoL_Zl8XEbWahdbQZWsXbuEhA==). (Note: Abbott described the 2012 Scalia opinion as a "dissent"; it actually concurred in part and dissented in part with the Court's multilayered decision.)

clean_body: | | | | | | | | == | Peter – This week, we saw an outpouring of support from Governors across the country who are backing up my home state of Texas as Governor Abbott works to secure our border. There has been a lot of back and forth between the White House and Texas over this issue, and the Supreme Court has even gotten involved (though their ruling is more nuanced than the commentary would suggest). I am going to dive into all of this below. We are rapidly approaching our primary here in Texas, the first step to my re-election to Congress. I cannot win re-election without the support of committed patriots like you from across the country. If you are able to make a contribution to my campaign, even just a small amount, it will go a long way to ensure I am able to continue fighting for the issues that matter most to you in Congress. | | | == | Thank you for your continued support. Now, here's your brief. | | | | | | | | TEXAS HAS A RIGHT AND OBLIGATION TO DEFEND ITSELF | | | | == | Governor Greg Abbott is rightly going on the offensive against the Biden Administration as the White House tries desperately to stop Texas from implementing its own measures to secure our southern border. Joe Biden has fought against Governor Abbott's efforts to put floating barriers in the Rio Grande, set up razor wire on the Texas-Mexico border, and take control of arresting illegal immigrants who have crossed into our state. Greg Abbott is fighting back, arguing that Texas has a right to self defense and security. That argument is strong. As Abbott notes, "The federal government has broken the compact between the United States and the States. The Executive Branch of the United States has a constitutional duty to enforce federal laws protecting states, including immigration laws on the books right now. President Biden has refused to enforce those laws and has even violated them." This dereliction of duty has serious consequences. Texas is on the front lines of millions of illegal immigrants pouring into our country. Mexican drug cartels have operational control over the border, and deadly fentanyl has poured into our country. Texas has a legal right and a moral obligation to defend itself, even if Joe Biden doesn't like it. | | | | | | | | AMERICA'S GOVERNORS SUPPORT TEXAS | | == | Joe Biden is doing everything he can to avoid the most basic function of his office: secure the homeland. He has ignored federal immigration law and refused to take any decisive action to stop the surge of illegal immigration we've seen since he took office. But it's more than failure to take action. Biden is actively stopping Texas from implementing its own measures to stem the tide of illegal immigration that impacts my state more than any other. Right now, Governor Greg Abbott is fighting back against the Biden Administration on multiple fronts. Joe Biden has threatened lawsuits over Texas' seizure of Shelby Park near Eagle Pass. And Texas is engaged in a legal battle with the Biden Administration over cutting razor wire Texas set up to prevent illegal immigrant crossings. To state the obvious, securing America's border is not Texas' job. It's the federal government's job. But since the man in charge of the federal government - Joe Biden - refuses to do anything to secure the border, states need to step in and Texas has the greatest incentive to do so because we are bearing the greatest brunt of this crisis. Thankfully, America's Republican governors have rallied to support Governor Abbott, expressing that Texas has a right to self defense that is guaranteed by our constitution. That kind of support will be critical as these legal battles heat up and as this illegal immigration crisis continues to run rampant. | | | | | | WHAT THE SUPREME COURT REALLY SAID IN ITS DECISION ABOUT TEXAS | | == | As I mentioned earlier, Texas is engaged in a legal battle with the Biden Administration over razor wire Texas set up to stop illegal immigrants from crossing into Texas. It's a commonsense measure - razor wire naturally deters people from trying to cross into our country illegally. So, naturally, Joe Biden wants Texas to remove it. The Supreme Court weighed in this week, ruling in a 5-4 decision that the federal government could not be barred by a lower court from removing the razor wire. The commentary surrounding this decision has been unsurprisingly ridiculous, with many on the left cheering the decision while accusing Texas of "defying" the Supreme Court. Andy McCarthy of National Review has a great piece explaining the decision in detail, which I encourage everyone to read above. Here is an excerpt: There is a great deal of moronic commentary accusing the State of Texas of defying the Supreme Court. In point of fact, the Supreme Court did not order Texas to do anything. It vacated an order by the Fifth Circuit that, during the pendency of an ongoing lawsuit between the feds and the state, barred federal authorities from cutting concertina wire that Texas has installed in parts of its 1,254-mile border with Mexico. That is, the Supreme Court (with no opinion, and over the objection of four justices, who also did not write) held that, for now, the lower courts may not prevent the federal authorities from dismantling barriers. That Supreme Court action did not direct Texas to do anything. The Court did not presume to tell Texas that it could not take action to protect its territory and exclude intruders -- to have done so would have been constitutionally dubious for the reasons Justice Antonin Scalia explained nearly a dozen years ago in his == -- which ==, and which should be ==. (Note: Abbott described the 2012 Scalia opinion as a "dissent"; it actually concurred in part and dissented in part with the Court's multilayered decision.) | | | | | | | | == | | | == | My custom eyepatch is back in stock - with options for left or right eye. Durable, strong, and comfortable. It's the same eyepatch I wear everyday. | | | | | | | | ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | | == | == | == | | | | | | | | NEWS | DAILY WIRE: == NATIONAL REVIEW: == TEXAS TRIBUNE: == | That's it for this week's campaign brief. Thank you for reading and staying informed. | In Service, | | Dan Crenshaw | | | | | | | | | | | | == | Was this email forwarded to you? == to get the latest updates on the fight in Washington direct from me. Any questions, comments, or concerns? Simply reply to this email or give Team Crenshaw a call at 281-888-4016. These updates are only possible with the generous gift of supporters like you!
