name: John Pierce
subject: J6: “Thousands more” to be arrested . . .
body:
So far, more than 1,200 Americans have been arrested. Through my organization, the National Constitutional Law Union (NCLU), I'm currently representing 30 of these defendants.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/3zx9_ABjowZScfX9Zxeynw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnl4w4P0SpaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9uYXRpb25hbC1jb25zdGl0dXRpb25hbC1sYXctdW5pb24vdGhvdXNhbmRzLW1vcmUtbWItcG9wYT91dG1fc291cmNlPXRob3VzYW5kcy1tb3JlJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09cG9wYSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249bWImdXRtX3RjPUNCLTIwMjQwMTI3JmFtb3VudD0yNVcDc3BjQgplsSvttGUieinZUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
Dear Patriot,

[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/3zx9_ABjowZScfX9Zxeynw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnl4w4P0SpaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9uYXRpb25hbC1jb25zdGl0dXRpb25hbC1sYXctdW5pb24vdGhvdXNhbmRzLW1vcmUtbWItcG9wYT91dG1fc291cmNlPXRob3VzYW5kcy1tb3JlJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09cG9wYSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249bWImdXRtX3RjPUNCLTIwMjQwMTI3JmFtb3VudD0yNVcDc3BjQgplsSvttGUieinZUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) The U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia recently stood behind a podium and announced the DOJ planned to charge "thousands" more Americans who were present during the January 6th protests.

So far, more than 1,200 Americans have been arrested. Through my organization, the National Constitutional Law Union (NCLU), **I 'm currently representing 30 of these defendants.**

My trial schedule is PACKED, and **[I need your continued support](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/3zx9_ABjowZScfX9Zxeynw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnl4w4P0SpaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9uYXRpb25hbC1jb25zdGl0dXRpb25hbC1sYXctdW5pb24vdGhvdXNhbmRzLW1vcmUtbWItcG9wYT91dG1fc291cmNlPXRob3VzYW5kcy1tb3JlJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09cG9wYSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249bWImdXRtX3RjPUNCLTIwMjQwMTI3JmFtb3VudD0yNVcDc3BjQgplsSvttGUieinZUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~).**

My name is John Pierce. After my tour in the United States Army, I pursued a law degree at Harvard University. I was also one of the few conservative editors of the _Harvard Law Review_ (after Obama served in that role).

We need TOUGH and relentless warriors who defend the Constitution, and that's why I gave up my lucrative law practice to pursue Constitutional Law. I never expected this to happen.

In my wildest dreams, I could not have imagined our government rounding up and arresting Americans who attended a political protest.

**During the BLM riots, federal buildings were BURNED, police were assaulted _en masse,_ and God knows how many Americans were hurt. And what happened? The Department of Justice dropped all charges against anyone involved. **

But for the January 6th protesters, our government wants to send a clear message: **Stand up to your masters and pay the price!**

I just returned to D.C. for a hearing, and my funds are running low. The cost of airfare and hotels alone for myself, the defendants, and their families are burning through funds.

Criminal litigation is EXPENSIVE, and I'm pushing the limits of my Harvard Law degree to represent these Americans who need our help.

**[Will you help keep us going?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/3zx9_ABjowZScfX9Zxeynw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnl4w4P0SpaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9uYXRpb25hbC1jb25zdGl0dXRpb25hbC1sYXctdW5pb24vdGhvdXNhbmRzLW1vcmUtbWItcG9wYT91dG1fc291cmNlPXRob3VzYW5kcy1tb3JlJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09cG9wYSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249bWImdXRtX3RjPUNCLTIwMjQwMTI3JmFtb3VudD0yNVcDc3BjQgplsSvttGUieinZUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

I have spent countless hours with these defendants and their families. Jobs and homes have been lost. Families have been destroyed. **The DOJ's goal is to terrorize these people to set an example for us all.**

What we see today are the same tactics King George III used before the Revolutionary War started. The British Crown used "writs of assistance" to carry out wide-ranging searches and arrests of anyone for anything. The tactic inspired James Madison to write the Fourth Amendment to our Constitution to protect our privacy.

Today, our government uses high-tech methods to do the same, tracking down anyone who stepped foot on Capitol grounds on January 6th and then using "anonymous" tips to determine their crimes.

Just as King George III abused his power to quell a rebellion among the colonists, our government is abusing its power to do the same.

It's 1776 all over again, and the defendants I represent are the last, best hope that our nation can continue to trust in our Constitution to keep our government in check.

My fight for these men and women isn't just about keeping them out of jail; it's about preserving the framework of our Republic. **[Please help me keep fighting](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/3zx9_ABjowZScfX9Zxeynw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnl4w4P0SpaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9uYXRpb25hbC1jb25zdGl0dXRpb25hbC1sYXctdW5pb24vdGhvdXNhbmRzLW1vcmUtbWItcG9wYT91dG1fc291cmNlPXRob3VzYW5kcy1tb3JlJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09cG9wYSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249bWImdXRtX3RjPUNCLTIwMjQwMTI3JmFtb3VudD0yNVcDc3BjQgplsSvttGUieinZUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~).**

Over the next three weeks, I must raise $58,000 to cover our expenses. Travel, hotels, paralegals, researchers, and assisting attorneys all need to be paid. My credit cards are MAXED out, and I'm relying on you and a handful of other patriots to help. **[Will you chip in today?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/3zx9_ABjowZScfX9Zxeynw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnl4w4P0SpaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9uYXRpb25hbC1jb25zdGl0dXRpb25hbC1sYXctdW5pb24vdGhvdXNhbmRzLW1vcmUtbWItcG9wYT91dG1fc291cmNlPXRob3VzYW5kcy1tb3JlJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09cG9wYSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249bWImdXRtX3RjPUNCLTIwMjQwMTI3JmFtb3VudD0yNVcDc3BjQgplsSvttGUieinZUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

Every dollar helps and is greatly appreciated.

Thank you for your time, support, and prayers.

In Vigilance,

John M. Pierce
Chairman and Founder
National Constitutional Law Union

DONATIONS TO THE NCLU ARE NOT TAX-DEDUCTIBLE

name: John Pierce
subject: J6: “Thousands more” to be arrested . . .
body:
So far, more than 1,200 Americans have been arrested. Through my organization, the National Constitutional Law Union (NCLU), I'm currently representing 30 of these defendants.

| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/RJVvjRu-0Q0oX8LPzYj7jA~~/AARclAA~~)
Dear Patriot,

[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/RJVvjRu-0Q0oX8LPzYj7jA~~/AARclAA~~) The U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia recently stood behind a podium and announced the DOJ planned to charge "thousands" more Americans who were present during the January 6th protests.

So far, more than 1,200 Americans have been arrested. Through my organization, the National Constitutional Law Union (NCLU), **I 'm currently representing 30 of these defendants.**

My trial schedule is PACKED, and **[I need your continued support](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/RJVvjRu-0Q0oX8LPzYj7jA~~/AARclAA~~).**

My name is John Pierce. After my tour in the United States Army, I pursued a law degree at Harvard University. I was also one of the few conservative editors of the _Harvard Law Review_ (after Obama served in that role).

We need TOUGH and relentless warriors who defend the Constitution, and that's why I gave up my lucrative law practice to pursue Constitutional Law. I never expected this to happen.

In my wildest dreams, I could not have imagined our government rounding up and arresting Americans who attended a political protest.

**During the BLM riots, federal buildings were BURNED, police were assaulted _en masse,_ and God knows how many Americans were hurt. And what happened? The Department of Justice dropped all charges against anyone involved. **

But for the January 6th protesters, our government wants to send a clear message: **Stand up to your masters and pay the price!**

I just returned to D.C. for a hearing, and my funds are running low. The cost of airfare and hotels alone for myself, the defendants, and their families are burning through funds.

Criminal litigation is EXPENSIVE, and I'm pushing the limits of my Harvard Law degree to represent these Americans who need our help.

**[Will you help keep us going?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/RJVvjRu-0Q0oX8LPzYj7jA~~/AARclAA~~)**

I have spent countless hours with these defendants and their families. Jobs and homes have been lost. Families have been destroyed. **The DOJ's goal is to terrorize these people to set an example for us all.**

What we see today are the same tactics King George III used before the Revolutionary War started. The British Crown used "writs of assistance" to carry out wide-ranging searches and arrests of anyone for anything. The tactic inspired James Madison to write the Fourth Amendment to our Constitution to protect our privacy.

Today, our government uses high-tech methods to do the same, tracking down anyone who stepped foot on Capitol grounds on January 6th and then using "anonymous" tips to determine their crimes.

Just as King George III abused his power to quell a rebellion among the colonists, our government is abusing its power to do the same.

It's 1776 all over again, and the defendants I represent are the last, best hope that our nation can continue to trust in our Constitution to keep our government in check.

My fight for these men and women isn't just about keeping them out of jail; it's about preserving the framework of our Republic. **[Please help me keep fighting](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/RJVvjRu-0Q0oX8LPzYj7jA~~/AARclAA~~).**

Over the next three weeks, I must raise $58,000 to cover our expenses. Travel, hotels, paralegals, researchers, and assisting attorneys all need to be paid. My credit cards are MAXED out, and I'm relying on you and a handful of other patriots to help. **[Will you chip in today?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/RJVvjRu-0Q0oX8LPzYj7jA~~/AARclAA~~)**

Every dollar helps and is greatly appreciated.

Thank you for your time, support, and prayers.

In Vigilance,

John M. Pierce
Chairman and Founder
National Constitutional Law Union

So far, more than 1,200 Americans have been arrested. Through my organization, the National Constitutional Law Union (NCLU), I 'm currently representing 30 of these defendants. My trial schedule is PACKED, and ~. My name is John Pierce. After my tour in the United States Army, I pursued a law degree at Harvard University. I was also one of the few conservative editors of the Harvard Law Review (after Obama served in that role). We need TOUGH and relentless warriors who defend the Constitution, and that's why I gave up my lucrative law practice to pursue Constitutional Law. I never expected this to happen. In my wildest dreams, I could not have imagined our government rounding up and arresting Americans who attended a political protest. During the BLM riots, federal buildings were BURNED, police were assaulted en masse, and God knows how many Americans were hurt. And what happened? The Department of Justice dropped all charges against anyone involved. But for the January 6th protesters, our government wants to send a clear message: Stand up to your masters and pay the price! name: Navy SEAL
subject: 13 murdered Americans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
The DSCC has announced an 8 figure spend in Montana and Ohio. I need your support to make sure Schumer can’t buy this seat. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=82d56eb05ca145d0ac22d96efa0ddf62&_t=TyqkRwaAwIdy6g8ZUfuwIRs5rar0iZUWS7WVYYYjUo2hh-Z7wtSJSAD0oLwey54675zx5QliDygcrczZ-PoqtQb5ThgrfH4NZJTxQFcLDC4%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=82d56eb05ca145d0ac22d96efa0ddf62&_t=TyqkRwaAwIdy6g8ZUfuwIRs5rar0iZUWS7WVYYYjUo2hh-Z7wtSJSAD0oLwey54675zx5QliDygcrczZ-PoqtQb5ThgrfH4NZJTxQFcLDC4%3D)
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=82d56eb05ca145d0ac22d96efa0ddf62&_e=mIrQE_k367ObBUALCFgNm2fd4MiZjsQXfgvj5eS7hGWzeTGzF6OjOAA85oLRd8Qu5Z59Ixs9zPxsTqAxPukUWHn4VqRGE3wCz0NdNfB0UL1xol-myioyLdJxILZCVPUjbIZtUxr_nKYZFQPNAqvrvO7ZnnA8qO0MDZ1OevRVEceyF2WY8c89Ci4KnhztKiEiqjh9CCZB_zUHBZF3b1_wemiO3eAeHrKW9I6kemwAVWNOlf2i3G0Nh93EbHNwBDJCKyi2hy_aM52DgFh5bw22UuWp4p3zx6FDPtiXKYoz8MxTvQmXMufDRkAA7Ld3VmscK5ReSRMCjOSfM4PbhnzREqF-XY6rJyo-BZ9vrxb5oWPYllHz-u6ptLsCp43SJOoHZYNwY4_aBZZ2AB2CUcnYPDk8S0nXUpoe8OiINpezDNY%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

**As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle.** Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams.

My name is Tim Sheehy, Republican candidate for U.S. Senate from Montana. You probably don't know me, or if you do, likely from emails like this one. I’m a former U.S. Navy SEAL and a 2008 Naval Academy graduate. Right now, I'm the only person standing in the way of Chuck Schumer and his Senate majority.

**[I'm reaching out today to make the case that I'm worth your personal endorsement](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=82d56eb05ca145d0ac22d96efa0ddf62&_e=mIrQE_k367ObBUALCFgNm2fd4MiZjsQXfgvj5eS7hGWzeTGzF6OjOAA85oLRd8Qu5Z59Ixs9zPxsTqAxPukUWHn4VqRGE3wCz0NdNfB0UL1xol-myioyLdJxILZCVPUjbIZtUxr_nKYZFQPNAqvrvO7ZnnA8qO0MDZ1OevRVEceyF2WY8c89Ci4KnhztKiEiqjh9CCZB_zUHBZF3b1_wemiO3eAeHrKW9I6kemwAVWNOlf2i3G0Nh93EbHNwBDJCnZmmV1eKnacgjtano6QmHCD-__Mf6hJ3lAfRLqvrTt1vTYJdXwh9Cj9MT7PexV8MISTghFSgHNjsF61zKKsX5bCiwZ0D9Ftahyi8SAoK8MIjPIeZ_7rSLPwIBQVx12291mp2SVnoc_JONJllKHJXVAmZJVG-nTPgZ_ci1Jw4QtM%3D)**.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=82d56eb05ca145d0ac22d96efa0ddf62&_e=mIrQE_k367ObBUALCFgNm2fd4MiZjsQXfgvj5eS7hGWzeTGzF6OjOAA85oLRd8Qu5Z59Ixs9zPxsTqAxPukUWHn4VqRGE3wCz0NdNfB0UL1xol-myioyLdJxILZCVPUjbIZtUxr_nKYZFQPNAqvrvO7ZnnA8qO0MDZ1OevRVEceyF2WY8c89Ci4KnhztKiEiqjh9CCZB_zUHBZF3b1_wemiO3eAeHrKW9I6kemwAVWNOlf2i3G0Nh93EbHNwBDJCi6Vx2jz25RVbve_dRR7lnox4vBz3LTATVmMldqflo4U3azIjvYzjeKlz5qAsAEy60-KzWVjigmFIWp-uhS2YVIyfxpv9CRAHaL8M7mPxtPKTLrik3c_nAKdJwxJH37ttPUh8VaStfKls_9JV6Kkcut6JU7VhrUp08e1oPC8VUuI%3D)
In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [**many veterans like me**] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally **sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport** so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead.

Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. _**Not service in politics, but on the battlefield.**_ I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free.

**[Today, I’m reaching out to ask you to personally endorse my campaign to become the next U.S. Senator from Montana.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=82d56eb05ca145d0ac22d96efa0ddf62&_e=mIrQE_k367ObBUALCFgNm2fd4MiZjsQXfgvj5eS7hGWzeTGzF6OjOAA85oLRd8Qu5Z59Ixs9zPxsTqAxPukUWHn4VqRGE3wCz0NdNfB0UL1xol-myioyLdJxILZCVPUjbIZtUxr_nKYZFQPNAqvrvO7ZnnA8qO0MDZ1OevRVEceyF2WY8c89Ci4KnhztKiEiqjh9CCZB_zUHBZF3b1_wemiO3eAeHrKW9I6kemwAVWNOlf2i3G0Nh93EbHNwBDJCL_cgeAiMOQzY4MlhsUJksxTavMOUCbZrlBS-GzQ2SDMsn0vy81xofydVXWH9ehwk2fdIh-Vd-5O4cuEoJnlNqgi7nCMAUXUz8_uwRQduD0GIbbFDxA_Q0xp0Nmt9xpqjAi1Jc0LZ8_xNr-P-Ra3IKUOz4OWyvrrE2zKb3V6LB7I%3D)**

_**Chuck Schumer and Washington Democrats know that I pose a direct threat to their chances of holding on to power, and they'll do anything to stop me from winning this race - and spend $100M plus in the process. **_

Fellow Conservative, I am under no illusions that you will support my campaign the first time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that **anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it.**

**I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read.**

In the Navy, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the individuals who have earned the honor of serving in the elite task force that is the Navy SEALs, a group of highly trained combat warriors – a brotherhood – in which I earned a spot following my graduation from the United States Naval Academy at Annapolis.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=82d56eb05ca145d0ac22d96efa0ddf62&_e=mIrQE_k367ObBUALCFgNm2fd4MiZjsQXfgvj5eS7hGWzeTGzF6OjOAA85oLRd8Qu5Z59Ixs9zPxsTqAxPukUWHn4VqRGE3wCz0NdNfB0UL1xol-myioyLdJxILZCVPUjbIZtUxr_nKYZFQPNAqvrvO7ZnnA8qO0MDZ1OevRVEceyF2WY8c89Ci4KnhztKiEiqjh9CCZB_zUHBZF3b1_wemiO3eAeHrKW9I6kemwAVWNOlf2i3G0Nh93EbHNwBDJCu662QyNxUP_q8-K6xbpaWUb1rIJ0S3-DbZTBgoSDbaNjUU-ypZ_M3oCkJOsBifak3Ltb1sxmq94nWp8aW46fXuk6zPqyOmidftgEea7N7cktp3cyw1N_bDDIzncx2kHoACgdKp67Iz69vOSYa7Gy2tRdjhT8T93eWvEuLVd3rwE%3D)
[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=82d56eb05ca145d0ac22d96efa0ddf62&_e=mIrQE_k367ObBUALCFgNm2fd4MiZjsQXfgvj5eS7hGWzeTGzF6OjOAA85oLRd8Qu5Z59Ixs9zPxsTqAxPukUWHn4VqRGE3wCz0NdNfB0UL1xol-myioyLdJxILZCVPUjbIZtUxr_nKYZFQPNAqvrvO7ZnnA8qO0MDZ1OevRVEceyF2WY8c89Ci4KnhztKiEiqjh9CCZB_zUHBZF3b1_wemiO3eAeHrKW9I6kemwAVWNOlf2i3G0Nh93EbHNwBDJCKSf0Yg7PDHbA_QmiqFirlEX308jKgWB3dTrZVnStNhyVjnag7xPoEENj1TCp8CnF-jnFiUWlTz-Z-sNR31cf25GQ0QZoZdw6kPwJ24rLoJdOW2E60UWE-7HHHNkkmatvJ9USBz1rmLfZTWXjlePeR8ypBGQ_blDnNaUOBJyvUfI%3D)

Being a SEAL isn’t a one-man job; it takes teamwork, problem-solving, and coming to a consensus. **When you’re on missions in the harshest environments known to man, you must act as a unit and recognize you’re only as strong as the weakest among you.**

I’ve deployed to Iraq, Afghanistan, South America, and the Pacific during my time as a SEAL, and I have been involved in dozens of engagements with enemy forces and survived to tell the tales. _And believe me, there are some tales._

clean_body: The DSCC has announced an 8 figure spend in Montana and Ohio. I need your support to make sure Schumer can’t buy this seat. | | Fellow Conservative, As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle. Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams. My name is Tim Sheehy, Republican candidate for U.S. Senate from Montana. You probably don't know me, or if you do, likely from emails like this one. I’m a former U.S. Navy SEAL and a 2008 Naval Academy graduate. Right now, I'm the only person standing in the way of Chuck Schumer and his Senate majority. . In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [many veterans like me] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead. Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. Not service in politics, but on the battlefield. I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free. Chuck Schumer and Washington Democrats know that I pose a direct threat to their chances of holding on to power, and they'll do anything to stop me from winning this race - and spend $100M plus in the process. Fellow Conservative, I am under no illusions that you will support my campaign the first time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it. I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read. In the Navy, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the individuals who have earned the honor of serving in the elite task force that is the Navy SEALs, a group of highly trained combat warriors – a brotherhood – in which I earned a spot following my graduation from the United States Naval Academy at Annapolis. name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: The greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4bfa8677ebe54931a4af606702e15cc9&_e=lJ0tMsDrTF3GDVutsIC-hvJr1sLSMErDN3cIs49AZJTCiXV9rxAUI7GDap_MXccttUp3snts9EgUWInuS7_dlkiW2jJoRjV4Z9WpwAh3szp9znl_HlgIaHzKNqklGnbIpFuTtv9TKyxl5qIXan1UzzToG7wV39FqjF1o03Ff2AxhKViprq1kTxGOAugAbwi9JWBaY5EpyPEaPMNUlL5lQjvy8_nP6X1I_gpCWid2wq8ZFMHCYMfbpaZMfHDaJpVnJ2NLk9Sj1ixbEeCzjyhhEwlxl7QAtfPgyMSewKR_Z7L7ujvEb4BTUv6p_F9EUb49u1hTqRasTqL_bx3NqhcFvV4GOl9rcAk3pRpVXqZXfPhPEcVhSHz_I-FKNuFnUq5Xvy4TAfiL50Y3ucRP8y3XKTovQaRumXXYfjWHDxBTXcAM9FA_xVTxon5uKt4J7pJa)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4bfa8677ebe54931a4af606702e15cc9&_e=lJ0tMsDrTF3GDVutsIC-hvJr1sLSMErDN3cIs49AZJTCiXV9rxAUI7GDap_MXccttUp3snts9EgUWInuS7_dlkiW2jJoRjV4Z9WpwAh3szp9znl_HlgIaHzKNqklGnbIpFuTtv9TKyxl5qIXan1UzzToG7wV39FqjF1o03Ff2AxhKViprq1kTxGOAugAbwi9JWBaY5EpyPEaPMNUlL5lQjvy8_nP6X1I_gpCWid2wq8ZFMHCYMfbpaZMfHDaJpVnJ2NLk9Sj1ixbEeCzjyhhEwlxl7QAtfPgyMSewKR_Z7IsPB6BHPpp0Un3COfKQ9K723Q3QBYQVGuhmUF3EAEgsjxVoAgc_xPhKx3cBPjAvUQq_2t8jP7Je1Ni76oEwqjee7hoHhQO4UhtD_u1RzonVKTIwc1FZaJpE909PHceVAWfDuVFwHEFCQZE3FtLHbWE)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4bfa8677ebe54931a4af606702e15cc9&_e=lJ0tMsDrTF3GDVutsIC-hvJr1sLSMErDN3cIs49AZJTCiXV9rxAUI7GDap_MXccttUp3snts9EgUWInuS7_dlkiW2jJoRjV4Z9WpwAh3szp9znl_HlgIaHzKNqklGnbIpFuTtv9TKyxl5qIXan1UzzToG7wV39FqjF1o03Ff2AxhKViprq1kTxGOAugAbwi9JWBaY5EpyPEaPMNUlL5lQjvy8_nP6X1I_gpCWid2wq8ZFMHCYMfbpaZMfHDaJpVnJ2NLk9Sj1ixbEeCzjyhhEwlxl7QAtfPgyMSewKR_Z7L2umocx7jdn1ckkbKAVT0929AndvS_adxVaYgkKqDUck7vfnW-g_tnPi-ZH3Acd9TGIqtogPLqdqxZYOL2eplT1TR0JphIA_UJZVsgb6F6PW1h_OU4ke0ehUPrsP1MvpT2oJVeKtasfXFe0hAGu8yG)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4bfa8677ebe54931a4af606702e15cc9&_e=lJ0tMsDrTF3GDVutsIC-hvJr1sLSMErDN3cIs49AZJTCiXV9rxAUI7GDap_MXccttUp3snts9EgUWInuS7_dlkiW2jJoRjV4Z9WpwAh3szp9znl_HlgIaHzKNqklGnbIpFuTtv9TKyxl5qIXan1UzzToG7wV39FqjF1o03Ff2AxhKViprq1kTxGOAugAbwi9JWBaY5EpyPEaPMNUlL5lQjvy8_nP6X1I_gpCWid2wq8ZFMHCYMfbpaZMfHDaJpVnJ2NLk9Sj1ixbEeCzjyhhEwlxl7QAtfPgyMSewKR_Z7Lb41laAebxfoZ3n4PKXXswSGb2YFaYxTAOSaulLVA0mNBw-VDN8l3Lfu4M5jxLfBAKFQjqy7q_JjOomw3MP4PIkV8-moIO40XLH1ErX2aIQic_8CUn-s3LPhgIplcKwYYNKKcbIoUhrG7P334zprHe).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=4bfa8677ebe54931a4af606702e15cc9&_t=pxZvJd1Os7nMibdCMwc57LkhxRnO8C8ElWHR3WfGKcHhjw8GCgwwglFUNEYZTez5RZWXcBzq1rFuTG5L4FCnb0ueWfJmVMfSHaMEPilZqIygSLvClTkEgkrGNq9jiMLJiZPxxwrMpTX4Erz1FuDGgKoNe7nTI-APWiYG4RWBxo4%3D)

body:
This is your LAST chance.

|
---
| | |
**Are you there? I still haven 't heard back from you...**

Friend,

It's Kevin McCarthy. name: Add Your Name (via Left Action)
subject: Sign: Demand Congress pass a farm bill that helps the environment, not hurts it
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Pass a Climate-Smart Farm Bill!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4b418612-1c6d-45d1-bc02-414e0c7390f0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T656ab506-132d-4265-9e3a-95e76e610f85/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | The farm bill is a massive, multi-year piece of legislation covering everything from farm programs, to forestry, to nutrition -- [**and it's also a critical opportunity to help stabilize our climate. **](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te8441da2-8620-452c-aeb8-56211b7d793e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This legislation, typically passed every five years, sets the stage for how agricultural communities respond to climate change. But it's currently being fought over in Congress, so we need to speak out **NOW, **and show support for sensible steps to help the climate. [**Sign on to urge the swift passage of a climate-smart farm bill.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6d684c47-7359-4614-a660-c069f875d134/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Climate-smart steps include things like: 1) Incentivizing reductions in agricultural emissions. _" Reducing methane emissions from livestock farming and nitrous oxide emissions from excess fertilizer are two particularly impactful opportunities for U.S. agriculture to slow rates of warming. So too is protecting the Inflation Reduction Act’s historic investment in rural climate solutions." (source: EDF)_ 2) Preparing agriculture to stay productive in a changing climate. _" Investing in adaptation so that farms and ranches can continue to feed a growing population and support rural economies for generations to come, even in the face of new challenges posed by climate change." (EDF)_ 3) Investing in research to better measure change, and better measure our success in fighting it. Through steps like this, we can help farmers feed people, and fight environmental change at the same time. We can do it, and we must do it. [**Sign on, and join us in urging the swift passage of a climate-smart farm bill now. **](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tefc28bb4-53ad-44a0-b411-ec50afdeffac/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc219f603-c480-4e64-93d0-1e3b5a87a328/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action

|
---

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3ac781404fc945849deeab576227c593&_e=eBlehy2fn5xfZlM3hRrzMg6vVeMP2g8fZ-olEwIY2d6f88m4I4kEsHxsKPLVj6-y9hftfWpawzjrHqA1k1teRebS994gZX9BTvnsoQDVCrN4G59LgHfR3UMy2yGzzYjV08nyega9q8T1ucYZ6K54glYC894L5i2nkmiqwsidh-iIJk3nitP9aU3d7rTxdfv1nbEbUjsX0g966wFSlNfrxjIvNfQnifJxdt8KLBVFXpe7qfrcsbe7Xxyuj08Gd-lKJBN2WA96Hvj5yfeoLd1NL9XYiPBNh-4IukgiHz9Z4jvUmOKOz3FGt84_AB1-Af5j8tZV2BpgIvgwD6KrDPGWxvRf6QjEz9ISRrP9VPHr-aQ8kCjtnl2uDEf1C2NSqGrj3PLZGvI1VdvNjAXtJOTKNA%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American,

Here in border states like Arizona, we are feeling the brunt of Joe Biden’s open border and the invasion he is allowing to happen.

But make no mistake – our entire nation is under serious threat.

**What Biden and his cronies are flat-out allowing to happen at the border teeters on outright treason.**

An open border is no border, and a nation without a border is not a sovereign nation.

America is at the mercy of the cartels, which are surely operating nationwide now and being wholly permitted to funnel drugs, crime, human trafficking victims, terrorists, and other national security threats **into any corner of our country they wish – _including your neighborhood._**

The millions that have invaded our country under Biden have ZERO allegiance to our country, our Constitution, our values, or our people. In fact, they’ve only shown us that our laws mean NOTHING to them.

**I’m running for Congress in Arizona’s 8th District to fight relentlessly to END Biden’s disastrous indifference to our open border and regain our security.**

[**I need your help to get to Washington so we have leaders there who will stop playing politics and actually get this done yesterday! Will you make a donation today to support my campaign?**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3ac781404fc945849deeab576227c593&_e=eBlehy2fn5xfZlM3hRrzMg6vVeMP2g8fZ-olEwIY2d6f88m4I4kEsHxsKPLVj6-y9hftfWpawzjrHqA1k1teRebS994gZX9BTvnsoQDVCrN4G59LgHfR3UMy2yGzzYjV08nyega9q8T1ucYZ6K54glYC894L5i2nkmiqwsidh-iIJk3nitP9aU3d7rTxdfv1nbEbUjsX0g966wFSlNfrxjIvNfQnifJxdt8KLBVFXpf31DTcTl6p3e5sXFdf_NF70L1CiPitvfsPiEpLf_DerrioBfzLBMuVgCSCXmMFiZRe_oax5easgRhIehf3i-Ch1ceQ4S4c_nRb5S2CsuXaWW_zjrWQKcjqnAMHtpL4qUuXLZZffSfr9GswPbLHduObsFYeZGDV-uEFOsQbFqsUEw%3D%3D)

[**Join Ben and Secure the Border! ➦ **](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3ac781404fc945849deeab576227c593&_e=eBlehy2fn5xfZlM3hRrzMg6vVeMP2g8fZ-olEwIY2d6f88m4I4kEsHxsKPLVj6-y9hftfWpawzjrHqA1k1teRebS994gZX9BTvnsoQDVCrN4G59LgHfR3UMy2yGzzYjV08nyega9q8T1ucYZ6K54glYC894L5i2nkmiqwsidh-iIJk3nitP9aU3d7rTxdfv1nbEbUjsX0g966wFSlNfrxjIvNfQnifJxdt8KLBVFXpd-OitwUZjw4r9sPC3sKTPmGmgJKf5HMADTOoe-loyAhzm0lT2ciq6gceTaAGzJCm4HAu0LVHC2k5E1xaoHUYsGQMSCTso-AafLJoEpYqtGkPgEmqQar-SCbeDNyzE6wIH-Ndebu_Qk55qJwUQ9fX-TsfcYIwctakdzYNBPGN62DA%3D%3D)
This is my plan to secure the border, end the invasion, and reverse the damage that has been done:

* Finish the **Wall**!
* Double the number of U.S. Border Patrol **Agents**.
* Supply the Border Patrol with drones, vehicles, technology, and **whatever else they need** to do their jobs.
* **Stop amnesty** for illegal aliens. We cannot allow lawbreakers the right to vote. Change the law to **restrict** claims of political asylum.
* **Sanction** Mexico and any other countries that aid and abet illegal immigration into our country, including cutting off foreign aid, and shutting down ports of entry.
* **Prohibiting** any taxpayer money for housing, transportation, legal services, or other aid to those who enter our country illegally.
* **Deportation** must be an option because otherwise illegal aliens will continue to be incentivized to break our laws and flood our country.

This is the LEAST that must be done in response to the open border invasion.

But first – before we can get all that done – we must defeat Biden AND restore Republican majorities in Congress.

[**I’m running for Congress in AZ-8 to secure our border and end the invasion. Please support my campaign with a generous donation of $25 or another amount today.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3ac781404fc945849deeab576227c593&_e=eBlehy2fn5xfZlM3hRrzMg6vVeMP2g8fZ-olEwIY2d6f88m4I4kEsHxsKPLVj6-y9hftfWpawzjrHqA1k1teRebS994gZX9BTvnsoQDVCrN4G59LgHfR3UMy2yGzzYjV08nyega9q8T1ucYZ6K54glYC894L5i2nkmiqwsidh-iIJk3nitP9aU3d7rTxdfv1nbEbUjsX0g966wFSlNfrxjIvNfQnifJxdt8KLBVFXpfkry99q3OiPn0RXPV-hDxpDno868SBzH0rQgZUBPOnlOj9UvrniNNIwV8eMl02HE8W--a049yp33OX6v7WPy9-gmE7vTvsAPe7tsm0Hm0sPlUHPpNY1WHJpUkFBEdg9f-ijTAl8tduTtNm7y24hb0rfBfUlZtTpH2UmkJwVSI46Q%3D%3D)

For America,

_**Ben Toma**_
Republican for AZ-8

[**Join Ben and Secure the Border! ➦ **](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3ac781404fc945849deeab576227c593&_e=eBlehy2fn5xfZlM3hRrzMg6vVeMP2g8fZ-olEwIY2d6f88m4I4kEsHxsKPLVj6-y9hftfWpawzjrHqA1k1teRebS994gZX9BTvnsoQDVCrN4G59LgHfR3UMy2yGzzYjV08nyega9q8T1ucYZ6K54glYC894L5i2nkmiqwsidh-iIJk3nitP9aU3d7rTxdfv1nbEbUjsX0g966wFSlNfrxjIvNfQnifJxdt8KLBVFXpeV0vSAdif_kn9ZJ1TrZGeG65GpXKUHsvQkKKPMc43rTc4aur0CtZPBttjwhvODS3J_wgXYwGj40S6xT6Tkgp5x3WCLgSiNUKEVqbyCyAgXflz8vQ5MPAq0lHsyAYucUOCiIXlyNF7jL1t9ouCIyRAqPnv8mGmFpGdj33tuRB1F_Q%3D%3D)

| **ABOUT BEN TOMA
**
Ben Toma’s family legally immigrated to the United States when he was just 9 years old. His family fled the dangers of communism at the time in Romania to seek freedom and build a new life here in America.

Ben is a small business owner and real estate broker, served on the Peoria City Council, and was appointed to the Arizona State House of Representatives in 2017. In 2018, Toma was elected in his own right and was quickly elevated to leadership roles by his peers. In the legislature, Toma authored and passed two landmark pieces of conservative legislation that were labeled “impossible” by both friend and foe.

First was the historic “flat tax” law bringing economic relief to working families and small businesses; to date, this was the single largest tax cut in Arizona’s history. Second, he was the author of, and instrumental in passing, the “biggest school choice victory in U.S. history” better known as universal Empowerment Scholarship Accounts. These ESAs allow parents to make the best decisions for their children’s education.

In 2023, Ben Toma was elected Speaker of the Arizona House of Representatives.

clean_body: The millions that have invaded our country under Biden have ZERO allegiance to our country, our Constitution, our values, or our people. In fact, they’ve only shown us that our laws mean NOTHING to them. | | Fellow American, Here in border states like Arizona, we are feeling the brunt of Joe Biden’s open border and the invasion he is allowing to happen. But make no mistake – our entire nation is under serious threat. What Biden and his cronies are flat-out allowing to happen at the border teeters on outright treason. An open border is no border, and a nation without a border is not a sovereign nation. America is at the mercy of the cartels, which are surely operating nationwide now and being wholly permitted to funnel drugs, crime, human trafficking victims, terrorists, and other national security threats into any corner of our country they wish – including your neighborhood. The millions that have invaded our country under Biden have ZERO allegiance to our country, our Constitution, our values, or our people. In fact, they’ve only shown us that our laws mean NOTHING to them. I’m running for Congress in Arizona’s 8th District to fight relentlessly to END Biden’s disastrous indifference to our open border and regain our security. This is my plan to secure the border, end the invasion, and reverse the damage that has been done: Finish the Wall! Double the number of U.S. Border Patrol Agents. Supply the Border Patrol with drones, vehicles, technology, and whatever else they need to do their jobs. Stop amnesty for illegal aliens. We cannot allow lawbreakers the right to vote. Change the law to restrict claims of political asylum. Sanction Mexico and any other countries that aid and abet illegal immigration into our country, including cutting off foreign aid, and shutting down ports of entry. Prohibiting any taxpayer money for housing, transportation, legal services, or other aid to those who enter our country illegally. Deportation must be an option because otherwise illegal aliens will continue to be incentivized to break our laws and flood our country. This is the LEAST that must be done in response to the open border invasion. But first – before we can get all that done – we must defeat Biden AND restore Republican majorities in Congress. For America, Ben Toma Republican for AZ-8 | ABOUT BEN TOMA Ben Toma’s family legally immigrated to the United States when he was just 9 years old. His family fled the dangers of communism at the time in Romania to seek freedom and build a new life here in America. Ben is a small business owner and real estate broker, served on the Peoria City Council, and was appointed to the Arizona State House of Representatives in 2017. In 2018, Toma was elected in his own right and was quickly elevated to leadership roles by his peers. In the legislature, Toma authored and passed two landmark pieces of conservative legislation that were labeled “impossible” by both friend and foe. First was the historic “flat tax” law bringing economic relief to working families and small businesses; to date, this was the single largest tax cut in Arizona’s history. Second, he was the author of, and instrumental in passing, the “biggest school choice victory in U.S. history” better known as universal Empowerment Scholarship Accounts. These ESAs allow parents to make the best decisions for their children’s education. In 2023, Ben Toma was elected Speaker of the Arizona House of Representatives. Follow Ben!** | Paid for by Ben Toma for Congress.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Is China a threat & how to respond? Update from Mississippi’s conservative voice
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/successsequence-11571620?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**Thirty three years ago, the Soviet Union fell apart.** A Marxist-Leninist system that had stood in competition with the Western way of life for half a century was no more.

**Unfortunately, in that moment of triumph, Western leaders made a serious mistake.** They started to believe that there had been an inevitability about Western success.

**If the Soviet Union had ditched communism in favor of free markets, everyone else would become more Western, too, right?** Wrong – and nowhere more so than with regard to China.
---
|
---
| **At the turn of the century, when China was welcomed into the World Trade Organization, all the clever people at the State Department assumed it was only a matter of time before China’s emerging middle class would make the country more like us.**

Under Deng Xiaoping and immediately after, China had permitted private enterprise, and the country’s communist rulers had imposed limits on their power. China’s provinces enjoyed a high degree of autonomy, with Hong Kong even having her own legal system, currency and democracy.

**Deng’s leadership, we can now see, did not represent a new direction for China, but a brief interlude. **Under Xi, China has reverted to the Ming tradition; authoritarian government, overzealous control, the targeting of anyone independently wealthy.

Rather than becoming part of the international system, China seems to be a threat to it. Democracy has been crushed in Hong Kong. Military bases have been built in the south China sea. Taiwan is at risk of invasion.

**If China is behaving like she is in competition with the Western way it is because she is. We need to recognize this and act accordingly.**
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=189f596c20&e=5703353baa)
---
_Click the photo above to purchase your tickets!_
| **Michael Pillsbury at the Heritage Foundation** is the author of a best-selling book about China. He will be speaking at a special lunch event in Jackson, Mississippi on Tuesday February 13th.

**Joining him will be Mississippi Senator Roger Wicker** , who has been heroically at the forefront of efforts to ensure that America is better prepared to meet any challenge from China.
**_Of the 120 places available, we now only have 30 seats left – so if you would like to join us on February 13 th you need to book now by clicking on the image above._**
**There is nothing inevitable about the rise of China.** Faced with a demographic decline, and an innovation-sapping authoritarian regime, China may not be destined for global hegemony the way we have been told. But that may not make the Chinese government any easier to deal with.

At the same time, rather than becoming more Western, many parts of the world besides China – such as Turkey, Pakistan or Egypt - seem less Western than they were.

**The West itself is becoming less Western, with Europe undergoing dramatic demographic change.** Having prevailed against a Marxist-Leninist system in Russia, Western leaders allowed a Marxist-Identitarian system to incubate in our universities. Many US universities no longer teach Western Classics and have in effect abandoned the European Enlightenment.
---
|
---
| The West needs leaders willing to set aside post-Cold War assumptions. Rather than presume Western success, we need leaders who recognize that it is tough and difficult to stand up for Western interests – but also essential.

**Above all, we need leaders that appreciate that Western culture is the product of ideas and insights that did not arise in a vacuum. The Western way needs safeguarding not just aboard, but on college campuses here in the United States, too. **

Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=a2ef591406&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=9e292d9956) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=9e292d9956).

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=07edbd6d28f448609937a81308dae0d5&_e=cc_O2mdSLjcqzU3QcSta4qJVoaHwnWGVOjXSc9hlrE32tqwtyy7lT8Fzh4lJuTHR7z66oZJ3Epj3Tr_zh9ah6zXBJPng0JFl0gkBLM4wEiuMUHmlkkzlWBM2C-iGXP88qXxkbZqPEbD75ASbGLPRkd0qgFL0fp9ukeUR4dpS8ydkHs3Bp6rP41uQ7khn4kicu9UmKUk3Q5MW4nYzag5QwGvghSmWPVtCOr7bC2hMABSmU--Byy7GnhM9-bbAlFRq5egISgYuxM_Fvsf40RTq4sTMMJyQKK2IfdOOk51w_sE_VJbdqya5IIEVLZ3lnasuaOyBUx8ffkCd3C0sXqzSQQmGyDnFj9GmxGRaZaoHhNOaRZqYUbwXLZaKtSseg1vmHg_mIXQGwHeZRR-7MgdVWGeezRL9lWtbTVSMLI7Le0mjgUzzZbpRy0vF7VrTPdfU)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=07edbd6d28f448609937a81308dae0d5&_e=cc_O2mdSLjcqzU3QcSta4qJVoaHwnWGVOjXSc9hlrE32tqwtyy7lT8Fzh4lJuTHR7z66oZJ3Epj3Tr_zh9ah6zXBJPng0JFl0gkBLM4wEiuMUHmlkkzlWBM2C-iGXP88qXxkbZqPEbD75ASbGLPRkd0qgFL0fp9ukeUR4dpS8ydkHs3Bp6rP41uQ7khn4kicu9UmKUk3Q5MW4nYzag5QwGvghSmWPVtCOr7bC2hMABSmU--Byy7GnhM9-bbAlFRq5egISgYuxM_Fvsf40RTq4sTMMJyQKK2IfdOOk51w_sEoT6XirJdsbxFb-iPy-gV9ee9YDtX0m40swnyROpQShhaekb4xYSj_29F4cudkpKvcPdgv5y3e1BfUD_IdYDAlscVYjBsJDOmSrUjbv1JhR1xjxiylQ6GCYn38vyUiCPNepHevgnsii8gnYHhyUTZb)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=07edbd6d28f448609937a81308dae0d5&_e=cc_O2mdSLjcqzU3QcSta4qJVoaHwnWGVOjXSc9hlrE32tqwtyy7lT8Fzh4lJuTHR7z66oZJ3Epj3Tr_zh9ah6zXBJPng0JFl0gkBLM4wEiuMUHmlkkzlWBM2C-iGXP88qXxkbZqPEbD75ASbGLPRkd0qgFL0fp9ukeUR4dpS8ydkHs3Bp6rP41uQ7khn4kicu9UmKUk3Q5MW4nYzag5QwGvghSmWPVtCOr7bC2hMABSmU--Byy7GnhM9-bbAlFRq5egISgYuxM_Fvsf40RTq4sTMMJyQKK2IfdOOk51w_sGjIUgUJpasUi-O3AY5ex1x6gyKTCowmeg3U-opDNk47HbNh8jvX-uGAE73atm6QiizZ4ivK8ZOUThdE3LsaISLZHpvQliF_b32GNLoN7bKysD4elzQtkVqtfZ8Ebg2N7NhiVo-ixmcmyEjcA9lH_jd)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=07edbd6d28f448609937a81308dae0d5&_e=cc_O2mdSLjcqzU3QcSta4qJVoaHwnWGVOjXSc9hlrE32tqwtyy7lT8Fzh4lJuTHR7z66oZJ3Epj3Tr_zh9ah6zXBJPng0JFl0gkBLM4wEiuMUHmlkkzlWBM2C-iGXP88qXxkbZqPEbD75ASbGLPRkd0qgFL0fp9ukeUR4dpS8ydkHs3Bp6rP41uQ7khn4kicu9UmKUk3Q5MW4nYzag5QwGvghSmWPVtCOr7bC2hMABSmU--Byy7GnhM9-bbAlFRq5egISgYuxM_Fvsf40RTq4sTMMJyQKK2IfdOOk51w_sF7YdRfYEiB8b4VyngRFuSyZRJ0vTB50GQuZsn9ozZqZ3ovAJcj7KQzETMLr_jnklkZCx7Jm-Y2ZJL34QKotmwHXrILteDmFN2QxAd9HOP-NW-l-UJNNXp6bWco5dNmTW8eRF6DDQdc6Wtxx9zU5X8J).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Team Kennedy
subject: WikiLeaks Exposed Deep State
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
The Deep State wants to silence Assange because he dared publish news

|
---
| | | **The Deep State wants to silence Assange because he dared publish news
**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=julian_1_27_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=1)
|
---
Dear Peter,
Julian Assange, founder and publisher of Wikileaks, exposed the U.S. Deep State.
Assange uncovered and exposed a cache of hundreds of thousands of pieces of information, including the hiring of child prostitutes by Defense Department contractors, friendly fire incidents, human rights abuses, civilian killings, and use of psychological warfare by the United States.
The U.S. military-industrial complex charged Assange with 17 counts under the Espionage Act for alleged obtainment and disclosure of classified national defense information. If convicted, he could serve up to 175 years behind bars.
The Deep State wants to silence Assange because he dared publish news—albeit news that was inconvenient to the U.S. Security State—that exposed their horrendous misdeeds and lies.
President Trump’s administration brought charges against Assange over WikiLeaks' 2010 publication of cables leaked by the U.S. Army intelligence analyst Chelsea Manning, which detailed war crimes committed by the U.S. government in Iraq, Afghanistan, and the Guantánamo Bay, Cuba, detention camp.
The leaked materials exposed instances of the CIA engaging in torture and rendition.
WikiLeaks' "Collateral Murder" video also showed the U.S. military gunning down civilians in Iraq, including two _Reuters_ journalists.
And the U.S. Department of Defense, whose crimes and human rights abuses Assange exposed multiple times, seeks a life sentence for Assange and a continual cover-up of their very real crimes.
As President, Robert F. Kennedy Jr. will stop any and all attempts to extradite Julian Assange to the United States and drop all charges against him. RFK Jr. will also seek to expose the crimes of the Deep State: the NSA, FBI, DOJ, CIA, and numerous other agencies who are violating the norms of civilized society and our Constitution.

name: Mike Rogers
subject: I was done with politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rogers for Senate
body:
I thought that was it, Friend.| | |
---
[](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=c9a09b9bffd0456bb16797661a6ed9d6&_e=HGEWl4TRLXkBUdqKpy0xM5hwN0kNlvZk2bk3zrQMxTDiu56B5J_BN5Pa3OGORahLio-YwpAnjDxRa04FJS-IMVxeMSLI6SDpfqx6A2K17CZG0VmcZhIToKxdMr-079dmjnldl_k-EWfPNzn2ICqVRwXSBs6WViZZNra134NT3pH9KEUYlgKFoVROarx6duZhEo85km2fRdxOy7uCzGyqvlHnzpXIh7ObkGy2DrUR0-NFbsLDF0DbVhk3cK-194aMVQCgzUEu__NGzFsebN9QsXbL_fIIfjOjyP06WikEGupZI1DZcXtzCHlOT7JTg_OpGxXommyrbzJrHdw-nCoC59faAs_o3lhdQC6hy0yGtQFIIVj83wNxRtmEP19MTalr_SHEXs8kyrChN25L0U-5xA%3D%3D)
---
Friend, I thought I was done with politics. I’d have been happy to never see the inside of the Capitol again. I was ready to devote my full attention to my cybersecurity career in the private sector. But when duty calls, I answer. This is Mike Rogers, and when I left Congress in 2015, I truly thought I’d never run for office again. But our country has a lot of problems and I can’t in good conscience sit on the sidelines. **-A practically nonexistent southern border** **-Chinese threats breathing down our necks** **-More inflation than a busy tire shop** **[That’s why I’ve made the decision to run for the U.S. Senate in Michigan–and I need your help to win.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=c9a09b9bffd0456bb16797661a6ed9d6&_e=HGEWl4TRLXkBUdqKpy0xM5hwN0kNlvZk2bk3zrQMxTDiu56B5J_BN5Pa3OGORahLio-YwpAnjDxRa04FJS-IMVxeMSLI6SDpfqx6A2K17CZG0VmcZhIToKxdMr-079dmjnldl_k-EWfPNzn2ICqVRwXSBs6WViZZNra134NT3pH9KEUYlgKFoVROarx6duZhEo85km2fRdxOy7uCzGyqvlHnzpXIh7ObkGy2DrUR0-NFbsLDF0DbVhk3cK-194aMkE7D-nqd0vnauGQ2qgwimvZFGoKpvtt4zEqvzjaf1slgOHOo-7pZ0jc2GHJCqYEtXEmLHUdHlHwW4mVNov3lfdH5v5bSKqQEHpUosJmGuBIX2BMEi1Mnz5zSHzJJ4rQXggU0sL8vWV03m6sdDnxfJA%3D%3D)** Friend, I’ll be blunt: If Democrats stay in power for another two years, America as we know it could cease to exist. And Chuck Schumer’s handpicked-candidate Elissa Slotkin has already raised **MILLIONS** of dollars to defeat me. **Here are three reasons you should invest in saving America's future by helping me defeat the radical Democrats in Michigan (whether you’re from California, Texas, Florida, or Hawaii)** 1: **Michigan is the only open seat that’s truly up for grabs by either party.** With no incumbent running, this is one of the best opportunities to flip a seat from blue to red. 2: **As goes Michigan, so goes America.** In 2008, 2012, 2016, and 2020, the party that won Michigan took **BOTH** the White House and The Senate. If WE take Michigan next year, it virtually guarantees that Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden will lose their power. 3: **This race is going to be CLOSE.** I won my first House election by about 100 votes. Next year’s Senate election could be decided by even less! Your donation of $10 could help us reach HUNDREDS of voters and could be the difference between 4 more years of total Democrat control and a TOTAL Republican VICTORY! So, Friend, can I count on you to **[**contribute any amount**](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=c9a09b9bffd0456bb16797661a6ed9d6&_e=HGEWl4TRLXkBUdqKpy0xM5hwN0kNlvZk2bk3zrQMxTDiu56B5J_BN5Pa3OGORahLio-YwpAnjDxRa04FJS-IMVxeMSLI6SDpfqx6A2K17CZG0VmcZhIToKxdMr-079dmjnldl_k-EWfPNzn2ICqVRwXSBs6WViZZNra134NT3pH9KEUYlgKFoVROarx6duZhEo85km2fRdxOy7uCzGyqvlHnzpXIh7ObkGy2DrUR0-NFbsLDF0DbVhk3cK-194aMSATYQBTCyniIHuO98bQ6I32gmsijcNmL6ze9Mv4byz1QWQNT5oorgcoTYjfp_AlvxNV-YWKcmGVrrSsT7p9FeemAgZ2AF1JZ0bF7HTkD-F5DRG3CMtfEoumk18RZ73cHmpEJ5UMKjAWgHFA4gL3KjA%3D%3D)** to make sure our country is in the **RIGHT** hands next year? Anything you can give will be monumental in helping us win. Thanks for your support. Sincerely, Mike
---
Paid for by Rogers for Senate.
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com[](mailto:mark@convert-digital.com). Don't want to receive these emails anymore? Click [here.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_s=c9a09b9bffd0456bb16797661a6ed9d6&_t=UD2HPPWfL8PwIQheKQxYULYuQhpYkvIvLtaDQNRQf4_vbdqaGIGZR4cPrHDvzUQZ7Zlh38YQ70QtXlDdJ2B5o0bmCyUSWeOC9LqnFnE7sl4%3D) Rogers for Senate P.O. name: Navy SEAL Alert
subject: Our homeland is in danger
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
I could never have imagined that perhaps the toughest mission of my life wouldn’t be as a Navy SEAL but rather as a combat veteran preparing to run for the United States Senate. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=73d96cf016734c868716954322c83041&_t=XH5lU6cKtQeoDVzwSUxSe6vuwbMmpuDkpTMKDfgcc5CQVHpz9T_uVC_OFYf4YF8P8HpjZiOaGWHo8QnTRzs5MuMnxfv_EO6-zPp39V3iarQ%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=73d96cf016734c868716954322c83041&_t=XH5lU6cKtQeoDVzwSUxSe6vuwbMmpuDkpTMKDfgcc5CQVHpz9T_uVC_OFYf4YF8P8HpjZiOaGWHo8QnTRzs5MuMnxfv_EO6-zPp39V3iarQ%3D)
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=73d96cf016734c868716954322c83041&_e=YTOlLOdN86WpVt0kGJWnnlS2p4ap2F5CW1u4GGzm9s4xl5susjLAGtc_FDf6XDRiVf3NbvzUO-mU5Z5t9qHNtWJKjV7oMlkXKVgSb1kEFhzabwoWWAiQnY5HXHJ0Ac0fYcEheCjQZ5S5RovXGR7EFI38DNHB_t4Nb1A-fEjrE1-e9d-VPddomjFDLaGyg27WPv-KioYHTRdU6pQVzxWAly0b8_K7pae5REdXS9qR0qcJmHnb_oh-QFDALdzkh-euJzkNzs9-uivaIEqXzi6OjoWcgK82EWn48BhAGurSV6tfLt1lcrHaTcT03mfUexYJVlIIBSJmSi1ADrshPbZ8xTOjYOtP8TU1Q63fTA_sWi0l5NirIlD83Iq2xb_nn2lpaTmcMkPEjmX0g0s1y-ejsWi6Q0PhePgBQ0r0djzF7Mg%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

**As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle.** Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams.

My name is Tim Sheehy, Republican candidate for U.S. Senate from Montana. You probably don't know me, or if you do, likely from emails like this one. I’m a former U.S. Navy SEAL and a 2008 Naval Academy graduate. Right now, I'm the only person standing in the way of Chuck Schumer and his Senate majority.

**[I'm reaching out today to make the case that I'm worth your personal endorsement](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=73d96cf016734c868716954322c83041&_e=YTOlLOdN86WpVt0kGJWnnlS2p4ap2F5CW1u4GGzm9s4xl5susjLAGtc_FDf6XDRiVf3NbvzUO-mU5Z5t9qHNtWJKjV7oMlkXKVgSb1kEFhzabwoWWAiQnY5HXHJ0Ac0fYcEheCjQZ5S5RovXGR7EFI38DNHB_t4Nb1A-fEjrE1-e9d-VPddomjFDLaGyg27WPv-KioYHTRdU6pQVzxWAly0b8_K7pae5REdXS9qR0qcJmHnb_oh-QFDALdzkh-euJzkNzs9-uivaIEqXzi6OjklsQuh7UvEV142R1B4PYhWBvleJQS5dyy_u_y8HHhwNhDLels3A8qkny4vdce14MZF4bbLWbX3Mxba4mS6si9swLsTBp4_DQEqX9Fd7sYetofrriAFdfAH8jatjAznL7dBMf5ts0IORyAxd9Ns9Hn8%3D)**.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=73d96cf016734c868716954322c83041&_e=YTOlLOdN86WpVt0kGJWnnlS2p4ap2F5CW1u4GGzm9s4xl5susjLAGtc_FDf6XDRiVf3NbvzUO-mU5Z5t9qHNtWJKjV7oMlkXKVgSb1kEFhzabwoWWAiQnY5HXHJ0Ac0fYcEheCjQZ5S5RovXGR7EFI38DNHB_t4Nb1A-fEjrE1-e9d-VPddomjFDLaGyg27WPv-KioYHTRdU6pQVzxWAly0b8_K7pae5REdXS9qR0qcJmHnb_oh-QFDALdzkh-euJzkNzs9-uivaIEqXzi6Ojsic2OEzKX9yY6umDbiJ9CJGVcJXCG9nTsQggMqG9IC09iW-3ozOM1V38xcM2Fb8MTNf-8tCGwFrezI-l0i3XI5_ux_Jwh_yOUiV7CS0XY_AADWv7ySABS3QXI4-q3podhwJPJQIRtPZNtO3PfYem9k%3D)
In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [**many veterans like me**] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally **sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport** so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead.

Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. _**Not service in politics, but on the battlefield.**_ I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free.

**[Today, I’m reaching out to ask you to personally endorse my campaign to become the next U.S. Senator from Montana.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=73d96cf016734c868716954322c83041&_e=YTOlLOdN86WpVt0kGJWnnlS2p4ap2F5CW1u4GGzm9s4xl5susjLAGtc_FDf6XDRiVf3NbvzUO-mU5Z5t9qHNtWJKjV7oMlkXKVgSb1kEFhzabwoWWAiQnY5HXHJ0Ac0fYcEheCjQZ5S5RovXGR7EFI38DNHB_t4Nb1A-fEjrE1-e9d-VPddomjFDLaGyg27WPv-KioYHTRdU6pQVzxWAly0b8_K7pae5REdXS9qR0qcJmHnb_oh-QFDALdzkh-euJzkNzs9-uivaIEqXzi6Ojir7R0wwJL4pnfTr-FKmNkZWJeU5r7ZT0yv587yhItBXvFCjT-BLCxxE0CHJkSCQr4erUh9fhg4RbCDC6q-nvyuNWX-3wkt42ZR6wu9xKRWyvWzPRyQDOLp2LjvGytG04xd5tpkonF1uCNCj2PO5z-Y%3D)**

_**Chuck Schumer and Washington Democrats know that I pose a direct threat to their chances of holding on to power, and they'll do anything to stop me from winning this race - and spend $100M plus in the process. **_

Fellow Conservative, I am under no illusions that you will support my campaign the first time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that **anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it.**

**I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read.**

In the Navy, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the individuals who have earned the honor of serving in the elite task force that is the Navy SEALs, a group of highly trained combat warriors – a brotherhood – in which I earned a spot following my graduation from the United States Naval Academy at Annapolis.

I’ve deployed to Iraq, Afghanistan, South America, and the Pacific during my time as a SEAL, and I have been involved in dozens of engagements with enemy forces and survived to tell the tales. _And believe me, there are some tales._

**I’ve seen the world’s dangers and stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism.** I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right – which is why [**I am determined to take on the anti-American, radical Left in Washington as Montana’s next U.S. Senator.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=73d96cf016734c868716954322c83041&_e=YTOlLOdN86WpVt0kGJWnnlS2p4ap2F5CW1u4GGzm9s4xl5susjLAGtc_FDf6XDRiVf3NbvzUO-mU5Z5t9qHNtWJKjV7oMlkXKVgSb1kEFhzabwoWWAiQnY5HXHJ0Ac0fYcEheCjQZ5S5RovXGR7EFI38DNHB_t4Nb1A-fEjrE1-e9d-VPddomjFDLaGyg27WPv-KioYHTRdU6pQVzxWAly0b8_K7pae5REdXS9qR0qcJmHnb_oh-QFDALdzkh-euJzkNzs9-uivaIEqXzi6OjsHikhs9qivQ4xbJZqvUwG9SKz6ktba6bH1MNkuh8aGa4JhMd-ofkJT_CEULi92Oqg-PH-ZDdnjrZpv0PgcI4nsUmnlFsMF8kJp5TaMn2Otf8bAIDMeqicCOKGR7ruXU4KaAKFNXx0lKjaDb0DLxe7c%3D)

I’m talking about the best selling **“Invisible” Belly Holster** from my friends at _Tactical USA._

[Grab your FREE “Invisible” Belly Holster NOW](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/3771/6374453/21ca05636cd607d1b579028f943dfed54203e7d1/104c665eb6d3cdc03101dca3d3dd37c694527c89), before someone else does.

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=49a69770bf5d42729c997a39160e23c1&_e=PB5EMqrxulktFRwCKCzqf77oALB9e7rdFgI79uFndcDgEviPbdGBXqQ3iGJ-FRMyfU8uD_gA-FiqzQlrWFSUUuwCWBWATnY4R183we6A0yx3_fBHPzzhXf2PERKWPPuris7tNWNJfxlyhNjsEfQx9Mmiw54B8WjFa-p1X9DGc8tZi8SwiDrZuaHc2sXiXoKfk9P2ukerJEG8a79BWc64uNQbHy2XpG_h4R2ber-G9tRjtirOS5UHXBrKlQexrQwTqnDfrbzRVwF4e_RCM4xrZ_i4bAn-KdvPG3kHtbJbLK6cg3UwY7b1wpquuj_6-iQ0rK0R1Z0RcyVCpGlJNJNQ-t2-lG_m1M5P-kE-lC6THt_9gNHvRW39tTXvJL1Ds2LWHx3AY9lBKGpcWUpGhEolzq0fqeWw_G3Ly0MewiMnTiiI71Uoy86Vj78V_sJQAbLE)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=49a69770bf5d42729c997a39160e23c1&_e=PB5EMqrxulktFRwCKCzqf77oALB9e7rdFgI79uFndcDgEviPbdGBXqQ3iGJ-FRMyfU8uD_gA-FiqzQlrWFSUUuwCWBWATnY4R183we6A0yx3_fBHPzzhXf2PERKWPPuris7tNWNJfxlyhNjsEfQx9Mmiw54B8WjFa-p1X9DGc8tZi8SwiDrZuaHc2sXiXoKfk9P2ukerJEG8a79BWc64uNQbHy2XpG_h4R2ber-G9tRjtirOS5UHXBrKlQexrQwTqnDfrbzRVwF4e_RCM4xrZ_i4bAn-KdvPG3kHtbJbLK5Z7NiEw8RN9MRIBUUesTdwaU_vUaRGG-X5eE8uO2Nuoc-6vZqnah9VRFcW4etYMn31iED8jXtrtzOBmt2oRZKuX4Wy_Axy-MgvXrliSSi1MAcTvLEE9LJwQcN199KV7z9a7z1rm1JX4TR8F519Vg4w)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=49a69770bf5d42729c997a39160e23c1&_e=PB5EMqrxulktFRwCKCzqf77oALB9e7rdFgI79uFndcDgEviPbdGBXqQ3iGJ-FRMyfU8uD_gA-FiqzQlrWFSUUuwCWBWATnY4R183we6A0yx3_fBHPzzhXf2PERKWPPuris7tNWNJfxlyhNjsEfQx9Mmiw54B8WjFa-p1X9DGc8tZi8SwiDrZuaHc2sXiXoKfk9P2ukerJEG8a79BWc64uNQbHy2XpG_h4R2ber-G9tRjtirOS5UHXBrKlQexrQwTqnDfrbzRVwF4e_RCM4xrZ_i4bAn-KdvPG3kHtbJbLK43ImI1BE85UvWKbqWDqj7hd3bvKwnDLmnyHeMZbXplXWQyLe7HB6LKPMmzr8TbgkC5JhDPh_JkGyzFd3mlwh91IyGtrwMI-WPW0qTq-qCSPWJGZaCx0T0NcGiAmot4uGF1sUrGJg58nWdumH2lZx5f)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=49a69770bf5d42729c997a39160e23c1&_e=PB5EMqrxulktFRwCKCzqf77oALB9e7rdFgI79uFndcDgEviPbdGBXqQ3iGJ-FRMyfU8uD_gA-FiqzQlrWFSUUuwCWBWATnY4R183we6A0yx3_fBHPzzhXf2PERKWPPuris7tNWNJfxlyhNjsEfQx9Mmiw54B8WjFa-p1X9DGc8tZi8SwiDrZuaHc2sXiXoKfk9P2ukerJEG8a79BWc64uNQbHy2XpG_h4R2ber-G9tRjtirOS5UHXBrKlQexrQwTqnDfrbzRVwF4e_RCM4xrZ_i4bAn-KdvPG3kHtbJbLK57B5yHK3VmQBj4z0W-D4-DCIVWpdmMav3dLmRd9YKkMEccdMBvQf5WiXnlSEN7di3q4pdDyHUGQ7Bf1T84W7wt8beSY29oSTYfn9Qfe93pgcpcYYlm1KgXcuVkZDshSSBzGMZYc3Swv5QYuSyIsAef).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

clean_body: His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century. That's why we produced "" which you can now own on DVD. | | | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including: good and evil, conversion and faith, prayer and the Bible, suffering and death, * heaven and hell, and much more. Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis and After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity. That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with . Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: This isn't over ... yet
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsIntMviNu

American Cornerstone Institute

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osIntMviNu

Fellow
Patriot,

This is
Dr. Ben Carson-I'm writing to you personally because your name is
on my list of Americans who cherish life and want to protect the
unborn. And today I need your help.

I know
you're as grateful as I am for the Supreme Court's decision to
overturn Roe. But I'm also concerned that the pro-life movement
will mistakenly think this ruling means the fight is won.

Nothing
could be further from the truth-the fight for life is only just
beginning!

Right
now, the Left is working around the clock to undermine the
Supreme Court's decision while mobilizing millions of pro-choice
democrats and major media outlets to codify abortion-on-demand at
the expense of taxpayers like you.

We cannot
allow the anti-life movement to obscure the fact that a majority
of Americans (regardless of how they vote) do NOT agree that
abortion should be unrestricted.

We must
stand together to defend a culture of life across America. If we
don't act now, I'm afraid that radicalized idealogues will
continue to seize positions of power and abuse their authority to
advance an anti-life agenda that is bent on the destruction of
the American family.

Today,
I'd like to invite you to join thousands of others who believe
the sanctity of life is worth defending by adding your name to
the pledge I have linked below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62734874:sIntMviNu:m:3:2532013465:F1AECBBE89673A22AA09CD8A4B159070:r

By
signing the pledge, you will join a thriving movement of
principled citizens who are uniting to protect the unborn and
refusing to be silenced by a vocal minority of radicalized
fanatics.

I will do
everything in my power to defend every American life and stop the
spread of the Left's anti-life ideology. Will you take a minute
to stand with me by signing this pledge now?

I'd like
to thank you for joining this critical effort. Together, we can
save thousands of lives from abortion over the next year.

Gratefully,
Dr. Ben
Carson
Founder &
Chairman
American
Cornerstone Institute

Your
donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and
preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our
country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods
to decrease the federal government's role in society and to
improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

Copyright
© 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved.

Friends -
We’re guessing that you didn't wake up this morning, spring out of bed and holler "Today is the day I am going to donate to help Elissa Slotkin hold Michigan's Senate seat for Democrats!"
But we’re reaching out to you right now in the hope that you will consider contributing today anyway. Here’s why:
This month our campaign is going to be making some very important budget decisions. The kind of decisions that will ultimately help determine whether or not we win this race.
Because the truth is that it's going to take a significant amount of resources to win in November. It will require ads, organizers, polling, research, and travel to keep Elissa out on the campaign trail taking her message to voters. And her Republican opponents are, as of last week, already up on TV reaching out to new voters.
Michigan is too competitive of a state for us to leave anything up to chance. And the only way we'll be able to fund the kind of campaign that can win in Michigan is with your support. That's why we're asking:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to help Elissa Slotkin defend Michigan's Senate seat for Democrats?](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-jan24.--Kpen&refcode=em240127-1-30&t=2&akid=1064%2E135344%2EEcXg9y)**

subject: It's hard to express how we feel at this moment...

body:
Democrats in their attempt to sabotage our elections rallied millions of their supporters in favor of ERASING Voter ID laws across the country.

| |
---
| | | | |
---
| | | It's hard to express how utterly humiliated we feel at this moment.

Democrats in their attempt to sabotage our elections rallied millions of their supporters in favor of ERASING Voter ID laws across the country.

_**In response, Republicans started our own petition to protect these laws and ensure every election in the country is safe and secure.**_

But the number of responses we got was embarrassing... and the defeat we may face in the next election because of it will be even more heartbreaking.

But we've got another chance, Friend. This fight is too crucial and our election integrity is too important to quit. **[So we're asking ONE FINAL TIME: will you sign the petition and help us secure our elections right here and now?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=139290b030694ec7b1bfd76ab808df59&_e=RSfawkPHgCZONxXbp3WpLKYbEmSf34Wg649GiS8vpJCf7pCGalrBdyMX1HeUP8Nfn0TkmtBVuuP94wnhDdzncR6ShWFIuxXV19W2qEF8Gdq0LvaMUDh4rGAXUbgMrUcCTkS6z8Z81FWg2ZfV2isKwhEfpyUK1IgB7juchpwugp89jiOoK0w69v38WVM5WbSQr_XcQFMlHpOa9QBbmYXnSPfE7kKUtz3akAcOgXst5NIHz1DXgh8JMWwa8qmVV4cO-zLd0IknhvuKipZabBuFmtS062n9WMQuyr7_TsvGP3S8QO1CLGHkYLSuaLoQkudc2frMgfPdHW0P_NinjauSXPfULnLaJLyYkey4J4yZzt2vUnNYrApJjLrb4hcr5WCFPOlUTX0GnRaUneRejtfAMZR7PFAreUprRsgwvXcUsIhfDOLjrpMKFwlZ6aE8BXBRsrRs8ijTJkalRQWYCVHE33_TezK1WEZENfEdeJDW_qkiOWJLJNy5c6B3YqDEw2mx "So we’re asking ONE FINAL TIME: will you sign the petition and help us secure our elections right here and now?")**

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d34173b00d984842a52e9b0477e35902&_e=slataOEtD2KWTue66H7damrujmubZ0oMhhCmBP3KZHok11YWdRQDNmQ_r83T4bA703_VJuyM2aSvR1SErtFHNJ59KtE7w5d2C7nHpOYUBidD-hxm8MBCouF15rY4l1WX54v0jb8GtK6-8e4JxFQ_oxklLHfzdKSXnImZA7FdB4Wie3-5F1iXJSGb45wIVjSEV1ThapYzHwk0mqMCMlj819vAFWuqn5_5p5QdxLyWaL2GEeFJFkH-_Enh9811DH8lB7shLPo8ijiT1NKW4SbwkNrZUoSN8tJqg4cYp7bKrS5j_WGmI5B2-cD28OFdVxaTtYjqJNXCLrkmi12z0UpKNkja0HPNPhRw2C8gQytOyCqHWp0Uk7I48XOLRAZBjnDqM0moQx0V2fjWvxt1RA33TYGvuna-L6uK0LpOJJdfEKo9sFOiTqpTL0hrehDCzXo6)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d34173b00d984842a52e9b0477e35902&_e=slataOEtD2KWTue66H7damrujmubZ0oMhhCmBP3KZHok11YWdRQDNmQ_r83T4bA703_VJuyM2aSvR1SErtFHNJ59KtE7w5d2C7nHpOYUBidD-hxm8MBCouF15rY4l1WX54v0jb8GtK6-8e4JxFQ_oxklLHfzdKSXnImZA7FdB4Wie3-5F1iXJSGb45wIVjSEV1ThapYzHwk0mqMCMlj819vAFWuqn5_5p5QdxLyWaL2GEeFJFkH-_Enh9811DH8lB7shLPo8ijiT1NKW4SbwkNrZUoSN8tJqg4cYp7bKrS5MkKRtJn7maXXt8TIbOifd0c2paM6t4XYPEaJ8hY28pFUST7izYJA5xuUyHQn3x1wW9aQC2eHCqcw5La37HgJ8jOhase4vDg7qKMErKVYRVOV1N-RkZvdnshA0xRz0mJDBHgCxeka20nMqxfQrdx6S)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d34173b00d984842a52e9b0477e35902&_e=slataOEtD2KWTue66H7damrujmubZ0oMhhCmBP3KZHok11YWdRQDNmQ_r83T4bA703_VJuyM2aSvR1SErtFHNJ59KtE7w5d2C7nHpOYUBidD-hxm8MBCouF15rY4l1WX54v0jb8GtK6-8e4JxFQ_oxklLHfzdKSXnImZA7FdB4Wie3-5F1iXJSGb45wIVjSEV1ThapYzHwk0mqMCMlj819vAFWuqn5_5p5QdxLyWaL2GEeFJFkH-_Enh9811DH8lB7shLPo8ijiT1NKW4SbwkNrZUoSN8tJqg4cYp7bKrS7HhskHU_t765VwWZjzT6GTqxdtG9TyjXAfByG8ZMjjSn7XnWBFbX8QNw-ifWNNCmJQtiFH7us18aG3EAbo-0RF1-kjpKlTGVEhoDrgSKPfNkbN9X4TN9kn2CtclppjrCleLK6KUImSIxRlW908feB-)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d34173b00d984842a52e9b0477e35902&_e=slataOEtD2KWTue66H7damrujmubZ0oMhhCmBP3KZHok11YWdRQDNmQ_r83T4bA703_VJuyM2aSvR1SErtFHNJ59KtE7w5d2C7nHpOYUBidD-hxm8MBCouF15rY4l1WX54v0jb8GtK6-8e4JxFQ_oxklLHfzdKSXnImZA7FdB4Wie3-5F1iXJSGb45wIVjSEV1ThapYzHwk0mqMCMlj819vAFWuqn5_5p5QdxLyWaL2GEeFJFkH-_Enh9811DH8lB7shLPo8ijiT1NKW4SbwkNrZUoSN8tJqg4cYp7bKrS4pYVCzPCRMcCNkeRSX_pC4mDNNds1djbVZyC-zF8dkhitxEvx4edF_ivMJ3pbwdtLpdyI3as0clrGfUe00XAcTvO1SW_YCWS8PF5U_7p2YxaTdgEYam2whhihLcKEZ7vd7KvZ9LIdaidfioutQUUQF).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |

body:
Kate texted me.
|

I was ready to start my weekend, Peter, but then I got a text from Kate. name: Blue Amp Action
subject: [SIGN ON] Protect Women's Health:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
We need your help!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7cfb6d14-0fb2-4d1d-b195-cc114f204cc5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, Crisis Pregnancy Centers (CPCs) are centers that operate under the guise of healthcare providers but are designed to manipulate and confuse pregnant individuals, steering them away from accessing accurate information about abortion. It's alarming that at least 16 states are channeling hundreds of millions of taxpayer dollars into these misleading clinics. This funding could be better utilized to provide genuine healthcare services, especially for low-income individuals and families. [Join us in demanding an end to state funding for these fake clinics. Sign the petition to ensure that taxpayer money is directed toward real reproductive healthcare that prioritizes informed choices and supports public health.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdc61091a-218f-4087-9b80-e9fb98a9ba1b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | [TAKE ACTION](https://default.salsalabs.org/T58c51b35-ddc1-434f-b7ef-4d897fb1d633/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Your voice matters in safeguarding women's reproductive rights. Stand with us to put an end to the deceptive practices of Crisis Pregnancy Centers.

[Sign the petition now and share it with your network.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T35607e2f-7f40-4c6b-8447-92b20424aad3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
