PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/baa_em_ja_ntl24012215_copy1_copy1_copy1_copy1_copy1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2741703e-733e-4270-96ee-509de6d78763/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Learn more about Jeeng http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjp78e1m80al7i83hn4te057le60f62l28krp0e8_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cpge4o30cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7k9r7b9jhe9qb0t9jkgqracjkmoq37chieiqj6d5jmspqcdtlmuh34t1jm4qb7dpnkvin2tdnqprrasjm6kqucdtjm5qj7cbme5p79c3l6cin2tdnqoq3bc3k6irj7df2eprt8oj5cpjm2op5e5qrfldl64qbatdlskqr8d5hmcin2tdnqorr7cbl6eonbodnmsrr49fg

From Boston to Los Angeles, teachers’ unions and their progressive counterparts have quietly devised an unprecedented method to bypass the legislative process by embedding unrelated policy issues deep within the intricate terms of teacher contracts.
http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7fhdr4aqdr88jj5s4palrlfrmbc3l80vcm930bo_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cpge4o30cth238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kui3bd9ieir38cti69qbacpkmerj79hnmmrq1dtnemgn1d9lk5qj8dhgmkp7ctd5eeqbfctmemijbchl64qqcttm6iq33d5memqq9ctheuqq2s5l6ip7b9hnmeon4t1m65r7f8h5u

How The Teachers Unions Embed Socialism Into Their Contracts

From Boston to Los Angeles, teachers’ unions and their progressive
counterparts have quietly devised an unprecedented method to bypass
the legislative process by embedding unrelated policy issues deep
within the intricate terms of teacher contracts.

name: Nikki Haley
subject: I have news
body:
When I stepped off stage in New Hampshire, here is the message I shared... | |
---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=78fd30f042ad4134b00ebaeeff87ba06&_t=nI7G869ijqnicOL3THMSGryxUstmEQVA_PrDieHhC89JZbDNlYIZ_P3Mb6d3fMqm6kGG69RTmZPgOHp1Z8b_MPZGMAMTuXuDQfYDq8j1-Wg%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=78fd30f042ad4134b00ebaeeff87ba06&_t=nI7G869ijqnicOL3THMSGryxUstmEQVA_PrDieHhC89JZbDNlYIZ_P3Mb6d3fMqm6kGG69RTmZPgOHp1Z8b_MPZGMAMTuXuDQfYDq8j1-Wg%3D)

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=78fd30f042ad4134b00ebaeeff87ba06&_e=Lxvg6XPIwW52xv0RE7V7VMrxMLOtXr_qSaB4kuODmkM-ERChmtFjo4xYI3fhcy1Z6fWuLBQTrNbvWyYTqgYcE0PAXhpKEgBXd4sSDmnZYjkuSMv0VO0o-pNZXv9O8XloQy3ONgUA9i0ynyqvtVY2ColMOmwF8PiVLZZ3GPWH3mx9uSMYZAp8u0IjFdrZrA9S3z7Uui1mnm7hWJzFL1yMD4VyhsYMt5wMFJj5ZPFbkmCyu63J82Qal-aFBCHo0-fD5Fdrpr9Zf6zAH-34ngwZEpCrhTHDv0KqEfIa3TV_erSBf4bM8l_9NIy5LO22jxzOvuXqe6fhHmQX1dJd-67UKFxJc-AXrTttt2A2WVc8irg%3D)
Peter,

When I stepped off stage in New Hampshire, here is the message I shared...

You've all heard the chatter among the political class. They're falling all over themselves saying this race is over.

Well, I have news for all of them. New Hampshire is first in the nation. **_It 's not last in the nation._**

**This race is far from over.** There are dozens of states left to go. And the next one is my sweet state of South Carolina!

At one point in this campaign, there were 14 of us running, and we were at two percent in the polls. Well, I'm a fighter. Now, we're the last one standing next to Donald Trump, and today we got close to half of the vote. We still have a ways to go, but we keep moving up.

For a lot of people, politics is way too personal. It's not personal for me.

I decided to run because I'm worried about the future of our country, and because it's time to put the negativity and chaos behind us.

We have an economy that is crushing middle-class Americans. We have a border that is totally open and dangerous, creating a disaster in our country. We have schools that are failing too many of our children. And we have a world on fire, with war in Europe and the Middle East, and a huge and growing threat from China.

And then you look at Washington. We have a Congress that fights about everything and accomplishes nothing. And we have Joe Biden in the White House, making one bad decision after another, when he's making any decisions at all.

Our country's in a real mess. _And the question is, who 's going to fix it?_

With Donald Trump, Republicans have lost almost every competitive election. We lost the Senate. We lost the House. We lost the White House. We lost in 2018, in 2020 and in 2022.

The worst kept secret in politics is how badly the Democrats want to run against Trump. They know Trump is the only Republican in the country who Biden can defeat.

You can't fix the mess if you don't win the election. A Trump nomination is a Biden win and a Kamala Harris presidency.

**I defeat Biden handily.**

With Donald Trump, you have one bout of chaos after another. This court case, that controversy, this tweet, that senior moment. You can't fix Joe Biden's chaos with Republican chaos.

The other day, Donald Trump accused me of not providing security at the Capitol on January 6th.

I've long called for mental competency tests for politicians over the age of 75. Trump claims he'd do better than me on one of those tests. Maybe he would, and maybe he wouldn't.

But if he thinks that, then he should have no problem standing on a debate stage with me!

Most Americans do not want a rematch between Biden and Trump. The first party to retire its 80-year-old candidate is going to win this election. I say it should be the Republicans!

**So our fight is not over, because we have a country to save.** | [JOIN OUR MOVEMENT](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=78fd30f042ad4134b00ebaeeff87ba06&_e=Lxvg6XPIwW52xv0RE7V7VMrxMLOtXr_qSaB4kuODmkM-ERChmtFjo4xYI3fhcy1Z6fWuLBQTrNbvWyYTqgYcE0PAXhpKEgBXd4sSDmnZYjkuSMv0VO0o-pNZXv9O8XloQy3ONgUA9i0ynyqvtVY2ColMOmwF8PiVLZZ3GPWH3mx9uSMYZAp8u0IjFdrZrA9S3z7Uui1mnm7hWJzFL1yMD-8INa1937y60FGpB1Ce_wpHz4JT5-Hw-JeMCZ8JTB5ncBWghmu4f5Wx7WGbm25PUuGM2AaNX2KRtRxQ55qeKc6mnJn_dSJsh2iQaD_nWoj2m6qiHG4qyZFNK_qkZZjPPLH1gP6QIZkpyE7AseQ7XIM%3D)
---

In the next two months, millions of voters in over 20 states will have their say. We should honor them and allow them to vote. And guess what, in the next two months, Joe Biden isn't going to get any younger or any better. We'll have all the time we need to beat Biden.

When we get to South Carolina, Donald Trump is going to have a harder time falsely attacking me. The great people of South Carolina know I cut their taxes. They know I signed the toughest immigration bill in the country. They know we passed voter ID, and tort reform, and ethics reform, and they know we moved 35,000 people from welfare to work.

Every time I've run for office in South Carolina, I've beaten the political establishment. They're lined up against me again. That's no surprise. But South Carolina voters don't want a coronation. They want an election. And we're going to give them one.

Because we're just getting started.

**[Pitch in a donation to fuel my campaign and let's do this!](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=78fd30f042ad4134b00ebaeeff87ba06&_e=Lxvg6XPIwW52xv0RE7V7VMrxMLOtXr_qSaB4kuODmkM-ERChmtFjo4xYI3fhcy1Z6fWuLBQTrNbvWyYTqgYcE0PAXhpKEgBXd4sSDmnZYjkuSMv0VO0o-pNZXv9O8XloQy3ONgUA9i0ynyqvtVY2ColMOmwF8PiVLZZ3GPWH3mx9uSMYZAp8u0IjFdrZrA9S3z7Uui1mnm7hWJzFL1yMD3y1kfgQY-elTt4UmuJQt9RtZHOe494tMeoFrNxAQ4Jf3YuiDXRyk84iIriC_KgtBVntV9pkBfAOTDTmVonJI0mCO5sKT9rWVHH_oNJovaok2XoGp3zQWoON_tpOWon2rYHnOsr7s4jmHWCYYUNCKKs%3D)**

Let's do this!

My very best,

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=78fd30f042ad4134b00ebaeeff87ba06&_e=Lxvg6XPIwW52xv0RE7V7VMrxMLOtXr_qSaB4kuODmkM-ERChmtFjo4xYI3fhcy1Z6fWuLBQTrNbvWyYTqgYcE0PAXhpKEgBXd4sSDmnZYjkuSMv0VO0o-pNZXv9O8XloQy3ONgUA9i0ynyqvtVY2ColMOmwF8PiVLZZ3GPWH3mx9uSMYZAp8u0IjFdrZrA9S3z7Uui1mnm7hWJzFL1yMDxPLeHiGDT0oUHtGV_ga3s14ctnx8w3QyyYxqq_GQOmGAvw56b0pC8dth-z27k2bUaCZS_-K8CWmnn2xh7xDJmiBlWYH8hNAVrqg2TqnmnCc8RATnxF-E48MjeBgbexP_UvKUd-FtP3AOEgcbMfnokA%3D)

clean_body: When I stepped off stage in New Hampshire, here is the message I shared... | | | | | Peter, When I stepped off stage in New Hampshire, here is the message I shared... You've all heard the chatter among the political class. They're falling all over themselves saying this race is over. Well, I have news for all of them. New Hampshire is first in the nation. It 's not last in the nation. This race is far from over. There are dozens of states left to go. And the next one is my sweet state of South Carolina! At one point in this campaign, there were 14 of us running, and we were at two percent in the polls. Well, I'm a fighter. Now, we're the last one standing next to Donald Trump, and today we got close to half of the vote. We still have a ways to go, but we keep moving up. For a lot of people, politics is way too personal. It's not personal for me. I decided to run because I'm worried about the future of our country, and because it's time to put the negativity and chaos behind us. We have an economy that is crushing middle-class Americans. We have a border that is totally open and dangerous, creating a disaster in our country. We have schools that are failing too many of our children. And we have a world on fire, with war in Europe and the Middle East, and a huge and growing threat from China. And then you look at Washington. We have a Congress that fights about everything and accomplishes nothing. And we have Joe Biden in the White House, making one bad decision after another, when he's making any decisions at all. Our country's in a real mess. And the question is, who 's going to fix it? With Donald Trump, Republicans have lost almost every competitive election. We lost the Senate. We lost the House. We lost the White House. We lost in 2018, in 2020 and in 2022. The worst kept secret in politics is how badly the Democrats want to run against Trump. They know Trump is the only Republican in the country who Biden can defeat. You can't fix the mess if you don't win the election. A Trump nomination is a Biden win and a Kamala Harris presidency. I defeat Biden handily. With Donald Trump, you have one bout of chaos after another. This court case, that controversy, this tweet, that senior moment. You can't fix Joe Biden's chaos with Republican chaos. The other day, Donald Trump accused me of not providing security at the Capitol on January 6th. I've long called for mental competency tests for politicians over the age of 75. Trump claims he'd do better than me on one of those tests. Maybe he would, and maybe he wouldn't. But if he thinks that, then he should have no problem standing on a debate stage with me! Most Americans do not want a rematch between Biden and Trump. The first party to retire its 80-year-old candidate is going to win this election. I say it should be the Republicans! So our fight is not over, because we have a country to save. | In the next two months, millions of voters in over 20 states will have their say. We should honor them and allow them to vote. And guess what, in the next two months, Joe Biden isn't going to get any younger or any better. We'll have all the time we need to beat Biden. When we get to South Carolina, Donald Trump is going to have a harder time falsely attacking me. The great people of South Carolina know I cut their taxes. They know I signed the toughest immigration bill in the country. They know we passed voter ID, and tort reform, and ethics reform, and they know we moved 35,000 people from welfare to work. Every time I've run for office in South Carolina, I've beaten the political establishment. They're lined up against me again. That's no surprise. But South Carolina voters don't want a coronation. They want an election. And we're going to give them one. Because we're just getting started. Let's do this! My very best, Nikki R. name: Mark Kelly
subject: Protecting the right to choose
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Hey everybody, it’s Mark Kelly.
Of all the things I’ve accomplished in my life, the one I’m most proud of is being a dad to my two daughters and a grandpa to my granddaughter Sage.
After the Dobbs decision at the Supreme Court last year, one of the things that really stuck with me was that Sage was going to grow up with fewer rights than my grandmother had. That’s just not how things are supposed to go in the United States.
We can turn that around, and I’m extremely proud that hundreds of thousands of people have signed on to a measure to put abortion rights on the ballot in Arizona in 2024.
Alongside our work to hold the Oval Office, win more seats in the Senate, and take back the House, public campaigns around the country like this ballot measure are critical tools in the fight to protect the rights of people like my daughters, like Sage.
Together, we can stop any attempts at a national ban on abortion. We can work towards enshrining the protections of Roe into law.
[**For now though, I have to ask you: Will you join me and add your name to stand against any further restrictions on abortion and protect the right to choose?**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/choice-signup-em-jan24/?source=em240127-1-f&akid=5696%2E6688874%2E-omQth)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/choice-signup-em-jan24/?source=em240127-1-f&akid=5696%2E6688874%2E-omQth)**
For Sage, for all of our kids and grandkids, I hope I can count on you.
Thanks,
— Mark

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=5696%2E6688874%2E-omQth).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: It's HIM again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
I need your urgent grassroots support to fight back against Trump, McConnell, and the rest of the GOP in Nevada.
| | |
---
Two things, friend,

Republicans just dealt us a _double blow_ in my must-win battleground race in Nevada, and I urgently need your help.
First, **Donald Trump is holding a rally in Las Vegas _today_** to rile up the Republican base in Nevada and defeat me in the race that is likely to determine Senate control.
Second, my extremist GOP opponent – Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate – just set a new fundraising record!
I hate to say it, but the momentum is on the GOP’s side right now, and that’s why this news couldn’t have come at a better time: **A group of top Democratic donors have agreed to EXTEND their double-match offer to help me fight back and defend my seat!**

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: this is what my grandmother taught me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
this is what my grandmother taught me
I know that we can win again in 2024.
| | |
---
Look, big change starts small.
That's a lesson that my grandmother, Polly Noonan, first taught me decades ago. Well before most women had any political power, my grandmother organized women into a political force in Albany.
By the time I was in elementary school, I was tagging along with her to all kinds of Democratic campaign headquarters, rallies and events. She remains one of my biggest role models — and I carry her wisdom with me to this day. **She taught me that my voice matters, that women’s voices matter and that grassroots activism matters. And she showed me how campaigns are won by the people who put in the work like the volunteers knocking doors, stuffing envelopes, turning out the vote and donating what they can, when they can.**
For decades, first by my grandmother's side and then as a public servant myself, I've seen how those small grassroots actions all add up to victory on Election Day. That's how Democrats defeated the odds in 2022 to defend and even expand our Senate majority. And that's why I know that we can win again in 2024.
With Democrats defending 23 seats, the odds are certainly stacked against us. And after the 2022 red wave in New York, Republicans here are already targeting my seat for defeat. **But when people like you get off the sidelines and chip in even just $3, eventually we'll build a grassroots movement capable of defeating even the GOP's wealthiest megadonors.**
**[So please, will you chip in $3 or $25 or whatever you can spare today to help save our Senate majority by building a grassroots movement one grassroots gift at a time? clean_body: = Peter, it’s James Carville, and I’m raging at the newest development out of Nevada: A shady MAGA billionaire just poured $2 MILLION into this race to try and flip Nevada red. I’m not going to mince words – national Republicans think they can BUY this seat. Our razor-thin majority is hanging on by a single thread, and there’s no question that Mitch McConnell and his extremist cronies are going to spend every cent they can to take back the Senate. If you want to defend the Senate, this race should be at the very top of your priorities list – and Jacky Rosen needs our immediate help to fight back against her opponent’s new multi-million dollar warchest. She is counting on a surge of grassroots support to counteract the deluge of money flooding into this race. name: Finance Team, Hill Harper
subject: Can you meet us halfway?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
We’re halfway towards our $10,000 goal and we can’t slow down.
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/130?refcode=em20240127&t=1&akid=896%2E62735%2EzC6hBJ)
Peter,
**As of this email’s send time we’re officially halfway towards our $10,000 end of month fundraising goal.**
We’ve only got 3 more days to close our fundraising gap, and we’re quickly running out of time (_that’s why we’re sending this out on a weekend!_).
[**Please, if you’re able to support our campaign, now is the perfect time to send a donation of $5.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20240127?amount=5&refcode=em20240127-896&refcode2=896_62735_zC6hBJ&akid=896%2E62735%2EzC6hBJ)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20240127?amount=5&refcode=em20240127-896&refcode2=896_62735_zC6hBJ&akid=896%2E62735%2EzC6hBJ)**
Every fundraising goal we set is based on the exact amount we need to fund our get out the vote efforts, support our current campaign staff, invest in digital ads, _and more_.
Every month as the finance team, we’re doing the calculations of exactly what our budget requires for us to not have to cut back. We’re not asking for arbitrary amounts, we’re asking for exactly what we need to keep our campaign running smoothly.
[**That’s why, whether you can give $5 or more, every little bit helps. Can we count on your support today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20240127?amount=5&refcode=em20240127-896&refcode2=896_62735_zC6hBJ&akid=896%2E62735%2EzC6hBJ)
Thank you,
Finance Team
Hill Harper
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-footer?refcode=em20240127&t=2&refcode2=896_62735_zC6hBJ&akid=896%2E62735%2EzC6hBJ)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: Trump has Arizona in his crosshairs
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
The MAGA-right has their candidate in Arizona, and Trump’s going to rally their donations and support for Kari Lake this Friday.
#

Peter — Trump has Arizona in his crosshairs.
He’s already endorsed the “MAGA Queen” Kari Lake, and more attack ads could come any day now.
The MAGA-right has their candidate in Arizona, and Trump will stop at nothing to make sure she wins and Ruben loses.
We already know why.
Arizona is the most important state in the country. This state will determine who wins the White House, and which party controls the Senate. And most of all — because this isn’t just politics to Trump and Lake.
This is personal. They both lost by extremely slim margins here, and they are coming at us with everything they’ve got. Ruben is all that stands in the way.
We have to take this seriously, because they most certainly will.
[**Can you PLEASE make your first online donation to Ruben’s campaign for U.S. Senate in Arizona? Trump and Lake will stop at nothing to win, and we need to have Ruben’s back if he’s going to win this seat in November.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan24.RCwesN&refcode=em240127-1-120&t=1&akid=1845%2E734936%2EsbuJxN)

subject: My investigation is a serious risk...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Comer for Congress**
body:
They want to shut it down in the blink of an eye
| | [ ](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=980820d4c09c4ae2a2d1b3e268b78aae&_e=B5T8dFxkAYmnoD-vhj_ORmhEX8OesjsNttedb13pm1xj8cxwXtGHKAAPzxvhAhVWHUIMtKTgCBj3aWjjW70s0DqVTSlUhIpriX2elEMINveAs7f9x8JSH9ig15Ooq7YJsfapgRRx1kCIo6E7eamedYRw4oFlcx0o2ICFTKZGH2kotp38ztMWURwj0ZGcuyzRBCQeJ2xOeZrjHenJRNwSXONOQpOkKWi14jvo0FdcSLbo3paiWsFQS3lP0-Niq7rRCkjM0PEEX27ODybT7NtEF5wwDhP0uDFDE6kxfuVl2hnh3bZoDO4F_gMtHEB_VbHP)
---
Fellow American, I received some concerning news, and I'm asking you to read this entire memo about the state of my re-election campaign. My Democrat opponent just filed to run against me in Kentucky's first congressional district and it is alarming.
| [ **RE-ELECT COMER** ](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=980820d4c09c4ae2a2d1b3e268b78aae&_e=B5T8dFxkAYmnoD-vhj_)
---
My opponent is a Far-Left activist who worked for the Hillary Clinton campaign, and she's already raising tons of money on ActBlue from liberal online donors around the country. She is determined to defeat me and end my investigation once and for all. **You and I both know we can 't let that happen.** But it's not only that. She's hired Amy McGrath's campaign manager. You may not remember Amy McGrath, but I sure do. McGrath raised $88 Million dollars in her 2020 campaign for Kentucky Senate. **$88,000,000!**
| [ **RE-ELECT COMER** ](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=980820d4c09c4ae2a2d1b3e268b78aae&_e=B5T8dFxkAYmnoD-vhj_ORmhEX8OesjsNttedb13pm1xj8cxwXtGHKAAPzxvhAhVWHUIMtKTgCBj3aWjjW70s0DqVTSlUhIpriX2elEMINveAs7f9x8JSH9ig15Ooq7YJsfapgRRx1kCIo6E7eamedYRw4oFlcx0o2ICFTKZGH2kYwMsBBqAJi6ZxpvDJRugoXC1ftDjJXR3d24mNSM1aOPMEXn1uXYk0a9X3YlmgGmTmEtCaLL7Fuy6hFP4fx9aD2iIKiE1SMOah2zd3SPzGC3v3YoGVnyr_AY28hVUGPNDJHOF_aR2s7bgNaJdsdfhj)
---
That's an astounding amount of money, and her campaign manager's rolodex is stuffed to the brim with democrat mega-donors chomping at the bit to take me down. They know their investment in the Biden administration is at serious risk due to the findings of my investigation, and they will do whatever it takes to defeat me in November and end my inquiry into the Biden Family's corruption racket and cover-up. I'm asking everyone who reads this memo to stand with me today as my 2024 campaign kicks off in earnest. We must show national Democrats that our campaign is strong enough to weather anything... _or this campaign could get really rough for me in the fall._ If you're able, I'd love to have your renewed support. Thank you for everything, James Comer
| [ **RE-ELECT COMER** ](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=980820d4c09c4ae2a2d1b3e268b78aae&_e=B5T8dFxkAYmnoD-vhj_ORmhEX8OesjsNttedb13pm1xj8cxwXtGHKAAPzxvhAhVWHUIMtKTgCBj3aWjjW70s0DqVTSlUhIpriX2elEMINveAs7f9x8JSH9ig15Ooq7YJsfapgRRx1kCIo6E7eamedYRw4oFlcx0o2ICFTKZGH2n-twCvPtO5BT4iCUGNpjFs0vVhO13Uiakq5eYImuqS__1QKmWBcLdFVG0CWh8mgmGj_S_h6QEu1tHi9lYhFBefWG2T0fA5V9x-umNoee0Uhx12duw2OWkd2zEkJjgjsxEJsJ45aZP8lCF7QlxKGmAV)

If we lose this race, we could be facing two more years of DISASTROUS Democrat control, and America just can’t afford that. Our FIRST end-of-month deadline of the election year is in just FOUR DAYS! It’s all hands on deck for Republicans to win in Virginia - because if we fail, America as we know it could be on the line. I’m not going to lie, this is an uphill battle, and we can’t win without your support. name: Defend the Constitution
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=56483bed59d44935b70ed21ebe3e2e66&_e=Tl-RIZ4I5JuI1j-KhTucJxF-VcgcHmP3G0KIPWHcB7EEgcoJUR1xyNcx4H6hD4MHTmsIlEkDo1AlFpcWY4XCub2ZXPvx33mMp2XPxeVcQRzdVDZkZnlzX-3zdhyNWJBgPsIu2WTKzxOoUaPDHPstEdjtv90zN_bPwZtHPcjOW_7F_jTHmzYEPUUTCXp7ePpQ55Y3cFoiYwnlgkkowMMyRv7YpsyT1_gpbA2z5Hy9g_rK4FJIFIBAtWo1rBgp9bGigCe1qS-s23WAKjE-1HlHRDwDagvq13uzC07BQUGVZp4GqTxLe_RpoookGBilBS1LIQvUoHBIuoaepAooO86T2WJ0UdXWcHRZDIkYU2xY7S5cquKhwrG-Sg9V4ywdmlkze9-srI6emNEFiUzi2NOAhaILqC4USx3AiQL4mCMcY-7CEsTA1bx6U2KsiKqMyi2A)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=56483bed59d44935b70ed21ebe3e2e66&_e=Tl-RIZ4I5JuI1j-KhTucJxF-VcgcHmP3G0KIPWHcB7EEgcoJUR1xyNcx4H6hD4MHTmsIlEkDo1AlFpcWY4XCub2ZXPvx33mMp2XPxeVcQRzdVDZkZnlzX-3zdhyNWJBgPsIu2WTKzxOoUaPDHPstEdjtv90zN_bPwZtHPcjOW_7F_jTHmzYEPUUTCXp7ePpQ55Y3cFoiYwnlgkkowMMyRv7YpsyT1_gpbA2z5Hy9g_rK4FJIFIBAtWo1rBgp9bGigCe1qS-s23WAKjE-1HlHRDwDagvq13uzC07BQUGVZp4NSUAoPJM5NuJJLyCCGOHzbL1UULlIM3jFs0pSy__ekyNIluRuDIGJCPQ6wLHtOy4XpeYjTbbW5s0ymtpbnAwaPOocgfCW_4v31j398saSNEVMl-QQnNXWNt5CCJIqvmZmhXaY8zfXD0p_rMx9sCc1)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=56483bed59d44935b70ed21ebe3e2e66&_e=Tl-RIZ4I5JuI1j-KhTucJxF-VcgcHmP3G0KIPWHcB7EEgcoJUR1xyNcx4H6hD4MHTmsIlEkDo1AlFpcWY4XCub2ZXPvx33mMp2XPxeVcQRzdVDZkZnlzX-3zdhyNWJBgPsIu2WTKzxOoUaPDHPstEdjtv90zN_bPwZtHPcjOW_7F_jTHmzYEPUUTCXp7ePpQ55Y3cFoiYwnlgkkowMMyRv7YpsyT1_gpbA2z5Hy9g_rK4FJIFIBAtWo1rBgp9bGigCe1qS-s23WAKjE-1HlHRDwDagvq13uzC07BQUGVZp4J80RaM3rZPhSkuej1MkX2MWS4WoCbNgXDMXTzNqqQWcUJdCJmuGECRtySo2pWhztM75W0PDrYkf5D-IWe63sk0Ywvlw6HEGz2QK7Dl4D7F7GCK0OD0ZvMnrXjoQOfgSJ6N4qToVrmFcqdb4kGSpyi)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=56483bed59d44935b70ed21ebe3e2e66&_e=Tl-RIZ4I5JuI1j-KhTucJxF-VcgcHmP3G0KIPWHcB7EEgcoJUR1xyNcx4H6hD4MHTmsIlEkDo1AlFpcWY4XCub2ZXPvx33mMp2XPxeVcQRzdVDZkZnlzX-3zdhyNWJBgPsIu2WTKzxOoUaPDHPstEdjtv90zN_bPwZtHPcjOW_7F_jTHmzYEPUUTCXp7ePpQ55Y3cFoiYwnlgkkowMMyRv7YpsyT1_gpbA2z5Hy9g_rK4FJIFIBAtWo1rBgp9bGigCe1qS-s23WAKjE-1HlHRDwDagvq13uzC07BQUGVZp67ORej7UuuXFbpEQYI80xBggYhCmUPZibflPAyH0WssUChHpcf8orZnWNdUk90dGbtl_BvXDnNQFPUCIAQLol4sicnnLsdEd6DdjFsOQk9P7FwYh5ywWE_-mGh9IGXACXBI38Tqb_LQDPC71Qnsr3l).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors.

clean_body: | | | | This note is just for you, Peter! | Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors. | "Facebook" | "Twitter" ---|--- | | ⬇DONATE BY CHECK⬇ ROGER WILLIAMS FOR U.S. CONGRESS 10 N. CADDO ST. PMB #174 CLEBURNE, TX 76031 Stay connected with our campaign and be part of the movement. Follow Roger on social media for updates, volunteer to support the cause, or reach out to him directly. By joining Team Williams, you will make a difference in your community. | A Note For You, From Roger My commitment to our great state and country is unwavering, and I am grateful to have my wife Patty, our two daughters, and YOU standing beside me on this journey. | From My Notes App 10 N. Caddo St, PMB #174, Cleburne, TX 76031 ==

name: Seth Dillon, Babylon Bee
subject: Dylan Mulvaney is the MAN
body:
Naming Rachel Levine as The Babylon Bee's inaugural Man of the Year was powerful enough to get us kicked off Twitter...
[Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osUB7nviNp)
| | | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62735571:sUB7nviNp:m:1:2627245898:55351153DCB778ACDE1D74DDA5C211D7:r)
---
|
---
Friend, Naming Rachel Levine as The Babylon Bee's inaugural _Man of the Year_ was powerful enough to get us kicked off Twitter... ... but this year's Man of the Year was powerful enough to utterly destroy the reputation of big-name consumer brands, including the one-time top-selling beer -- Bud Light. **That 's right, ladies and gentleman (I can say that because I know there are only two genders), this year's Babylon Bee _Man of the Year_ is none other than _Dylan Mulvaney_.** **[To celebrate the man, the myth-- the legend -- that is Dylan Mulvaney, we're offering 25% off a Premium Subscription to The Babylon Bee with discount code: MANOFTHEYEAR.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62735571:sUB7nviNp:m:1:2627245898:55351153DCB778ACDE1D74DDA5C211D7:r)**
---
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62735571:sUB7nviNp:m:1:2627245898:55351153DCB778ACDE1D74DDA5C211D7:r)
---
[25% off The Babylon Bee with code: MANOFTHEYEAR](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62735571:sUB7nviNp:m:1:2627245898:55351153DCB778ACDE1D74DDA5C211D7:r)
---
While some may scoff at Mulvaney's stubborn refusal to live life as the man he was created to be, his true courage comes from living in a land of rainbows, butterflies, and unicorns. Dylan's imagination must be a magical place, and one that he stays in with a stubborn determination. This was quite a year for Dylan Mulvaney -- from a proven force on the Chinese spy app TikTok to talks show interviews to appearance in designer gowns at the MetGala -- he's gone places few **men** would ever dare go. His courage is that of a masculine hero, which is why we're awarding Mulvaney _Man of the Year_. **[The good news for The Babylon Bee is that we won't get kicked off Twitter for naming a biological man a MAN this year, and the GOOD NEWS for YOU is that you'll save 25% on a Premium Subscription to The Babylon Bee with code MANOFTHEYEAR.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62735571:sUB7nviNp:m:1:2627245898:55351153DCB778ACDE1D74DDA5C211D7:r)**
---
[Get Your Premium Subscription to The Babylon Bee](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62735571:sUB7nviNp:m:1:2627245898:55351153DCB778ACDE1D74DDA5C211D7:r)
---
I can assure you becoming a member of the Bee will bring you more joy than a Bud Light ever would. Your incredible benefits will include:
* Ad-free browsing on BabylonBee.com
* A 20% discount on our online store
* Premium articles and full-length podcasts
* Access to hilarious comments and exclusive forums
* The thrill of supporting original content Big Tech attempts to suppress, the Left seeks to cancel, and -- every now and then -- is even funny

**[You won't be forced to live in a fantasy world, dress in a ballgown, destroy a major consumer brand, or even download TikTok to enjoy The Babylon Bee. If you agree those are all wins -- subscribe to the Bee today with code MANOFTHEYEAR.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62735571:sUB7nviNp:m:1:2627245898:55351153DCB778ACDE1D74DDA5C211D7:r)**
---
[Save 25% on the BEE with code MANOFTHEYEAR ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62735571:sUB7nviNp:m:1:2627245898:55351153DCB778ACDE1D74DDA5C211D7:r)
---
And, join me in telling Dylan -- you're the MAN! Thanks for supporting free speech and subscribing today.
---
Cheers! Seth Dillon
CEO | The Babylon Bee Pronouns: Bee and Beeself
---

body:
A wealthy, well-connected Republican has announced her campaign to defeat Martin in New Mexico’s U.S. Senate race
| | |
---
Peter — A Republican multi-millionaire just announced her campaign to defeat Martin in New Mexico’s U.S. Senate race.

**Martin’s new challenger is a longtime hedge fund executive who has already poured half a million dollars into her own campaign.** As the daughter of New Mexico’s last Republican Senator, she is all but certain to have GOP mega-donors lining up to support her bid. She already has the full backing of the National Republican Senatorial Committee.

**While Martin’s opponent may have a personal fortune and the GOP establishment behind her, what we have is far more valuable: a grassroots movement that comes together to fight for our shared values time and time again.**
[**That’s why we’re reaching out today: We need to raise as much as possible in these first 48 hours to prepare for the spending Republicans are about to pour into New Mexico. Will you rush in a split contribution of $5 or any amount between our campaign and Patty Murray to help keep Martin in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77841644/451661549/676858268?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk223-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzk0N2M4MS0yNWJkLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2FgValn1kBV8b_cNSdCIeC0KwKdLczQCzLGt_TTv7Uk=)

[**_Friend, this is my_** _**_real_**_** _story, without the media’s spin:_**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1b0b6037dd194132be72e8c8209af681&_e=NszmcDP5N3qK2JL9vDKQzVzrtl-qtHZl55i-n-Wj4xXiH7mDwVeJWgxc932-4JKAtnLHKv6UXTtGi_00JiJ8EpVwmMkZalsBeiGDlmBCkorlKx2lUJqCjB4TCQOMYf0rP-dvhBgjBb3M2b_4WHDky_Svu4IjUkIzeElplBHtHLt2iGL5HEkH9T3eQS-BylKusIvzgJJM4B899jnxsi7HulFpXYzutYunYD3CEPKmILFXVqcoTezujhWc-9oNXb35cdrIYKvvZ8hUOyqW58WDtrakYs0uhHnSHF82jfkpFsgxYeyStgrBM41lw--8DZlvf7Ai90K9WwjH4UspXT-j94oi2m0HxdlYUYd2FDGuPLT41ATxdWZxdhgI8Lgque2fP71leQwgxonhqId44N3WzWYYOhVcXfZIUQurK1t61_o%3D) From my earliest memories of childhood, my dad was my hero. Because he served as a firefighter and assistant chief training officer, my highest aspiration was to one day become the chief of the fire department of our hometown of Shreveport, Louisiana. But when I was just 12 years old, my dad was critically burned and permanently disabled in the line of duty. That fateful explosion changed the trajectory of all our lives. Following our family tragedy, I had to grow up fast, help my parents take care of my three younger siblings and small family farm, and consider other ways to serve. I became the first person in my family to go to college, and then to law school, and I dedicated my career in constitutional law to defending our fundamental freedoms in the courts. My wife Kelly and I got married in 1999, just as I was beginning my law practice. Like so many other couples, as our family grew, we became increasingly concerned about the condition of our country and what our children’s generation would inherit. About nine years ago, after much prayer and deliberation, we decided to heed the call to run for public office and do our best to make a difference. I was elected without opposition to the Louisiana Legislature, and a short time later, to an open seat in the U.S. Congress. Less than seven years after I arrived in Washington, on October 25, 2023, I was unanimously elected by my Republican colleagues to serve as the 56th Speaker of the House. When I was growing up, I never dreamed any of this would be possible. But I am humbled and truly grateful for this opportunity. **_[**_All I ever aspired to do is serve God and my country, in whatever capacity He called me._**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1b0b6037dd194132be72e8c8209af681&_e=NszmcDP5N3qK2JL9vDKQzVzrtl-qtHZl55i-n-Wj4xXiH7mDwVeJWgxc932-4JKAtnLHKv6UXTtGi_00JiJ8EvmpEjDTyh4uUm1rrngJHdlmKqS3w2abJobQ7C8aH-1I3zENxjZRW08UY4HZ76Rm0otXDOycs6I5MoBBASJ1uHRfFWSZTEs1ZsCERuWLffRwDNrPrTqODpczqe9nOqX68tn2GSvU7ZJSlo0qER5cs7d4mS-qabEqV_WK6j9Hqxc89rNRRhPtoqJwz7bnc8ghC4OELLfunX4ZtQXFmLNq7fnCns5LDRpDl359_99_wRasft7BOTB-gkJ10h45o7cLuhobRJwKEVSfHe9Mpl79yORzLE8FNkhLf89ZUopRlVW2jhgVSJguIlH0kyb0tE2E6ZQOR-8YvBvlenxQUFtTakc%3D)_** Friend, you and I both know that America is facing today one of the greatest collections of crises in our nation’s history. clean_body: Never forget where you came from| | | | That question has been asked and answered in the mainstream media constantly since I was elected Speaker of the House three months ago. It probably won’t surprise you that so much of what has been written and said isn’t accurate at all. A lot of it has been openly hostile. I wanted to take a moment to clarify a few things here because I expect you agree with me that these things are worth fighting for. From my earliest memories of childhood, my dad was my hero. Because he served as a firefighter and assistant chief training officer, my highest aspiration was to one day become the chief of the fire department of our hometown of Shreveport, Louisiana. But when I was just 12 years old, my dad was critically burned and permanently disabled in the line of duty. That fateful explosion changed the trajectory of all our lives. Following our family tragedy, I had to grow up fast, help my parents take care of my three younger siblings and small family farm, and consider other ways to serve. I became the first person in my family to go to college, and then to law school, and I dedicated my career in constitutional law to defending our fundamental freedoms in the courts. My wife Kelly and I got married in 1999, just as I was beginning my law practice. Like so many other couples, as our family grew, we became increasingly concerned about the condition of our country and what our children’s generation would inherit. About nine years ago, after much prayer and deliberation, we decided to heed the call to run for public office and do our best to make a difference. I was elected without opposition to the Louisiana Legislature, and a short time later, to an open seat in the U.S. Congress. Less than seven years after I arrived in Washington, on October 25, 2023, I was unanimously elected by my Republican colleagues to serve as the 56th Speaker of the House. When I was growing up, I never dreamed any of this would be possible. But I am humbled and truly grateful for this opportunity. Friend, you and I both know that America is facing today one of the greatest collections of crises in our nation’s history. The survival of our freedoms and the very future of our republic are hanging in the balance. SAVE America, we must keep and GROW the Republican Majority in the House. And to do that, I need partners and fellow warriors who are willing to fight by my side. And it has never been more important for us to stand together, defend truth and liberty, and restore the foundations of this extraordinary country God has given us. It will take all of us to succeed. And I need YOUR help. Sincerely, Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson you consider joining Team Johnson today?________________ | | | | Paid for by Mike Johnson for Louisiana |

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Please give me a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=911%2E791427%2Ey80shi)

Hey team, it's Ilhan.
In times like these, I like to be as direct as possible: **[Can I count on you to make your first $3 contribution to our re-election campaign for Congress today?](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-jan24.NN5r_X&refcode=em240127-1-t1&t=2&akid=911%2E791427%2Ey80shi)**
Let me explain why:
This Wednesday, we're closing the books on our first fundraising deadline of this election year, and we have some important grassroots goals to reach before it ends — goals we _need_ to hit if we're going to have the resources required to run a successful campaign.
Last cycle, our progressive movement went up against an obscene amount of outside spending from the political establishment, dark money super PACs, and right-wing special interests.
Thanks to lots and lots of grassroots supporters like you chipping in small amounts when they could, together we overcame the attacks and the people of Minnesota's 5th district re-elected me to my third term.
**Here's a simple truth: Going toe-to-toe with the wealthy and powerful in this country is not easy. It takes a lot of hard work, and _nobody_ can do it all alone.**
If we're going to stand strong and win again here in 2024 — against endless attacks, bigoted threats, and potentially millions of dollars in outside spending from groups like AIPAC — it's critical that we're in this together.
That's why I'm asking:
**[Can you make a contribution — of $3 or any amount you can — to stand with our movement before next week's end-of-month fundraising deadline? I wouldn't be asking if your support weren't so important to our campaign.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-jan24.NN5r_X&refcode=em240127-1-t1&t=3&akid=911%2E791427%2Ey80shi)**

I knew from the day I launched my first campaign that so long as I stuck to my values and fought for working people, our opponents would stop at nothing to try and defeat us.
Thank you for being a part of our fight.

# This Is What Indoctrination Looks Like
Student SLAMS her Conservative Christian Parents At School Board Meeting. She warns against “book banning” and bashes Trump. She says she was inspired & influenced by her teachers. Schools are indoctrinating students and turning kids against their parents. Lexington & Richland County Schools District 5, South Carolina
| Watch On Our Rumble Channel Below
---
[ ](https://9l762.r.ah.d.sendibm5.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsE8LNhTi46Se4r1Iept3t/T_MNLvY2RCyN)
Like many of you, when I watched this I had a pit in my stomach. I admire her courage to stand up for what she believes in, but where did these beliefs come from? Obviously, we know it comes from the teachers, administrators and social media where they target their algorithms to dissolve our Christian values. Someone asked me why I continue to share these videos. My answer is to inspire more to understand what is truly going on. You never know what one share or conversation may lead to. body:
Running a people-powered campaign means asking supporters like you to help reach our goals each month.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77843134/451665808/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWQxZjdlNy0yNmJkLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ThTOwzEY53YIhqEC9J5ijMvzBPsoqZyMa7EryFcMxEU=&emci=c4179046-98bc-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=61d1f7e7-26bd-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=26261389)

| | Our campaign is gaining some serious traction, securing some big endorsements and sustaining our grassroots momentum. We've earned the support of former Congresspeople, sitting senators, and groups like the College Democrats. **Senator John Fetterman of Pennsylvania endorsed Andy last week, becoming the first sitting senator to do so, stating that "Andy Kim is the kind of guy we can count on." On January 6th, I fought on the frontlines to stop Donald Trump and his MAGA mob from overturning a free and fair election. I witnessed my fellow officers be beaten bloody and attacked by people with hate in their heart.

I defended members of Congress who invited the violence into the Capitol. I returned to work, despite the trauma, and watched horrified as those same members refused to take action or even denounce the violence.

That day showed me just how fragile and precious our democracy is. **We need fighters in Congress who are willing to show up to hold far-right extremists accountable.**

I’m running because I’m passionate about this and I’m not going to sit back and wait for someone else to do it. But Trump and his rabid supporters will stop at _NOTHING_ to stop me from winning this open seat.

[I set a huge end-of-month goal of $100,000 and I need your help to crush it and show we've got the grassroots power behind this campaign to win! Can you chip in even just $5 to me and The Collective PAC to join us in this fight? ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wk3KbH6rdH1-Ipv8EScXsA6kSCyVmSRqFpdj0FjPROcUsiPevs_wJeBlWhYw4bnEq1J6F3a0U7G0pxLDIwMARg6mwQG9NotJOXxs1erzgXwUgVZdwp8T9VAX1wVqCvP0am6mrHA5pjecd2QmYViW4GBMIfulfkrenjRjvCEObhxPmYZETZmghQa4b1VSS5ABK-QXwlG6Wwxub41S73dZPSSBRpWMxAiDA5FnEf4SpmLg0CXmGHRyNuqkuM9qIUkie7xMbskljVh6i3zZKAG7t0KzA4XGx8JV-2yiAU0zM1s_Dej9DZsvGEDnCUdqgvfnrOUsbeU_alN5aC7XAunv_R/43c/La2coAjoT36tC-WSb2K1qA/h4/0KyFePYO784H7tn_jVd9hvtZJerhwPx-BgeHcdwlliM)

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Our friend Harry Dunn is running for Congress in Maryland’s Third District. We hope you’ll read the message below from him and consider splitting a donation between Harry’s campaign and The Collective PAC. Hey there Peter, my name is Harry Dunn. 3 years ago as a Capitol Police officer, I defended the U.S. Capitol from insurrectionists. Today, I’m running to be the next Democrat to represent Maryland's 3rd District. | | On January 6th, I fought on the frontlines to stop Donald Trump and his MAGA mob from overturning a free and fair election. I witnessed my fellow officers be beaten bloody and attacked by people with hate in their heart. I defended members of Congress who invited the violence into the Capitol. I returned to work, despite the trauma, and watched horrified as those same members refused to take action or even denounce the violence. That day showed me just how fragile and precious our democracy is. We need fighters in Congress who are willing to show up to hold far-right extremists accountable. I’m running because I’m passionate about this and I’m not going to sit back and wait for someone else to do it. But Trump and his rabid supporters will stop at NOTHING to stop me from winning this open seat. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Harry Dunn and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | With love, Harry The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . name: VoteVets HQ
subject: Our newest ad: Gold Star Parents
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
We’re airing this in Pennsylvania on Sunday, before and after the NFC Championship game.
#
Trump will never understand what it is like to serve.
Or to sacrifice.
He’ll buddy up to the Military, to Veterans, acting like they have no better friend.
But we know his record all too well.
**[Watch our newest ad, Gold Star Parents:](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-jan24-goldstar.KoowZf&refcode=em240127-1-30&t=1&akid=23666%2E3013755%2E_fHKGj)**
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-jan24-goldstar.KoowZf&refcode=em240127-1-30&t=2&akid=23666%2E3013755%2E_fHKGj)
A note on the strategy behind this ad:
We’re airing this in Pennsylvania on Sunday, before and after the NFC Championship game. Studies have shown that football games, especially championship games, are the most viewed programs in the country. They are widely seen across the entire political spectrum.
And in a swing state like Pennsylvania, that’s exactly what we aim to do.
This advertisement will cost $100,000. After you watch it, we’re asking you to make a donation. Because this is a model we’ll look to replicate, and make sure we reach the people we need to.
**[Watch “Gold Star Parents” here, and make a donation to help us cover the cost and pay for more advertisements just like this.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-jan24-goldstar.KoowZf&refcode=em240127-1-30&t=3&akid=23666%2E3013755%2E_fHKGj)**
| [WATCH THE AD](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-jan24-goldstar.KoowZf&refcode=em240127-1-30&t=4&akid=23666%2E3013755%2E_fHKGj)

| Did you see this message, fellow activist?

On Tuesday, February 13, there will be a special election to fill the vacant PA House District 140 seat. The state House is currently divided at 101-101, so it’s critical that we win.

**But in order for the New PA Project Education Fund, an affiliated organization, to register Pennsylvanians to vote ahead of the January 29 deadline, your help is needed.**

[**The future of Pennsylvania is at stake, team. That’s why we have set the aspirational goal of registering 60,000 Pennsylvanians to vote. \---------- Forwarded message ---------

We need your help, fellow activist.

**On Tuesday, February 13, there is a special election that will again determine the speaker's gavel in the PA House.** The state House is currently divided at 101-101, so it’s critical that we win on Feb. 13 so we can continue fighting for the future of PA. This seat was left vacant by state Rep. John Galloway, who resigned on Dec. 14 after he won a district judgeship in November of 2023.

Peter, this isn't the email I wanted to write, but I really have no other choice. Recent polls show me neck and neck with my wealthy GOP opponents, and now, one of them just spent $2 million on a TV ad buy to flood the airwaves and defeat me. The reality is that I'm in serious danger of falling behind just as the election year starts.
That's why I set a goal to raise $25,000 before our midnight deadline to fight back, and I'm counting on you to help me get there. **[So please, will you split $50 between my campaign and United Rural Democrats right now to help me reach my goal before midnight, fight back against the GOP, and win in Look, this race is going to be my toughest one yet: Mitch McConnell personally named me a top target, and my self-funding GOP opponents will stop at nothing to flip this seat and the Senate red.
And while I don't have a personal fortune to dip into, I have something much more powerful: this grassroots team. My campaign relies on folks like you chipping in $10 or $20 at a time – and when we come together, I know we can beat the GOP's millions and win this race. Recent polls show me neck and neck with my wealthy GOP opponents, and now, one of them just spent $2 million on a TV ad buy to flood the airwaves and defeat me. The reality is that I'm in serious danger of falling behind just as the election year starts. That's why I set a goal to raise $25,000 before our midnight deadline to fight back, and I'm counting on you to help me get there. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: = = = = Look, this race is going to be my toughest one yet: Mitch McConnell personally named me a top target, and my self-funding GOP opponents will stop at nothing to flip this seat and the Senate red. The United States Senate needs more solid, principled conservatives who care about protecting the American Dream. **That 's why we need Bernie Moreno as the next senator from Ohio.**

He immigrated to the United States, started a car dealership business, and worked hard to build his business to the success it is today.

If you would like to unsubscribe, please visit this Peter, The United States Senate needs more solid, principled conservatives who care about protecting the American Dream. He immigrated to the United States, started a car dealership business, and worked hard to build his business to the success it is today. name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: Honoring Holocaust Remembrance Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
A day to always remember Dear Peter, Today holds a great significance to all of humanity - Holocaust Remembrance Day. Today is a day to honor the memory of the millions who perished in one of the darkest chapters in history, to pay tribute to the resilience of those who survived, to remember the Righteous Gentiles who risked their lives to rescue Jews, and to reaffirm our commitment to preventing such atrocities from ever happening again. As a Jewish person, the Holocaust stands as a stark reminder of the consequences of hatred, bigotry, and intolerance. That's why it is our duty to ensure that the stories of the victims and survivors are preserved, shared, and taught. It is our work to ensure that future generations remember and learn from history. As we remember the consequences of unchecked hate, it is also an important time to acknowledge the antisemitism currently surging in the United States and around the world, something our grandparents talked about, but that most of us believed could never happen again in these enlightened times. Sadly, we were wrong. The oldest -ism is still very much with us today. So now, as we remember the Holocaust, we must also renew our commitment to fostering a world where diversity is celebrated and human rights are upheld everywhere. That means examining our own biases, language, and actions, calling out and pushing back on those spewing antisemitic tropes today, and standing in solidarity with our Jewish friends and family members. As your representative, I am dedicated to advocating for policies that promote inclusivity and understanding within our community and beyond. Together, let us strive to create a world where the lessons of the Holocaust serve as a cautionary tale that we all have to work to ensure a future free from discrimination, prejudice, and violence. By standing united against hatred, we can build a more just and compassionate society. In peace, Kim Schrier
| Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
---
Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible.

Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
PO Box 2728
Issaquah, WA 98027
United States

name: Team Casey
subject: Urgent update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for AG
body:
This is urgent, folks. **In the first quarter since he launched his campaign, David McCormick, our mega-millionaire opponent, outraised us.** But it doesn’t stop there. He put in $1 million of his own personal fortune to flip this seat red. AND a super PAC supporting him just announced it raised a historic $18 million last year. [_**Before we go any further, we have to ask: Will you split $20 or more between our campaign and Eugene DePasquale to help us compete?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77848665/451680433/1872979436?refcode=email_012724_depasquale-casey-split&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YThiNTMyZS0yZGJkLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BYpzv9hhjZtDPW9gsTxpWTxK4RNbkYNT69dE7eVOjIA=) We always knew this was going to be a tough race, but this is the latest sign that PA’s Senate race could cost half a billion dollars, making it one of the most competitive and expensive of the cycle. McCormick has millions upon millions of dollars more that he can and will invest into his campaign to defeat Bob and flip PA red, on top of the super PAC support he was already promised by Mitch McConnell. **With the Senate majority (and the White House) hinging on Pennsylvania, we simply can’t afford to be outraised.** The best way to fight back is with grassroots support from folks like you. That’s why we’re setting a 48-hour goal to raise $75,000 to start off 2024 on the right foot. [_**Can Bob count on you to split a donation between our campaign and Eugene DePasquale to help us reach our goal and keep PA and the Senate blue? clean_body: This is urgent, folks. In the first quarter since he launched his campaign, David McCormick, our mega-millionaire opponent, outraised us. But it doesn’t stop there. He put in $1 million of his own personal fortune to flip this seat red. AND a super PAC supporting him just announced it raised a historic $18 million last year. = We always knew this was going to be a tough race, but this is the latest sign that PA’s Senate race could cost half a billion dollars, making it one of the most competitive and expensive of the cycle. McCormick has millions upon millions of dollars more that he can and will invest into his campaign to defeat Bob and flip PA red, on top of the super PAC support he was already promised by Mitch McConnell. With the Senate majority (and the White House) hinging on Pennsylvania, we simply can’t afford to be outraised. The best way to fight back is with grassroots support from folks like you. That’s why we’re setting a 48-hour goal to raise $75,000 to start off 2024 on the right foot. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thank you in advance. – Team Casey | Make sure this email goes to your inbox. name: Laurel Imer
subject: Reminder: An update on my journeys across Colorado and the country the past 2 months...
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Laurel Imer and is not approved by any candidate or candidates committee
body:
Between December 2023 and January of 2024 I have traveled to 10+ counties, spoken with delegates in all 64 counties, and visited, 2 states in our mission to retake the RNC.
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CshIsmazY3DQu-MtTewELU33ThhjH99OI-G3PiSy_PD_bx96oqf6E2Mei4KGfaj28kwwmP4ijS8w6Lw0nuljWky6LOdJUuUgJw2cmG0B2vvI3RBZMV3qPz_mJbfPYu0svehFUy-p28UX9k2NPaGqcO1uQMu3V-P2&c=Y7kJz-ILR_EJrdXieseO3H68E4vkfk2TF9xtFrvDdub5SO5DCPK9ow==&ch=Q66ofUgk35JNyAE6i2CnOR8GTDnLlArFc3hOcpPlaC-MWhClv4lFng==)
---
---
| Friend,
This weekend I am wheels up for Las Vegas, NV at the invitation of Turning Point Action for the Restoring National Confidence Summit, followed by the Republican National Committee's Winter Meeting as a guest of Colorado's Republican National Committeeman Randy Corporon.
These two events are critical to learning the ropes of serving as your Committeewoman. The Turning Point Action event will include listening sessions with sitting members of the RNC, meetings with fellow candidates for the RNC, also invited by Turning Point, and training for County Chairs that have been invited from across the country on how to chase the vote, raise funds, and lead victories in their respective counties.
At this event we will also hear from many amazing patriots like Mike Lindell, Scott Pressler, Charlie Kirk, and more!
Following the Restoring National Confidence Summit, I will then move down the street to the Paris Hotel to attend the Republican National Committee's Winter Meeting.
Colorado's National Committeeman Randy Corporon was kind enough to invite me to participate in the meeting as a guest. Attending this meeting will provide a further opportunity to get to know the other members of the National Committee and see how the meetings are conducted so I can be best prepared to serve as your committeewoman if you elect me in April.
Last month I had the honor of attending America Fest in Phoenix, AZ again at the request of Turning Point Action. I have included some photos from the event below:
---
|
---

---

---
| While at America Fest, Turning Point Action and the Mount Vernon Project held an RNC Town Hall with current members of the Republican National Committee where they answered questions about the state of the RNC, the Presidential Primary, plans to replace Ronna McDaniel and more.
It was a very informative breakout session as was the "How to become an RNC National Delegate" session. The knowledge gained at America Fest is vast and well worth the time, and investment to attend if you have not before.
As well as traveling to Phoenix and Las Vegas, I have also made stops in 10+ counties in just the past 60 days. Visiting LaPlata, Huerfano, Denver, Boulder, Jefferson, Arapahoe, Douglas, Fremont, Teller, and Custer counties just to name a few. I have also had successful phone conversations and written contact with perspective delegates in all 64 counties.
The grassroots of Colorado are fired up for 2024 and I am confident in our path to victory across the country.
When elected your next Republican National Committeewoman, I will do everything in my power on the National Committee to ensure the RNC does everything it possibly can to ensure victory in 2024.
If visiting these counties and traveling to America Fest showed me anything, it showed me that we have the momentum to win, but that just because we think it is there, does not mean we can sit back and watch. We must be active, we must engage, we must out-spend the democrats, we must vote, and we must dedicate everything in our being to winning these races.
---
| As we quickly approach caucus on March 7th and 9th, followed by our county, congressional and state assemblies, I kindly ask for your continued support so we can bolster our efforts to Re-Take the RNC.
Whatever you are able and willing to pitch in below can bring us one step closer to saving our country from the Biden Administration and ensuring victory for Republican candidates across the country.
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CshIsmazY3DQu-MtTewELU33ThhjH99OI-G3PiSy_PD_bx96oqf6E98j3be_c6EnVPiS3_2TlDbTRvACZ0L26N-5lBWmn_8_JW5IZUHLsiGImvwzSIOqG3BB4fitWtwSKvOXpF_8Oh_otpFh4bzZ9_SwmKlYK3d5nM5154F2dHzsUz9FYhqDhqFYP1b5cmq5Esr-iLecCGWc6kcomBbqnEdg1_dQxlS8&c=Y7kJz-ILR_EJrdXieseO3H68E4vkfk2TF9xtFrvDdub5SO5DCPK9ow==&ch=Q66ofUgk35JNyAE6i2CnOR8GTDnLlArFc3hOcpPlaC-MWhClv4lFng==)
---
| | [DONATE TODAY!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CshIsmazY3DQu-MtTewELU33ThhjH99OI-G3PiSy_PD_bx96oqf6E98j3be_c6EnVPiS3_2TlDbTRvACZ0L26N-5lBWmn_8_JW5IZUHLsiGImvwzSIOqG3BB4fitWtwSKvOXpF_8Oh_otpFh4bzZ9_SwmKlYK3d5nM5154F2dHzsUz9FYhqDhqFYP1b5cmq5Esr-iLecCGWc6kcomBbqnEdg1_dQxlS8&c=Y7kJz-ILR_EJrdXieseO3H68E4vkfk2TF9xtFrvDdub5SO5DCPK9ow==&ch=Q66ofUgk35JNyAE6i2CnOR8GTDnLlArFc3hOcpPlaC-MWhClv4lFng==)
---
| This election like every other is the most important in our lifetimes and the tyranny and law fare we are witnessing should be a clarion call to every American to step up and get involved.
In March when you attend your caucus I ask that you pledge to be a delegate to the State Convention so you can cast your vote for our campaign, so we can lead the RNC in A Return to Patriotism in 2024.
I look forward to updating you all on the events of the week upon my return from Las Vegas!
Sincerely,
---

Border Patrol agents apprehended 50 illegal aliens on the terror watchlist between October and December, according to federal data updated Friday.

clean_body: Montpelier is currently the only capital city in the entire country without a post office. | | Hey Peter, Earlier this month, Becca participated in a rally outside the shuttered post office in Montpelier to demand that USPS leadership take action now to open a post office location in the capital city. Montpelier is currently the only capital city in the entire country without a post office – can you believe it? Montpelier’s previous post office closed in July following the historic flooding, but it’s been months without any updates from USPS leadership. In the meantime, Montpelier residents have been left without a post office. Lacking a post office is an enormous hardship for seniors, small businesses and members of the community – which is why Becca is demanding that USPS leadership act now. We can’t believe it: over 8,000 Democrats have already renewed their 2024 DLCC Membership! That’s the energy state Democrats are counting on as they go toe-to-toe with Republicans in competitive races across the country. But we’ll be frank, we were disappointed to see you haven’t renewed your membership for 2024 yet. Does this look right? | **2024 DLCC MEMBERSHIP SUPPORTER RECORD**

subject: We can do better

Fellow American,

I want to introduce myself.

My name is Nella Domenici – I’m a proud New Mexican, devoted mother, wife of a Navy veteran, businesswoman, and I’m excited to announce to you that **I am running to be the next Republican U.S. Senator from New Mexico.**

**It’s not breaking news for me to say our nation and state are clearly on the wrong track.**

To say that Joe Biden and my opponent Martin Heinrich’s policies have failed us seems inadequate – _it’s like they don’t even understand us._

**The cost of living is way up, the border is wide open, our crime and drug crises are out of control, and our public education system is leaving our kids behind.**

Hardworking New Mexicans are suffering from these failures. We need new leadership in Washington who will improve, energize, and restore hope to our state and our country.

[**That’s why I’m running for Senate, and I’m asking for your support to help me restore fiscally conservative, commonsense, and impactful leadership both in New Mexico and the U.S. Senate by making a Week One donation to my campaign today.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=249c85c3ab5740eaaa241a47f61c1de3&_e=uXIMADih6yAhOFwTs20nKmj7Qq9yoznakmaYd49jogHnXdpdrAMtRHJJkLSm7X8NmN-ZOkuIw20To-_-5J65qp49VVk7kN-LjqLstnvtr8mKINpOZefa8WQe2Htt-B1_X-jH_LeT8Go5qrc9FlRG8zcSChNfurf84NK9QY1hk9rXFrM9cM7jFUQSFEkxUWyhWlzwUQ3YmQPXIeh8Ev3stPPR_tZScNELAZVPeR2nw8KxdKWzVLghJq3afODYNH5gMzcnP--lNYvc3NruIBXtHPBqHtOGwyg_8I7quqeQ9pIzgzpcD_4Ls1fWxkDt3oYzwIXKb-V0oFQik22zHh4ofieb6q6s4mINlsAh3yG8tm7w8x4VEpL9Snnq0DS3eZ2O562mh9NALxpTdE6dK9E7kg%3D%3D)

[ ** JOIN THE FIGHT WITH NELLA » **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=249c85c3ab5740eaaa241a47f61c1de3&_e=uXIMADih6yAhOFwTs20nKmj7Qq9yoznakmaYd49jogHnXdpdrAMtRHJJkLSm7X8NmN-ZOkuIw20To-_-5J65qp49VVk7kN-LjqLstnvtr8mKINpOZefa8WQe2Htt-B1_X-jH_LeT8Go5qrc9FlRG8zcSChNfurf84NK9QY1hk9rXFrM9cM7jFUQSFEkxUWyhWlzwUQ3YmQPXIeh8Ev3stPPR_tZScNELAZVPeR2nw8IX3wzQmiqQDRZgtifhN-1A-1443PO8IzrdH4DBefoT-QQoMlWi87n_31ka9waRaIjG9SQFyFU0JyJbLcEJ_JQHBO7e5geM7smec9_Suj0dVqe4LXR4Db7rRtLHIAdBwgHd4nh8zO4Uf_rRH2xCPmQY5U1XQC-7lZ5Qora8XJ2hiQ%3D%3D)
New Mexico is my home. **My family’s roots run deep in New Mexico and it is here that I have always returned.**

I understand the importance of hard work, like most New Mexicans. I waited tables to help pay for my undergraduate degree from Georgetown University. While holding down a full-time job, I paid my way through night school at Georgetown Law. I also paid for Harvard Business School, graduating as a Baker Scholar, top 5% of the class, while nine months pregnant.

I began my career at the bottom and worked my way up through the complex finance world, where I eventually served as CFO for one of the world’s largest, most successful investment firms. In my career, I have advised, invested in, grown, and led many companies, and served on public company boards. **Collectively, the companies I have been heavily involved with have employed thousands of Americans.**

I am uniquely prepared and qualified to fight for a significantly improved New Mexican economy. My professional experience and education enable me to deeply understand taxation, inflation, setting and managing huge budgets, and creating incentives and benefits that serve employees, and attract new businesses and entrepreneurs.

New Mexico is blessed with abundant natural resources, cultural diversity, rich traditions, hard-working people, and leading national laboratories and military installations. **But sadly, our leaders in Washington and Santa Fe have failed us.**

I will fight to secure our borders, bring costs down, ease financial burdens on New Mexico families struggling to get by, and ensure America is once again the land of opportunity and freedom.

**I’m in this fight to win – and with your support, we will get the job done to flip this seat and restore a Republican majority in the Senate!**

[**We can and must do better for New Mexico and America. Will you join me in this fight and help me officially kick off our campaign to win back this seat and the majority by contributing to my campaign with a Week One donation?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=249c85c3ab5740eaaa241a47f61c1de3&_e=uXIMADih6yAhOFwTs20nKmj7Qq9yoznakmaYd49jogHnXdpdrAMtRHJJkLSm7X8NmN-ZOkuIw20To-_-5J65qp49VVk7kN-LjqLstnvtr8mKINpOZefa8WQe2Htt-B1_X-jH_LeT8Go5qrc9FlRG8zcSChNfurf84NK9QY1hk9rXFrM9cM7jFUQSFEkxUWyhWlzwUQ3YmQPXIeh8Ev3stPPR_tZScNELAZVPeR2nw8JpOyJHOAI6j3FBdBH173A4G1gexekvTU10HKEEdKwYffGP5Y5Rd4wznFCx_IZ6rkVNmqcHJIQ4XOKn6hqQ6cBA6D_G5RnrpIY90FMqWtukNuh7DRA2GmSj8D6UEDc4lE2rg43l2AxTV88VUccxhq3MyALE1bMPH6GSOQ-9jr_MXg%3D%3D)

[ ** JOIN THE FIGHT WITH NELLA » **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=249c85c3ab5740eaaa241a47f61c1de3&_e=uXIMADih6yAhOFwTs20nKmj7Qq9yoznakmaYd49jogHnXdpdrAMtRHJJkLSm7X8NmN-ZOkuIw20To-_-5J65qp49VVk7kN-LjqLstnvtr8mKINpOZefa8WQe2Htt-B1_X-jH_LeT8Go5qrc9FlRG8zcSChNfurf84NK9QY1hk9rXFrM9cM7jFUQSFEkxUWyhWlzwUQ3YmQPXIeh8Ev3stPPR_tZScNELAZVPeR2nw8IXXQmKl741T_3gqVZmUxuKbhn-AUlyxt9K0jryCxgcngJ1NZaSZzhmsSUGWOwW9w4YoDz5d2a0xUI0MVyPUOFdg6pJrhPJu4Rra37tJRU81MmamCqe7vg762cSjqy0yCA3UGlhkXx7h1zaESpurtVaQtRyKbLSVvMuLdaVvo8BfQ%3D%3D)
With you in the fight,

_**Nella Domenici**_
Republican for Senate

| **ABOUT NELLA**
**“New Mexico is my home. I was born in Albuquerque and lived for most of my childhood in a home near the intersection of Lomas Blvd. and Monroe St. with my seven brothers, sisters, and parents - Pete and Nancy Domenici. I began my education at Our Lady of Fatima, where I learned the values I hold today. I am the devoted mother of two, step-mom of four, and the wife of a Navy Veteran. My family’s roots run deep in New Mexico and it is here that I have always returned, no matter where my life has taken me. My husband Pat and I cherish our home in New Mexico, that we have owned for nearly twenty years.

Like my father and mother, I have been a warrior for those who most need an advocate: for women competing in academics or business, for families dealing with mental illness, and for those whom quality healthcare was out of reach. I have also been a champion of improving the education of our youth in underserved communities.

Like everyone starting their career, I began at the bottom and worked my way up through the complex finance world, where I eventually served as CFO for one of the world’s largest, most successful investment firms. In my career, I helped build businesses, helped companies grow, and created jobs. With this business experience, I will help New Mexico attract new companies and create jobs - so hardworking New Mexicans can find success and live their American Dream.

New Mexico is blessed with abundant natural resources, cultural diversity and rich traditions, hardworking people, and leading national laboratories. But sadly, our leaders in Washington and Santa Fe have failed us. The cost of living is up, we are in a crime crisis, the border is wide open, and our public education system is leaving our kids behind.

We are clearly on the wrong track. We can and must do better. That’s why I am running for the United States Senate.” _-Nella_**

[ ** JOIN NELLA **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=249c85c3ab5740eaaa241a47f61c1de3&_e=uXIMADih6yAhOFwTs20nKmj7Qq9yoznakmaYd49jogHnXdpdrAMtRHJJkLSm7X8NmN-ZOkuIw20To-_-5J65qp49VVk7kN-LjqLstnvtr8mKINpOZefa8WQe2Htt-B1_X-jH_LeT8Go5qrc9FlRG8zcSChNfurf84NK9QY1hk9rXFrM9cM7jFUQSFEkxUWyhWlzwUQ3YmQPXIeh8Ev3stPPR_tZScNELAZVPeR2nw8KeIViuRPTUfV_x8IvIgtD9Mv3pKQR2AlcFYu8Y8XZfBclajItMK-fWVyv8zesWdmos38kgGfM4335QzxQ0HvZbm98Rv_ELLLpXcAYyiC3_kbYI-A6FMGzzJ4FKmHNl8_-oD7ylCVKzbF-QCP-yQip78BTq5QvTeHZ0yiWQYY71sw%3D%3D)

---

**_Follow Nella Online_**
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=249c85c3ab5740eaaa241a47f61c1de3&_e=uXIMADih6yAhOFwTs20nKqjOMB9e3RSWvTJQeShyuT0ls8nrmGIYT24NevycOa2VLl87-Neb3mBkd7OLmlk2btoUIi8LjgqGlUGYBuLWZzOuJAKTP7mP8n-zQvOD3B2jOztkCCWCLlTKqZVkYzjWacYiVerB06iavPSmEoe0-8V11cUIl3B48v7OY7efwFKGjK0z1WLg4IQzrHeYZ2jY3TCg9O7vonDiNZEPumtcln8%3D) [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=249c85c3ab5740eaaa241a47f61c1de3&_e=uXIMADih6yAhOFwTs20nKrgtoshKNhl73niA0IH2Yq7U2lOLdIP0lSFqnPVcXWuFlTEC4IWOaRpteaBn1DNR1GEMXH-71xktW-4tcz82XmkVqaKC8s6v9ZbzPxt3nBtZXLyYM_hR4ZlYQapLOlpKmOJCI_tWKgRDDPCbWZ3F3DnjsJPt3qV4J1ixJ_6Z9JQ7Xw9ZgyQVbyB6Ag0V0F6IJA%3D%3D) [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=249c85c3ab5740eaaa241a47f61c1de3&_e=uXIMADih6yAhOFwTs20nKvDMpP_D0b-qHhnPXdstOyGqh4Q0-e1CgZBB6q1kvdl9NJllUl-WRlKyFV_GNJTvAJaVSBvrxg2jsb1TafSQT01YvBJ1hm5KWqR2C0uhq6F8Zux2LebvTZp-zumbDYf2XqFje2OhgFnoXrzsQnvaa7MRVcNCzW-cI-DfDqDl4UxECH2lQZLutMsbdaWe7YPXqQ%3D%3D)

name: Live Poll (via Team DMP)
subject: this bill would END universal mail-in voting in Florida
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
Republicans want to make it as hard as possible for you to cast your ballot.
| | |
---
Friend, Rick Scott’s extremist allies in Tallahassee aren’t even trying to hide it: **If there’s a chance you’ll vote blue, they will make it as hard as possible for you to cast your ballot.**
That's why they've introduced new legislation to END universal mail-in voting just months before a critical election in a state known for razor-thin margins!
Millions of Florida voters rely on mail-in voting to cast their ballots every year. Mail-in voting is secure, and it makes our democracy more accessible. This legislation to end mail-in voting is just another blatant attempt to restrict our right to vote. And friend, we can’t let them get away with it!
_With the 2024 elections underway, we need to know where you stand. Please respond before midnight:_
**Do you support universal mail-in voting?**

Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
