clean_body: Republicans want to make it as hard as possible for you to cast your ballot. | | | Friend, Rick Scott’s extremist allies in Tallahassee aren’t even trying to hide it: If there’s a chance you’ll vote blue, they will make it as hard as possible for you to cast your ballot. That's why they've introduced new legislation to END universal mail-in voting just months before a critical election in a state known for razor-thin margins! Millions of Florida voters rely on mail-in voting to cast their ballots every year. Mail-in voting is secure, and it makes our democracy more accessible. This legislation to end mail-in voting is just another blatant attempt to restrict our right to vote. And friend, we can’t let them get away with it! With the 2024 elections underway, we need to know where you stand. Please respond before midnight: Do you support universal mail-in voting? | | | | | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

Our campaigns are powered by grassroots donations, not corporate PAC money. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvHLQX_I9PvHaBd-y0Im5PhnVI1cmXGDYA0voQx4Q60rGXb26MnAXRYVOGuH9zd7U7cryO5dCEZs-pFgwl1ujMOAxQZ3zkK8vWpY6eNi2jRJMMgOAbF6HAMFy-AaU_kGzJdH_cYIT7RojiKgjLkyNJd5odgewKzW_-jjR0pkbZ5Yk/43c/teRtjTCSRWe0tZYWVf65CA/h0/1uY73hCUqRY5DicKdIR0LaXZvtJzvSWxmzQHM8qHIBw)

Friend, Today, I’m joining my sister-in-service Cori Bush in Missouri to kick off her re-election campaign. This week, Jamaal Bowman just kicked off his re-election campaign in New York. **Because of Cori and Jamaal’s advocacy for Palestinians’ human rights, anti-Palestinian AIPAC recruited candidates to run against them in this year’s Democratic primary.** Now, they’re facing primary challengers who decided to run because of different views on Israel and Palestine. Cori Bush, Jamaal Bowman, and I won’t back down or stay silent**.** We will continue demanding an end to ethnic cleansing, and condemning the U.S. government’s role in it. [**Please split a donation to Jamaal Bowman’s, Cori Bush’s, and my campaigns today, so we can withstand $100 million in AIPAC attacks and continue demanding a ceasefire now.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKuxxxGNCMufLZFZwalOj6rC6XVLQhPsD7GvZzHpBSRF_DtIBkJzSAaJ_3jbDmMH_QAkKitnvOVkyr-KYuhcMAxO_7W743GIDOtgTtCqgqShhgfOX2HJ-w7G6nsTr0kSvnNo-KZnD8ihZN8aZZECuIwtxmquBnM-65hby2Yn8-Qq11gTzVoIAGlarqv1Hc5zBCn--_UJE2oGLkmNIi-a2Haov3yp9mdEqdPjYpeICSpMMEVukRrijNVGBOYjdA35L4WZU5pTwV6ALrXlIzBkf-T0XgLhuuFjJG_260pFb8k8GSRbTP9F-Gfs2aLhctNNi9/43c/teRtjTCSRWe0tZYWVf65CA/h1/glCnrmT9ikoyTqczlaU_3jf31o4Kcaruju0Atww9vqA) | [DONATE TODAY](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKuxxxGNCMufLZFZwalOj6rC6XVLQhPsD7GvZzHpBSRF8V3btqg4mscSl9DYzu8ifFllPzmTG8S-1eEeyPuaJkdHRuolTI_9IQR0A3_H1XLs8vL4uyOecFh3vDClxXM1RlfOV9LmLpltI2TUbzeufQ0fuGSwAifKETUyVEXLsyQOF3CDfWVJmefn63z4WAfrazoMMTO7skc8vq2oFEjgMX6S7QvKooNsTk7gMKIIKSvxLpXkEGixiKVDEDly_zeApeSI5FZnQclAc13w2ZuzueIUuON9qBpooQ1qLzM8Rd7nBU1q3T3M4V8UmeXai0u-8M/43c/teRtjTCSRWe0tZYWVf65CA/h2/2DX0ML4qbyVsPpbmoVKUors1ZRXwohGGwNSChvw3AZo)

In 2022’s elections, AIPAC and its network of PACs spent $40 million against Black and brown progressives. Most of the funds came from Republican donors who’ve supported Trump.
Now, AIPAC plans to spend $100 million in an attempt to defeat me, Cori, and Jamaal in this year’s elections.
They’re targeting candidates of color representing working class districts, whose campaigns are powered by grassroots donations rather than corporate PAC money.
Like me, Jamaal and Cori are deeply rooted in their communities, with experience organizing across differences for the dignity of all people.
We’re listening to and representing our constituents—unlike many of our colleagues in Congress, who are disconnected from the American people on this and other issues.
We urgently need more elected officials who recognize our shared humanity, and who act accordingly.
[**I need Reps. Jamaal Bowman and Cori Bush by my side. Please split a donation of $5 or more between our campaigns today so we can stay in Congress defending human rights together.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKuxxxGNCMufLZFZwalOj6rC6XVLQhPsD7GvZzHpBSRF9nwRl8MfIXEc8sMQtMcmOPQLxyCqHG9nwMqG5jMk019-zsoNbG6aUdBo69C7xOKauC6v6HxeyqxUllFJT5XzblepeULtALJdIP1amNj91XECi4fU3eL25dkzEGafJiu-Ihb35rtSCgGFp0gfpvS98ZoXmPpWy_9RHAIuG8SbKU1bi4hKxRGaXKQaZRcpZPm75HIDjj396MOXKbyUg0IGAt6E5sC74e-Fh0DT1Yvw_DR_bxRtILowlCuE-RjkjnfRSZx818CQRiThqo62yV7eJp/43c/teRtjTCSRWe0tZYWVf65CA/h3/j8W2MEqxGQtkPyvzk7LR4MnNGKTfvTm06UAo3zrglTI)

clean_body: Our campaigns are powered by grassroots donations, not corporate PAC money. | | | Friend, Today, I’m joining my sister-in-service Cori Bush in Missouri to kick off her re-election campaign. This week, Jamaal Bowman just kicked off his re-election campaign in New York. Because of Cori and Jamaal’s advocacy for Palestinians’ human rights, anti-Palestinian AIPAC recruited candidates to run against them in this year’s Democratic primary. Now, they’re facing primary challengers who decided to run because of different views on Israel and Palestine. Cori Bush, Jamaal Bowman, and I won’t back down or stay silent. We will continue demanding an end to ethnic cleansing, and condemning the U.S. government’s role in it. | In 2022’s elections, AIPAC and its network of PACs spent $40 million against Black and brown progressives. Most of the funds came from Republican donors who’ve supported Trump. Now, AIPAC plans to spend $100 million in an attempt to defeat me, Cori, and Jamaal in this year’s elections. They’re targeting candidates of color representing working class districts, whose campaigns are powered by grassroots donations rather than corporate PAC money. Like me, Jamaal and Cori are deeply rooted in their communities, with experience organizing across differences for the dignity of all people. We’re listening to and representing our constituents—unlike many of our colleagues in Congress, who are disconnected from the American people on this and other issues. We urgently need more elected officials who recognize our shared humanity, and who act accordingly. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib, Cori Bush and Jamaal Bowman | | | | | | | | | Thank you so much. Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . I won't sugarcoat it. This is the single most difficult race in America. I can't do it without you. **[That's why I am counting on you to rush in your GARVEY FOR SENATE campaign R.S.V.P. of $35 today.](http://links.freeliberty.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=b9498dffa35242ba8c9d4e4faa65b78e&_e=_9tqp_8UD5cwtfZyYfMOu10ubsYvoF4n1IFz06tKt9b_cyzRyMTNJzVW91KUmVYibnNCs89fFoKMV6SQjKoYQg7ulE_iSivbTHBMOFzodOYCWvhuMcuw9xudre20pe49wuMXpfWWR59UD_h3sKO4HWQ-rYolBOxzz_RYGB75TinPql5XzviY1FjZ8Wi8ZVe83OLRLru5ohFXF_bpEPOYS0zl55pd84p1ifYz3zrOdQl4TYCGBT3Hj41TS2WbVxmGZ7zTqTvuwv9hy6P3DzpS56x1WveAYCuG9vxEHQHvz7QO0vkNv6QByo36cK9xB-J5L1_egZUaxWBOoYvScd08vXUEe4VbcHyBs_hg7j2EjVdeP7yVGhas1AOE8DdmtO5MVK3VxKN5ZTzB7BNPQYYvxA%3D%3D)** Here's the thing. As it now stands, 100% of Californians are being forced to live with:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
That's what led me to enter this race. **[And that's why I'm urging you to join me by rushing me your GARVEY FOR SENATE Campaign R.S.V.P. without delay.](http://links.freeliberty.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=b9498dffa35242ba8c9d4e4faa65b78e&_e=_9tqp_8UD5cwtfZyYfMOu10ubsYvoF4n1IFz06tKt9b_cyzRyMTNJzVW91KUmVYibnNCs89fFoKMV6SQjKoYQg7ulE_iSivbTHBMOFzodOYCWvhuMcuw9xudre20pe49wuMXpfWWR59UD_h3sKO4HWQ-rYolBOxzz_RYGB75TinPql5XzviY1FjZ8Wi8ZVe83OLRLru5ohFXF_bpEPOYS0zl55pd84p1ifYz3zrOdQn2qjcUptgZiCRbyaf6dkydgngVBdB2AOQwFqA4Kv9MKRLN4VFKNAza4axz8hWNBseJxdGL8in96knSbc8848E8C7TwZE48arn2b-v2NSVhL7_6cEWmw1MT5xmNQz7SgUQODqaKEPtOQFtbbQ6_y7J9tbLhK_z11eYpbgNsc3U5oA%3D%3D)** I get up every day and ask God to give me the strength to make a difference in people's lives. This really gets to heart of why I'm running... You see, the same dream and the same opportunity I was given is fading. It's fading all across America. But it's fading at an even faster pace right here in California. I pray you'll stand with me today.

Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate

**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I've been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it's not about the individual; it's about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It's time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.

Fellow Conservative,

**As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle.** Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams.

My name is Tim Sheehy, Republican candidate for U.S. Senate from Montana. You probably don't know me, or if you do, likely from emails like this one. I’m a former U.S. Navy SEAL and a 2008 Naval Academy graduate. Right now, I'm the only person standing in the way of Chuck Schumer and his Senate majority.

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Never eat almonds, spinach and peanut butter (Here's why)
body:
Untitled Document

Please read the following message
from our sponsor.

If you've been led to believe
that peanut butter, almonds and spinach are good for you, today's
email might shock you and is important to read, because these 3
healthy foods could be contributing to health problems in your
body.

Let's take a quick look at why...

1. Peanut butter

While peanut butter does contain
a small amount of protein and vitamins/minerals, the cons
outweigh the pros on this food.

First of all, peanuts contain one
of the highest concentrations of aflatoxin, which is a mold toxin
that is created in peanuts due to storage in moist conditions.

Peanut butter is also very high
in inflammatory omega-6 fats and due to the processing of peanut
butter, those omega 6 fats are in a harmful oxidized state.

Most people already get too much
omega 6 fats from vegetable oils (soy, corn, canola, etc), and
this contributes to insulin resistance, heart disease, brain
inflammation, cancer, and lots more health problems, since most
people are currently eating 5-10x more omega-6 fats than we
should be eating in a healthy diet.

Lastly, peanut butter also
contains medium amounts of oxalates, which are plant-based
antinutrients that when consumed in excess can contribute to
kidney stones, thyroid and gut problems, joint problems and more.

We'll talk more about oxalates in
the next food...

2. Spinach

Spinach is promoted as a healthy
green, but contains FAR more downsides than good sides. Spinach
is one of the highest oxalate foods that's commonly eaten by
modern humans (in addition to beet greens, beets, almonds, and
other veggies and nuts).

The amount of oxalates in a
serving of spinach is extremely high, up to 600 mg in a normal
sized bowl.

The "safe" amount of oxalates in
a daily diet according to world renowned oxalate expert Sally
Norton should be between 100-200 mg per day total to avoid a lot
of the health problems caused by high oxalate plants.

So, you can see how concerning
spinach is with the extremely high oxalate levels.

As mentioned above, eating too
much oxalates too frequently can cause serious issues such as
kidney stones, thyroid problems, gut damage, skin issues, and
joint pain.

In fact, some people have even
gotten "oxalate poisoning" by eating green smoothies too often
and had to go to the ER for kidney failure.

3. Almonds

Although almonds and almond milk
are marketed as healthy, they also contain many downsides,
including all of the negatives mentioned above about too much
omega 6 fats and too much oxalates.

They're probably ok in your diet
occasionally, but I personally avoid eating almonds too often
because of these issues with excess oxalates and omega 6 fats.

Now let's take a look at a fun
little quiz below and a few more foods...

Bananas vs oranges vs apples...
(the #1 WORST fruit for your gut & energy)
According to the best-selling
author and world-renowned heart surgeon, Dr. Steven Gundry,
there's one fruit people over 40 should never eat.

This fruit can damage your gut
and disrupt your hormones. Both sapping you of energy and forcing
your body to create "sticky" fat cells that can NOT be "burned
off" with normal diet and exercise.

Do you know the fruit I'm talking
about? Make sure you do by clicking the one below you think it
is, and get the answer from Dr. Gundry himself on the next page:

>> Bananas

>> Oranges

>> Apples

>> Grapes

comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

Team, this week marked the 51st anniversary of the day the Supreme Court ruled in favor of _Roe v. Wade_ , granting reproductive freedom for all. 51 years later, those same fundamental rights are in jeopardy. And frankly, I’m angry. I’m angry that my daughters and so many other women and girls now live in a world where they have fewer rights than their mothers and grandmothers did. And I’m angry that extreme Republicans are trying to control women to gain political power. But I’m not giving up. And neither can you. If we want to change this — **we need to make our voices heard and act now.** **[If you support my efforts to protect abortion rights in Michigan and around the country, please chip in to Fight Like Hell PAC today to ensure we can support President Biden, Vice President Harris, and pro-choice Democrats up and down the ballot win in 2024.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77854078/451692637/232286791?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20240127_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzA1YzYwZWYtMzJiZC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UEkH5hGMPgLMdPgOS6H1hsAfT08g4Gpx3_lgqtfCgk8=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77854079/451692638/232286791?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20240127_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzA1YzYwZWYtMzJiZC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UEkH5hGMPgLMdPgOS6H1hsAfT08g4Gpx3_lgqtfCgk8=)

I’ve traveled across the state to commemorate the _Roe_ anniversary and warn voters about the fact that our fundamental rights are on the line.
But this fight isn’t just about one day or one week.
**It’s about building a long-term movement that will stand up to extreme Republicans like Donald Trump who want to rip away our rights.**
Extremist Republicans are dead set on passing a national abortion ban in all 50 states including Michigan if they get the chance.
**And the most important thing we can do to stop them is to vote.**
They think that our anger over the _Roe_ decision will eventually subside.
But I have a message for them — **don’t mess with American women.**
We’ve proven time and again in recent years that we will show up as many times as we need to protect our fundamental rights.
**And it’s time to show up again.**
**[Will you donate to Fight Like Hell PAC ahead of our first end-of-month fundraising deadline of 2024 to help us continue to speak to voters about the dangers that Republican extremists pose to our reproductive rights?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77854080/451692639/232286791?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20240127_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzA1YzYwZWYtMzJiZC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UEkH5hGMPgLMdPgOS6H1hsAfT08g4Gpx3_lgqtfCgk8=)**

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Tammy Baldwin is a fierce champion for equality
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
For me, Tammy is an invaluable ally in the Senate because she’ll always take on the hard fights against the powerful to protect the rights and interests of regular folks.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77854394/451693700/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmVmMDA3Ny0zM2JkLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kraJWuNC5Rqtk0QupmbFmflsaWROUNZ-3pDUB2g5ukA=&emci=ed732ccf-71bc-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=cbef0077-33bd-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=7731215)

| | Wisconsin is known for nail-biter elections with razor-thin margins, and 2024 is shaping up to be no different. That's why it's so important that we stand with my good friend Senator Tammy Baldwin in her re-election campaign. **For me, Tammy is an invaluable ally in the Senate because she'll always take on the hard fights against the powerful to protect the rights and interests of regular folks.** She's a fierce champion in the fight to pass the Equality Act, got the Respect for Marriage Act across the finish line, and is the reason insurance companies can't deny coverage for "pre-existing conditions." That's why it's so important that we stand with my good friend Senator Tammy Baldwin in her re-election campaign. For me, Tammy is an invaluable ally in the Senate because she'll always take on the hard fights against the powerful to protect the rights and interests of regular folks. She's a fierce champion in the fight to pass the Equality Act, got the Respect for Marriage Act across the finish line, and is the reason insurance companies can't deny coverage for "pre-existing conditions." | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care.

For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors.

Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights.

subject: Urgent: Help Bernie Sanders Save Social Security!

body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Social Security is a lifeline for over 66 million Americans. That's 1 in
every 5 of us – grandparents, veterans, persons with disabilities, and
retirees who have spent a lifetime contributing to our nation’s fabric.

But Extreme Republicans are pushing for cuts to Social Security
jeopardizing the well-being of millions. Their actions aren’t just
political moves; they are direct attacks on the livelihoods of countless
Americans who rely on this program for survival.

Senator Bernie Sanders is stepping forward with a groundbreaking bill to
protect this critical safety net. Bernie’s plan will ensure Social
Security's solvency for the next 75 years and expand benefits by $2,400 a
year.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14276?source=email-20240127-th&t=1011&akid=5252%2E5885482%2EbrHD01 ]Join us in this crucial moment and call on Congress to support Bernie’s
bill. Together, we can secure a future where Social Security continues to
be the bedrock of American retirement.

name: Team Pramila
subject: Buy and lie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
The GOP lacks people-power.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240127-3439-footer&t=1&akid=3439%2E420207%2EGtzi94)
Peter,
What’s one thing that Republicans, super PACs, and billionaire megadonors all have in common? **They lack grassroots people-power.**
**Republican special interest groups believe they can buy and lie their way to victory on election day.**
**They have the Super PACs – but we have the people. That’s exactly who Pramila fights for every day in Congress and in communities across the country.**
**In November, it will be our people-power against Republican dark money. In order to win, we need you with us.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jim=20Walsh?=
subject: Defend Texas = Defend Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Governor Greg Abbott and the leaders of Texas are defending our country from the surge of fentanyl and gang-related crimes that are pouring in.

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

name: NextGen America
subject: Education has never been more valuable
body:
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77855061/451694800/240436357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjM1NmU3Mi0zNGJkLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uu4gi0OS-pXxttJ2v70hW2KY_otp0NXoAQ82U4FzrLw=&emci=e395b79b-2eba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&emdi=36356e72-34bd-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=6787172) It should go without saying, folks, but _**education is a human right.**_ Everyone benefits when everyone, regardless of background or income, has access to a high-quality education. It’s that simple. But all over the country, book bans are making front-page news. A small group of extremist nutjobs are leading the charge to ban books about racial justice, LGBTQ+ stories, and accurate U.S. history. **From January to August of last year, there were attempts to censor over 1,900 library book titles across the country.** Enough is enough, folks. [We’re sick of these wackadoos cutting off valuable educational resources. Will you stand with us and let your state legislators know it’s time to put an end to senseless book bans?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77855062/451694801/926317143?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjM1NmU3Mi0zNGJkLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uu4gi0OS-pXxttJ2v70hW2KY_otp0NXoAQ82U4FzrLw=&emci=e395b79b-2eba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&emdi=36356e72-34bd-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=6787172) | [I’m in: Put a stop to book bans →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77855063/451694802/-639766798?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjM1NmU3Mi0zNGJkLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uu4gi0OS-pXxttJ2v70hW2KY_otp0NXoAQ82U4FzrLw=&emci=e395b79b-2eba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&emdi=36356e72-34bd-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=6787172)
---
Book bans are _never_ remembered well in history. Let’s work to put an end to them before it’s too late.
Do you have a favorite banned book? **[Let us know here.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77855064/451694803/2089116557?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjM1NmU3Mi0zNGJkLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uu4gi0OS-pXxttJ2v70hW2KY_otp0NXoAQ82U4FzrLw=&emci=e395b79b-2eba-ee11-bea1-002248223848&emdi=36356e72-34bd-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=6787172)** The NextGen team loves _The Hate U Give_ by Angie Thomas and _The Kite Runner_ by Khaled Hosseini.
Thanks for standing with us,
NextGen America

San Francisco, CA 94104 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | [unsubscribe](https://secure.everyaction.com/p/55prEtOmTkiIrUiDBK7vNQ2?unsubscribedata=%2F7tVL7bj6tATSjtKrnxSB6ErcMqaoOS206GzOCV95u2jMejXQoZ82VjbTDJyPWoc7UpRXPBGup6YtQhFpQdiLk6HLr8EMXE88LR01dHQ4gt1qYC4LY%2FPCiW4217gDkpk8Rdd1BhHWz80hN1O0hBzgCsIHKNsai8%2B6I3t6Zdrgr6JmWEYY03Th%2FRQz1y1Fv%2FiwTp%2B3KKzEm0SRmGdkmQoTPyXfY8rrbbCIWd7NDAiJsXQfFhIIF%2BobSzqaY%2FWTuSiosR6imd2GM6iAnQ0zA28rkFJGxWgmb9FojTfmM5Fc7ElxEUInB%2FF6vZY99h6NfmkKbcCTLPOOKJwZmpUYOhMZK8cgvZAX%2BxLXqK9moH3cTW4%2FH4VRqP0ElhniTw64Q8xxylNiLRercJs7QXUOVM9ptNfYhmg%2BMdDS%2F22dwRrOPc%3D)

body:
| CNN’s first ratings of 2024 are here:
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1911%2E35263%2EaMseel)
Peter — CNN’s first Senate ratings came out, and they have Wisconsin as one of the most likely states to flip **red** this year. **[Will you rush in a donation to help Tammy Baldwin keep Wisconsin’s toss-up Senate seat blue and defend our Democratic majority?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jan24.HgOSTk&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20240127_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1911%2E35263%2EaMseel)** | [DONATE NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jan24.HgOSTk&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20240127_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1911%2E35263%2EaMseel)
---
Election experts and outlets like CNN agree that Tammy Baldwin is one of the **most vulnerable senators** on the ballot this year.
Republicans only need to flip one more seat to secure the Senate majority, so there’s a lot riding on Wisconsin this year.
With Senate Republicans’ hand-picked megamillionaire, Eric Hovde, gearing up to launch his Senate campaign, our campaign soon could be overwhelmed by a flood of GOP spending and attack ads.
Tammy’s counting on your early support to fight back — so we’re asking:

name: =?utf-8?Q?Max=20Ukropina?=
subject: Admitting a hard truth
body:
Peter, I admitted a hard truth the other day to a group of conservative patriots. I'm going to tell you exactly what I told them.

Politicians from both parties - including Republicans - have been lying to us for a long time. They say one thing to us when they want our votes but become complacent in Washington.

Here's the truth: Republicans who are complacent are complicit in the problem.

I'm 36 years old. I love my country, but our border is being overrun. Our cost-of-living is unaffordable. Our national debt is in a tailspin.

I'm sorry, but I don't have time to be complacent.

Do you?

I'm running for Congress because I believe our Republican leaders need to act with URGENCY and BOLDNESS in everything they do!

We need more America First patriots in Washington willing to stand up and say enough is enough.

If you agree that we need new leadership, I have just one request for you:

ADD YOUR NAME and ENDORSE my campaign for Congress and join our movement to bring America First leadership to Washington! (https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/vote-pledge?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=Complacent_Endorse_12724)

ENDORSE MAX FOR CONGRESS (https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/vote-pledge?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=Complacent_Endorse_12724)
There are just 41 days until the March 5 Primary Election. We need to know we have as many conservative patriots standing with us as possible.

Thank you and God bless America,

Max Ukropina
https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/gotv-fund?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=Complacenet_GOTVFund_12724

or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=77339c80b8&e=86e91e802d&c=e08fdc5a76)

They attack Biden by making up conspiracies and a baseless impeachment sham. They spread lies about the 2020 presidential election. body:
He just DESTROYED the GOP over their impeachment plot:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/60420?t=6&akid=12598%2E878179%2Eht62YM) Jamie Raskin is a HERO! He’s one of the TOP Democrats fighting to end the MAGA mob’s impeachment scheme — and he’s not backing down.

[**The GOP is hell-bent on SILENCING Raskin, so we need a SURGE of support from folks like you to show we have his back! HURRY: ADD YOUR NAME BY MIDNIGHT to thank Rep. Jamie Raskin »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/60421?t=7&akid=12598%2E878179%2Eht62YM) | [YOUR ONLY CHANCE TO SIGN: CHIP IN $3 TO ADD YOUR NAME NOW »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/60421?t=8&akid=12598%2E878179%2Eht62YM)
---
TO: Rep. Jamie Raskin
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: You’re a hero! **_To Rep. Jamie Raskin — thank you for being one of the top defenders of our democracy!_**

We owe _so much_ of our Democratic success this year to you.

You were a crucial figure in averting the disastrous government shutdown (twice!). You called out the GOP for electing extremist Speaker Mike Johnson.

**And now, you’re fighting tooth and nail to save President Biden from a baseless impeachment — even in the face of vile MAGA attacks.**

[**I know Republicans are using every dirty trick in the book to SILENCE you — So today, I’m fighting back and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to elect more amazing Democrats like you who will flip the House and save our democracy! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/60421?t=9&akid=12598%2E878179%2Eht62YM) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/60420?t=10&akid=12598%2E878179%2Eht62YM)

**_X A proud Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=12598%2E878179%2Eht62YM). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=12598%2E878179%2Eht62YM).**

name: Emma Dillon, Team Lucas Kunce
subject: $5 today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
It may not seem like much, but here’s why it makes such a big impact.
#
$5 may not seem like much, Peter, but small-dollar donations make a big impact on our grassroots campaign. **Here’s why:**
**[DONATE $5 NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43189?refcode=em20240127-4690&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5&t=1&akid=4690%2E614464%2Er2NOZ5)**
1. **Lucas is committed to running this campaign the right way** — with $0 from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, Big Oil or Big Pharma execs. That means our movement to defeat Josh Hawley and flip this Senate seat is entirely powered by real people like you.
2. **Every $1 in Missouri goes nearly 5x further than in Texas or Florida.** With smaller media markets and less voters to contact, Missouri’s U.S. Senate race is our most affordable chance to flip a GOP-held seat in 2024.
3. **Josh Hawley is _seriously_ vulnerable.** After his actions on January 6th, Hawley made himself the most unpopular GOP incumbent running for re-election this cycle. Reports last year even showed “increasingly negative sentiment” about Hawley growing among Missouri voters.
4. **Lucas’ unifying message is winning over voters across the state.** Over the last year, we’ve been able to hold Hawley accountable and reach voters with Lucas’ election-winning message — and it’s working.
5. **Now, multiple polls show Lucas and Hawley in a _statistical tie._** This grassroots movement has already managed to put this race in a dead heat, but we can’t stop there. If we’re going to help Lucas take the lead, we can’t afford to lose any of our grassroots momentum.

**This is our chance to defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat — and grassroots support from real people like you is the only way we’ll be able to make it happen.**
**[So Peter, will you chip in $5 or more toward our goal of raising $300,000 online before the end of this month? While Hawley relies on DC insiders and corporate elites to power his campaign, we’re depending on everyday people like you to keep fueling this people-powered movement.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43189?refcode=em20240127-4690&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4690%2E614464%2Er2NOZ5)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43190?refcode=em20240127-4690&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=3&akid=4690%2E614464%2Er2NOZ5) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43190?refcode=em20240127-4690&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=4&akid=4690%2E614464%2Er2NOZ5) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43190?refcode=em20240127-4690&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=4690%2E614464%2Er2NOZ5) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43190?refcode=em20240127-4690&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=4690%2E614464%2Er2NOZ5) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43190?refcode=em20240127-4690&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=4690%2E614464%2Er2NOZ5) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43190?refcode=em20240127-4690&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=4690%2E614464%2Er2NOZ5) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43189?refcode=em20240127-4690&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=4690%2E614464%2Er2NOZ5)

Thank you,
Emma Dillon
Team Lucas Kunce

name: Qasim Rashid
subject: It’s on all of us to demand justice
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY QASIM FOR CONGRESS]
body:
[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/9?t=1001&akid=35150%2E120265%2ELABqr7 ]Qasim for Congress

Friend,

As innocent people continue to be killed in Gaza, and South Africa
continues its case against Israel in the Hague, it’s important that we
keep doing everything we can to address this humanitarian crisis.

I have always believed that the path to peace is diplomacy—not war. And
that’s why I have called for a ceasefire, an immediate release of all
hostages, and an end to the occupation and settlements, from Day 1.

Sadly, my opponent Bill Foster still refuses to call for a ceasefire, and
instead, accepts donations from defense contractors as innocent people are
killed.

As this crisis nears its fourth month, it’s on all of us to demand
justice. [ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/sign/QR-IL-11_EMAIL_270124_ENG_Ceasefire/?t=1002&akid=35150%2E120265%2ELABqr7 ]Will you add your name to my petition to call for an immediate
ceasefire in Gaza? If elected officials like Foster refuse to call for an
end to the violence, it’s on us to do it.

ADD YOUR NAME

We need leaders with the courage to demand justice in all matters. That’s
what I’ve done as a human rights lawyer for over a decade, and that is my
commitment to you as your next Congressman in Illinois District 11.

[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/sign/QR-IL-11_EMAIL_270124_ENG_Ceasefire/?t=1003&akid=35150%2E120265%2ELABqr7 ]Add your name right now to stand with me in calling for a ceasefire
because innocent people are suffering and dying, and justice can't wait.

In solidarity,
Qasim

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.qasimforcongress.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1004&akid=35150%2E120265%2ELABqr7
Update Your Information: https://act.qasimforcongress.org/signup/update-your-info/
Unsubscribe: https://act.qasimforcongress.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=35150%2E120265%2ELABqr7

[PAID FOR BY QASIM FOR CONGRESS]

subject: Meat Warning
body:
[View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kM1OAyEUhZ_msusELgy0CxbaBhdNTEwX6pIBpkVBpszUSd_edKxu7893vhybhxT7qwb1CIin6EdABP4AiOf3OdfLR94_rXaWrc7yObe3JW4BcboO4f_yDmlCtjHdpmpHvOa9p4IEzRSVXEkpNuSkveSd5b3zigUphG-t4J20iivbtb4TJGqkKChDxRSuxaZpg3IWJe9d8LRfUxB0yWlsDjU6y8ZptrWWkhtXMkn6NE3DuIgZQDPX0nxdXAqX8ffNlQxo7sqA5hvQuPPr5_blcDBvwM1SAt_tCzscg2Skaj_MMaU4SgWCHv8oPwEAAP__EWpgDg)

# HIGH ALERT: Shocking Meat Shortages Are Coming – Prepare Now
**The USDA predicts meat production shortages for the first time since 2014, and the U.N. warns of "an unprecedented global hunger crisis".** Which means 2 dangerous things for you: 1\. Higher prices at the grocery store
2\. Less meat available That's why meat must be a vital part of your survival food stockpile. But there is a catch. Not all protein is created equal. And this is so critical to understand, especially in a crisis. See, your protein needs to meet 4 critical requirements: It needs to: Last a while
Taste great
Store without refrigeration
Can't break the bank **Spoiler alert: most protein options fall short!** Take peanut butter. Sure, most people see it as a survival food protein staple. But did you know most cans are full of added sugars? Plus, they don't last more than a few months. A year tops. Grocery store meat doesn't work either. First, it's expensive. If you've been to the grocery store recently, you know what I'm talking about. Meat prices are up big time over the past year. But it also needs to be refrigerated. So if a blackout hits and cuts power to your home, you might as well use it as a paperweight. But don't worry friend. **There is a protein option that checks all four boxes:** This option is guaranteed to last at least 5 years. It doesn't need to be refrigerated. And it come with an easy payment plan so it won't break the bank. And most importantly, it tastes delicious! **Introducing for the first time ever...** [**The BRAND NEW Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit!**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsjj1v4zAMhn8NvdmgqC9n0JA7w4dDkW4dOgWKJCdqrNqRlQb594WDtlNHvu9D8rFpHuNwN6D_ANEp-gWIgG-B6PJ6S_n6lp7-1Z1l9UU9J7mW9BeIyn0OP-TXkSYkG8c11V3lDR88iioYplFxrZTYVCdDnAVhDy5I2VrhD4ph22qmgwwSpbJVNIQkkJFmmlqxaWTQzpLigwsehxZB4ONPY1PI0Vm2lJvNeZpS46ZUjeZUyrw8xHqgXswlnwnXDqh3Y3Rn4H3JH9ED7xgXjAGpbf-_W0fcSCBlh2G_XA9r0HKsv4XqBZEc4rpwLWnvbJptPL4D7152u_p3tsrGz7c4jnFRGgQeH-5uSp8BAAD__7ZYa8Q) [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsjj1v4zAMhn8NvdmgqC9n0JA7w4dDkW4dOgWKJCdqrNqRlQb594WDtlNHvu9D8rFpHuNwN6D_ANEp-gWIgG-B6PJ6S_n6lp7-1Z1l9UU9J7mW9BeIyn0OP-TXkSYkG8c11V3lDR88iioYplFxrZTYVCdDnAVhDy5I2VrhD4ph22qmgwwSpbJVNIQkkJFmmlqxaWTQzpLigwsehxZB4ONPY1PI0Vm2lJvNeZpS46ZUjeZUyrw8xHqgXswlnwnXDqh3Y3Rn4H3JH9ED7xgXjAGpbf-_W0fcSCBlh2G_XA9r0HKsv4XqBZEc4rpwLWnvbJptPL4D7152u_p3tsrGz7c4jnFRGgQeH-5uSp8BAAD__7ZYa8Q) **And[right here on this page](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsjj1v4zAMhn8NvdmgqC9n0JA7w4dDkW4dOgWKJCdqrNqRlQb594WDtlNHvu9D8rFpHuNwN6D_ANEp-gWIgG-B6PJ6S_n6lp7-1Z1l9UU9J7mW9BeIyn0OP-TXkSYkG8c11V3lDR88iioYplFxrZTYVCdDnAVhDy5I2VrhD4ph22qmgwwSpbJVNIQkkJFmmlqxaWTQzpLigwsehxZB4ONPY1PI0Vm2lJvNeZpS46ZUjeZUyrw8xHqgXswlnwnXDqh3Y3Rn4H3JH9ED7xgXjAGpbf-_W0fcSCBlh2G_XA9r0HKsv4XqBZEc4rpwLWnvbJptPL4D7152u_p3tsrGz7c4jnFRGgQeH-5uSp8BAAD__7ZYa8Q), you can score an introductory price plus some amazing FREE gifts.** Now, there is one thing you should know. Every time we've offered meat in the past, we've SOLD OUT. So when people find out about this brand-NEW Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit, we could see a huge rush. I don't want to alarm you, but there are no IOUs or rain checks on this meat kit. It's first-come, first-served. So if you're going to reserve your kit, **[you need to act fast](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsjj1v4zAMhn8NvdmgqC9n0JA7w4dDkW4dOgWKJCdqrNqRlQb594WDtlNHvu9D8rFpHuNwN6D_ANEp-gWIgG-B6PJ6S_n6lp7-1Z1l9UU9J7mW9BeIyn0OP-TXkSYkG8c11V3lDR88iioYplFxrZTYVCdDnAVhDy5I2VrhD4ph22qmgwwSpbJVNIQkkJFmmlqxaWTQzpLigwsehxZB4ONPY1PI0Vm2lJvNeZpS46ZUjeZUyrw8xHqgXswlnwnXDqh3Y3Rn4H3JH9ED7xgXjAGpbf-_W0fcSCBlh2G_XA9r0HKsv4XqBZEc4rpwLWnvbJptPL4D7152u_p3tsrGz7c4jnFRGgQeH-5uSp8BAAD__7ZYa8Q)**. For starters, you get 5 meat options. Chicken, beef, pork, turkey and ground beef. So you aren't stuck with 1 or 2 types of protein. And the variety means you can use it in a ton of recipes. Chicken salad, burgers, tacos, you name it. **You're in control, not the stock boy at the grocery store.** Plus, you can actually pronounce the ingredients that we use. That's because there are only 2. Meat, of course, and salt for preservation. That's it! No funky chemicals. No artificial gunk. The only things in your food are food. [**Get Your Brand New, Delicious Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit!**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsjj1v4zAMhn8NvdmgqC9n0JA7w4dDkW4dOgWKJCdqrNqRlQb594WDtlNHvu9D8rFpHuNwN6D_ANEp-gWIgG-B6PJ6S_n6lp7-1Z1l9UU9J7mW9BeIyn0OP-TXkSYkG8c11V3lDR88iioYplFxrZTYVCdDnAVhDy5I2VrhD4ph22qmgwwSpbJVNIQkkJFmmlqxaWTQzpLigwsehxZB4ONPY1PI0Vm2lJvNeZpS46ZUjeZUyrw8xHqgXswlnwnXDqh3Y3Rn4H3JH9ED7xgXjAGpbf-_W0fcSCBlh2G_XA9r0HKsv4XqBZEc4rpwLWnvbJptPL4D7152u_p3tsrGz7c4jnFRGgQeH-5uSp8BAAD__7ZYa8Q) Now, you may be wondering how we guarantee such a long shelf life for canned foods. It comes from our special, old-fashioned retort canning process. **We use small-batch retorts to cook your meat right inside the can.** That means 2 important things. First, your meat is slow cooked, so it retains all its natural juices and flavor. And it's ready to go right out of the can. And second, it kills off any germs in the can that might harm the shelf life. Sometimes, the old-fashioned way is the right way. And guess what? This is all done right here in the US of A. Our survival meats are home raised here in the states. So you know exactly where your food comes from. **And as a family-owned, American business, we take a lot of pride in that.** [**Get Your Brand New, Delicious Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit!**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsjj1v4zAMhn8NvdmgqC9n0JA7w4dDkW4dOgWKJCdqrNqRlQb594WDtlNHvu9D8rFpHuNwN6D_ANEp-gWIgG-B6PJ6S_n6lp7-1Z1l9UU9J7mW9BeIyn0OP-TXkSYkG8c11V3lDR88iioYplFxrZTYVCdDnAVhDy5I2VrhD4ph22qmgwwSpbJVNIQkkJFmmlqxaWTQzpLigwsehxZB4ONPY1PI0Vm2lJvNeZpS46ZUjeZUyrw8xHqgXswlnwnXDqh3Y3Rn4H3JH9ED7xgXjAGpbf-_W0fcSCBlh2G_XA9r0HKsv4XqBZEc4rpwLWnvbJptPL4D7152u_p3tsrGz7c4jnFRGgQeH-5uSp8BAAD__7ZYa8Q) Look friend, there's no better time to claim your Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit than now. Meat is one of the first things to go in a crisis. Wildfires, hurricanes, cyberattacks or something else. And the last thing I want for you is to miss out. Or worse, leave you and your family stuck with a subpar protein option. Here at 4Patriots, our mission is to champion freedom and self-reliance for all Americans. **And with everything going on in the world, it's clear that survival food is no longer a luxury. It's a necessity.** Ask anyone who's lived through a crisis. There's no warning. You won't see a big billboard that says "emergency coming in 5 days! Stock up before then." Disasters come out of nowhere. And if you aren't prepared when it hits, it's too late. I mean, just imagine standing in line at your local supermarket. Shelves picked bare. And the people who didn't prepare scrambling and hoarding what little food they can find. All while you pray there's a sliver of meat left for you and your family. **This doesn't have to be you, friend. You can choose a different path.** When storms come knocking at your door, you can stay safely inside with your loved ones. You'll feel great knowing you and your family have delicious shelf-stable meat ready to go. And trust me, the peace of mind that comes with that, feels incredible. [**Get Your Brand New, Delicious Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit!**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsjj1v4zAMhn8NvdmgqC9n0JA7w4dDkW4dOgWKJCdqrNqRlQb594WDtlNHvu9D8rFpHuNwN6D_ANEp-gWIgG-B6PJ6S_n6lp7-1Z1l9UU9J7mW9BeIyn0OP-TXkSYkG8c11V3lDR88iioYplFxrZTYVCdDnAVhDy5I2VrhD4ph22qmgwwSpbJVNIQkkJFmmlqxaWTQzpLigwsehxZB4ONPY1PI0Vm2lJvNeZpS46ZUjeZUyrw8xHqgXswlnwnXDqh3Y3Rn4H3JH9ED7xgXjAGpbf-_W0fcSCBlh2G_XA9r0HKsv4XqBZEc4rpwLWnvbJptPL4D7152u_p3tsrGz7c4jnFRGgQeH-5uSp8BAAD__7ZYa8Q) [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsjj1v4zAMhn8NvdmgqC9n0JA7w4dDkW4dOgWKJCdqrNqRlQb594WDtlNHvu9D8rFpHuNwN6D_ANEp-gWIgG-B6PJ6S_n6lp7-1Z1l9UU9J7mW9BeIyn0OP-TXkSYkG8c11V3lDR88iioYplFxrZTYVCdDnAVhDy5I2VrhD4ph22qmgwwSpbJVNIQkkJFmmlqxaWTQzpLigwsehxZB4ONPY1PI0Vm2lJvNeZpS46ZUjeZUyrw8xHqgXswlnwnXDqh3Y3Rn4H3JH9ED7xgXjAGpbf-_W0fcSCBlh2G_XA9r0HKsv4XqBZEc4rpwLWnvbJptPL4D7152u_p3tsrGz7c4jnFRGgQeH-5uSp8BAAD__7ZYa8Q) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we are able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Joseph L.**
"I buy a lot of stuff at Wal-mart, but this is gonna out-do the stuff on Wal-mart shelves, which contains all kinds of preservatives. I did a taste test even though I've never found a bad product from 4Patriots. Hamburger Helper can kiss my butt – this stuff here is good! (Maybe not as good as my wife's cooking.) This is a good buy." **Danielle M.
4Patriots Employee**
"I was surprised at how good everything in the Ultimate Meat Medley really was. As an avid cook, I have high standards; I worried it might be salty or dried out. What I discovered was moist chicken and turkey that shreds easily for the fastest chicken salad ever or super fast BBQ turkey sammies. The pork and beef are in perfect chucks for adding to stews or burritos. Even the ground beef, which I could not envision being delicious, tasted just like the ground beef I typically brown and drain, but in zero time! This box is definitely going to become my "oh shoot, I forgot to thaw a meat" solution for everyday and I'll have to grab more to store." **Michael M.**
"My family won't be asking, "where's the meat when disaster comes." I bought the Meat Medley so we have beef, pork, chicken, turkey and ground beef to supplement our food stock. I was very pleasantly surprised at the amount of meat at the price I paid. My order arrived quickly and now I know I'll have the right answer when my family ask "where’s the meat"." **Ernest K.**
"It's a must have item for your food prep. inventory. Great as a companion item for some of the other items for added protein." clean_body: HIGH ALERT: Shocking Meat Shortages Are Coming – Prepare Now The USDA predicts meat production shortages for the first time since 2014, and the U.N. warns of "an unprecedented global hunger crisis". Which means 2 dangerous things for you: 1\. Higher prices at the grocery store 2\. Less meat available That's why meat must be a vital part of your survival food stockpile. But there is a catch. Not all protein is created equal. And this is so critical to understand, especially in a crisis. See, your protein needs to meet 4 critical requirements: It needs to: Last a while Taste great Store without refrigeration Can't break the bank Spoiler alert: most protein options fall short! Take peanut butter. Sure, most people see it as a survival food protein staple. But did you know most cans are full of added sugars? Plus, they don't last more than a few months. A year tops. Grocery store meat doesn't work either. First, it's expensive. If you've been to the grocery store recently, you know what I'm talking about. Meat prices are up big time over the past year. But it also needs to be refrigerated. So if a blackout hits and cuts power to your home, you might as well use it as a paperweight. But don't worry friend. There is a protein option that checks all four boxes: This option is guaranteed to last at least 5 years. It doesn't need to be refrigerated. And it come with an easy payment plan so it won't break the bank. And most importantly, it tastes delicious! Introducing for the first time ever... And, you can score an introductory price plus some amazing FREE gifts. Now, there is one thing you should know. Every time we've offered meat in the past, we've SOLD OUT. So when people find out about this brand-NEW Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit, we could see a huge rush. I don't want to alarm you, but there are no IOUs or rain checks on this meat kit. It's first-come, first-served. So if you're going to reserve your kit, . For starters, you get 5 meat options. Chicken, beef, pork, turkey and ground beef. So you aren't stuck with 1 or 2 types of protein. And the variety means you can use it in a ton of recipes. Chicken salad, burgers, tacos, you name it. You're in control, not the stock boy at the grocery store. Plus, you can actually pronounce the ingredients that we use. That's because there are only 2. Meat, of course, and salt for preservation. That's it! No funky chemicals. No artificial gunk. The only things in your food are food. Now, you may be wondering how we guarantee such a long shelf life for canned foods. It comes from our special, old-fashioned retort canning process. We use small-batch retorts to cook your meat right inside the can. That means 2 important things. First, your meat is slow cooked, so it retains all its natural juices and flavor. And it's ready to go right out of the can. And second, it kills off any germs in the can that might harm the shelf life. Sometimes, the old-fashioned way is the right way. And guess what? This is all done right here in the US of A. Our survival meats are home raised here in the states. So you know exactly where your food comes from. And as a family-owned, American business, we take a lot of pride in that. Look friend, there's no better time to claim your Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit than now. Meat is one of the first things to go in a crisis. Wildfires, hurricanes, cyberattacks or something else. And the last thing I want for you is to miss out. Or worse, leave you and your family stuck with a subpar protein option. Here at 4Patriots, our mission is to champion freedom and self-reliance for all Americans. And with everything going on in the world, it's clear that survival food is no longer a luxury. It's a necessity. Ask anyone who's lived through a crisis. There's no warning. You won't see a big billboard that says "emergency coming in 5 days! Stock up before then." Disasters come out of nowhere. And if you aren't prepared when it hits, it's too late. I mean, just imagine standing in line at your local supermarket. Shelves picked bare. And the people who didn't prepare scrambling and hoarding what little food they can find. All while you pray there's a sliver of meat left for you and your family. This doesn't have to be you, friend. You can choose a different path. When storms come knocking at your door, you can stay safely inside with your loved ones. You'll feel great knowing you and your family have delicious shelf-stable meat ready to go. And trust me, the peace of mind that comes with that, feels incredible. To your survival, Frank Bates Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we are able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. More Raving Customer Reviews! Joseph L. "I buy a lot of stuff at Wal-mart, but this is gonna out-do the stuff on Wal-mart shelves, which contains all kinds of preservatives. I did a taste test even though I've never found a bad product from 4Patriots. Hamburger Helper can kiss my butt – this stuff here is good! (Maybe not as good as my wife's cooking.) This is a good buy." Danielle M. 4Patriots Employee "I was surprised at how good everything in the Ultimate Meat Medley really was. As an avid cook, I have high standards; I worried it might be salty or dried out. What I discovered was moist chicken and turkey that shreds easily for the fastest chicken salad ever or super fast BBQ turkey sammies. The pork and beef are in perfect chucks for adding to stews or burritos. Even the ground beef, which I could not envision being delicious, tasted just like the ground beef I typically brown and drain, but in zero time! This box is definitely going to become my "oh shoot, I forgot to thaw a meat" solution for everyday and I'll have to grab more to store." Michael M. "My family won't be asking, "where's the meat when disaster comes." I bought the Meat Medley so we have beef, pork, chicken, turkey and ground beef to supplement our food stock. I was very pleasantly surprised at the amount of meat at the price I paid. My order arrived quickly and now I know I'll have the right answer when my family ask "where’s the meat"." Ernest K. "It's a must have item for your food prep. inventory. Great as a companion item for some of the other items for added protein."

name: Juanjo at United We Dream Action
subject: This is blatantly unconstitutional
body:
Regardless of Governor Abbott's opinion on what the law should be, the fact remains that migrants have the right to seek asylum at our border. | | | Peter, The Justice Department recently announced that they’re suing Texas and Governor Greg Abbott — _again_.
Governor Abbot and Republicans in Texas are continuing to politicize our border. This time, they’re passing and signing legislation that allows police anywhere in the state to arrest migrants _and_ give judges the authority to order them to leave the country. **Let’s be clear — this is blatantly unconstitutional.** Migrants have the right to seek asylum at our border, regardless of what Gov. Abbot _thinks_ the law should be. But he along with Texas Republicans have made it perfectly clear that they are willing to use undocumented immigrants as pawns to score political points and raise their national profiles. **Peter, their blatant disregard for the law and the human rights of migrants makes them unfit to lead this state.** Our immigrant communities want dignity and respect, but Governor Abbot and Texas Republicans have proven that they’re incapable of providing anything close to the level of leadership that migrants deserve. **So Peter, can we count on you to pitch in to United We Dream Action today to power our work and help us defend our immigrant communities from extremist Texas Republicans who are willing to deny them their human rights to win political points?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP839WsQnMAgK23tZWX-Lv8bYX7pUW7d8rhnm8dS_k39Vup15jrWP8YUQ8YOvqYx7DHeuqJ9BgbSoewQB8ZwIJhgfBkVCudyOrDMglb0OIzOULNtZk0-Syost1qF0a-X-1s1KCy8xdRxGIMS19d93mbjoCNFBwybWA5gTRmfdiDuSSvVsJFl0cUflbRngqM3QnyguRNm7uf99dbEgo_tK08yhurMGXwUjwENgykgU5EMapCGUFefOEdlS1Ftcgn8q2KVrTfofq5df00VgsYLp1e0iCSQ4rTi1Rv1oEUjKrsyoszw_cqjgVSOcRB8aABXVqXpcuVRDCoY13u70jWj2_BiISctyDU5fvRkWdkUSuDYWhTLssDMRndIAx0zkWb0UBn_kGNwfPNqBIxWjvhznNg8Q/43c/-uIr7xj0R1ORh9ns3N8O0w/h0/GO7pbAAPf3jtKQ-JBMFq0GoogVRwmhX5nQXaEZAfuL0)

clean_body: Regardless of Governor Abbott's opinion on what the law should be, the fact remains that migrants have the right to seek asylum at our border. | | | Peter, The Justice Department recently announced that they’re suing Texas and Governor Greg Abbott — again. Governor Abbot and Republicans in Texas are continuing to politicize our border. This time, they’re passing and signing legislation that allows police anywhere in the state to arrest migrants and give judges the authority to order them to leave the country. Let’s be clear — this is blatantly unconstitutional. Migrants have the right to seek asylum at our border, regardless of what Gov. Abbot thinks the law should be. But he along with Texas Republicans have made it perfectly clear that they are willing to use undocumented immigrants as pawns to score political points and raise their national profiles. Peter, their blatant disregard for the law and the human rights of migrants makes them unfit to lead this state. Our immigrant communities want dignity and respect, but Governor Abbot and Texas Republicans have proven that they’re incapable of providing anything close to the level of leadership that migrants deserve. So Peter, can we count on you to pitch in to United We Dream Action today to power our work and help us defend our immigrant communities from extremist Texas Republicans who are willing to deny them their human rights to win political points? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | It’s important that we hold Gov. Abbot accountable for his cruelty towards Texans and immigrants, and we’re glad that the Department of Justice is stepping up to the plate. Your support allows us to continue this important work. Thank you for standing alongside us, Juanjo, United We Dream Action

name: Keir Bradford-Grey
subject: I’ve been at the forefront of driving positive change in our justice system
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEIR FOR AG
body:
As Attorney General, Keir will take on powerful special interests who treat vulnerable people unfairly, from corporate polluters, opioid manufacturers, to predatory lenders. Keir will always fight for fairness, opportunity and justice. I firmly believe that diversity of perspective is not just a buzzword — it’s a real asset in creating effective solutions. | Peter,

If there’s one sentence that sums up our campaign for January so far, it’s this:

**_We are building the momentum we need to Flip CA-47._**

I was humbled to receive the endorsement of the top House Republican in the country when Speaker Mike Johnson backed our campaign.

| [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=2b713e0076&e=8a657725d1)

| We are moving full steam ahead and showing no signs of slowing down, Peter. There is a conservative movement building once again in Orange County, and it’s being driven by everyday folks who just want safer communities and lower prices at the gas pump and grocery store.

And I can tell you this: if we continue at this pace, a historic victory could be in the cards this year. Republicans could take back Orange County and win the most important House seat in America! But it’s going to require your steadfast support. [So thank you in advance for helping us keep up this momentum with a contribution today, and here’s to even more strong months ahead for our campaign!](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=3fb558d93a&e=8a657725d1)

_Scott Baugh_

clean_body: | | | | Peter, If there’s one sentence that sums up our campaign for January so far, it’s this: We are building the momentum we need to Flip CA-47. I was humbled to receive the endorsement of the top House Republican in the country when Speaker Mike Johnson backed our campaign. | | We also announced our 2023 fundraising total that supporters like you helped pool together – a remarkable $1.9 MILLION that will all go towards beating Democrats in CA-47! | | We are moving full steam ahead and showing no signs of slowing down, Peter. There is a conservative movement building once again in Orange County, and it’s being driven by everyday folks who just want safer communities and lower prices at the gas pump and grocery store. And I can tell you this: if we continue at this pace, a historic victory could be in the cards this year. Republicans could take back Orange County and win the most important House seat in America! But it’s going to require your steadfast support. | "KEEP UP THE MOMENTUM!" | "CONTRIBUTE HERE" | Thank you from the bottom of my heart, Scott Baugh | | "Paid for by Scott Baugh for Congress. FEC ID# C00798322" | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2024 Scott Baugh for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: BC4S Finance Update
subject: 3️⃣ Numbers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1821%2E552475%2E2p0dKT)
Peter, we can’t get these numbers off our mind.
**$18,000,000.** That’s how much a super PAC supporting McCormick announced they had raised in just a few short months, and we know that any day, they can use it to start blanketing the airwaves with ads attacking Bob Casey.
**$1,000,000.** That’s how much mega-millionaire David McCormick already gave to his own campaign, and we know he’s able to spend even more to try to flip PA red.
**$24.07.** That’s our average contribution to these emails. When thousands of people who want to see Bob stay in the Senate fighting for Pennsylvania’s families chip in $10 here and $30 there, we’re able to stand up to the GOP.
[**So Peter, can you chip in $24.07 — or any amount — to help re-elect Bob Casey and protect our narrow Democratic majority in the Senate? We wouldn’t ask if it weren’t important.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240127-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240127-1&refcode2=1821_552475_2p0dKT&akid=1821%2E552475%2E2p0dKT)
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240127-1?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240127-1-el&refcode2=1821_552475_2p0dKT&akid=1821%2E552475%2E2p0dKT) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240127-1?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240127-1-el&refcode2=1821_552475_2p0dKT&akid=1821%2E552475%2E2p0dKT) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240127-1?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240127-1-el&refcode2=1821_552475_2p0dKT&akid=1821%2E552475%2E2p0dKT) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240127-1?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240127-1-el&refcode2=1821_552475_2p0dKT&akid=1821%2E552475%2E2p0dKT) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240127-1?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240127-1-el&refcode2=1821_552475_2p0dKT&akid=1821%2E552475%2E2p0dKT) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240127-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240127-1&refcode2=1821_552475_2p0dKT&akid=1821%2E552475%2E2p0dKT)

name: John Padora
subject: first full month of running in a race opposite Lauren Boebert
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
Folks, my team is coming up on our first fundraising deadline of 2024 and I wanted to reach out quickly to ask if you can spare a donation to my campaign to help us hit our $15,000 goal.

I want my children to grow up in a better world than I did. And I want our community to have an actual voice in the Capitol, rather than just a politician looking out for themselves. _**Lauren Boebert would be a disastrous representative for our district**_ , and while it is important to me to keep extremists out of power, I want to do that by offering you a better vision for our future. name: Harry Dunn
subject: Is this America?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Hey team , Harry Dunn here.
This is a tough email to start – how do you talk about one of the darkest days of your life? Not to mention, an irreparable stain on this country's history.
So I guess I'll start with a question. Is this America?
Is attacking Capitol police officers – honest, good people dedicated to protecting and serving democracy – with baseball bats and spears, spraying them with WD-40, calling them hateful slurs – is that America?
Is a President of the United States emboldening a riot on the Capitol, encouraging people threatening to kill former Speaker Nancy Pelosi, former Vice President Mike Pence, who traveled to Washington ready to act on those threats – is that America?
That's not American to me. I believe in an America that protects its people, regardless of their political beliefs. An America that values democracy and those that are chosen to represent it. That's what I believed in while I served as a Capitol police officer during the January 6 insurrection.
If that's the American you believe in, I'm hoping you'll chip in a split donation of $10 or more to Seth Moulton and my campaign for US Congress. I protected this democracy as a Capitol police officer on January 6th and I'm ready to protect it as the next Congressman from MD-03. Please, rush a donation to become a Founding Donor of this campaign: [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Together,
Harry Dunn
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]

clean_body: [] Hey team , Harry Dunn here. This is a tough email to start – how do you talk about one of the darkest days of your life? Not to mention, an irreparable stain on this country's history. So I guess I'll start with a question. Is this America? Is attacking Capitol police officers – honest, good people dedicated to protecting and serving democracy – with baseball bats and spears, spraying them with WD-40, calling them hateful slurs – is that America? Is a President of the United States emboldening a riot on the Capitol, encouraging people threatening to kill former Speaker Nancy Pelosi, former Vice President Mike Pence, who traveled to Washington ready to act on those threats – is that America? That's not American to me. I believe in an America that protects its people, regardless of their political beliefs. An America that values democracy and those that are chosen to represent it. That's what I believed in while I served as a Capitol police officer during the January 6 insurrection. If that's the American you believe in, I'm hoping you'll chip in a split donation of $10 or more to Seth Moulton and my campaign for US Congress. I protected this democracy as a Capitol police officer on January 6th and I'm ready to protect it as the next Congressman from MD-03. Please, rush a donation to become a Founding Donor of this campaign: [] Donate [] Together, Harry Dunn Donate [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: Why we’re supporting Cori Bush for re-election
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Congresswoman Cori Bush just launched her 2024 re-election campaign, and
Justice Democrats is once again proud to support her. Cori is a tireless
advocate for the people of St. Louis and for regular, everyday people all
across our country and world.

We need Cori’s voice in Congress. From advocating for human rights for all
people to working to transform our public safety approach to leading the
push for an immediate and lasting ceasefire in Gaza, Cori has always
prioritized the people’s interests over all else.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240127-cb.ANElU7&refcode=em20240127-33012&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1001&akid=33012%2E1203867%2Ev9pzLq ]Before I go on about why we need to re-elect Cori, can you split a
$3 donation between Justice Democrats and Cori’s campaign
today so that we can continue fighting for regular, everyday people
together?

As someone who’s been unhoused, Cori knows the trauma and violence of
being housing insecure and it informs her policy-making. She led a direct
action on the U.S. Capitol steps to push for the reinstatement of the
federal eviction moratorium in 2021, helping protect 11 million people
from being forced out on the streets during the height of the COVID
pandemic. The combination of the eviction moratorium and emergency rental
assistance programs decreased evictions by 60%. And that’s because of Cori
and our movement’s commitment to saving lives.

Cori’s been working to dismantle white supremacy long before she was first
elected. As a Congresswoman, she’s taken on our broken criminal legal
system which has disproportionately harmed Black and brown communities.
Cori has been paving the path for a better, more holistic approach to
public safety for years. >From introducing the People’s Response Act,
visionary legislation to help end police brutality, and introducing the
End Solitary Confinement Act to end the cruel and torturous practice of
solitary confinement, Cori is leading the way for a better, safer future
for everyone.

And of course, Cori unapologetically stands for peace and humanity. That's
why since October of last year, Cori has been leading the Ceasefire Now
resolution in Congress, a call to action to end the violence in Gaza that
the vast majority of Democratic voters and countries around the world
support. But Cori didn’t advocate for this because of its popularity; she
fought for this because it’s the right thing to do. Our government and
taxpayer dollars should not be supporting mass atrocities anywhere,
including in Gaza or the West Bank.

But standing for Palestinian human rights has come at a cost: $100
million, to be exact. That’s the amount that AIPAC, a right-wing, pro-war
super PAC funded by GOP billionaires is planning on spending against Cori
and other Squad incumbents.

Cori and Justice Democrats don’t take money from corporate PACs because we
are first and foremost accountable to the people, not profits. That means
our work is fueled by people like you,
Peter.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240127-cb.ANElU7&refcode=em20240127-33012&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1002&akid=33012%2E1203867%2Ev9pzLq ]Split a donation between our campaigns today so that we have the
resources to overcome the millions of dollars that right-wing
billionaire-funded super PACs are planning on spending against us.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240127-cb.ANElU7&refcode=em20240127-33012&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1021&akid=33012%2E1203867%2Ev9pzLq ]Contribute $3

Thanks for anything you can give to re-elect Cori and the rest of our
Justice Democrats incumbents this year.

In solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas
Executive Director

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1022&akid=33012%2E1203867%2Ev9pzLq ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1023&akid=33012%2E1203867%2Ev9pzLq ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240127-33012-footer&t=1024&refcode2=33012_1203867_v9pzLq&akid=33012%2E1203867%2Ev9pzLq

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=33012%2E1203867%2Ev9pzLq

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Did you know we’re the _ONLY_ political action committee for kids? Think about that for a second...

There are PACs to protect the planet, PACs to reduce national debt, PACs to protect women’s rights, PACs to fight for animal rights, PACs for credit cards, PACs for tacos, PACs for chickens — but until last year — there wasn’t a single PAC for children.

**_That’s why we started Their Future PAC — to finally give children a voice in Congress._**

**_[Join Their Future PAC now with a donation of $10 or any amount. clean_body: | | | If you'd like to unsubscribe, | | Did you know we’re the ONLY political action committee for kids? Think about that for a second... There are PACs to protect the planet, PACs to reduce national debt, PACs to protect women’s rights, PACs to fight for animal rights, PACs for credit cards, PACs for tacos, PACs for chickens — but until last year — there wasn’t a single PAC for children. That’s why we started Their Future PAC — to finally give children a voice in Congress. So much is at stake this election year: protecting our planet, the child tax credit, common sense gun legislation, protecting our Department of Education, and expanding access to affordable healthcare. But it takes real resources to elect politicians who will put kids first — and with the GOP pouring millions into races all over the country to protect their razor-thin majority in Congress, our endorsed candidates are going to need all of the help they can get. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Until the kids are alright, Renee * | | PAID FOR BY THEIR FUTURE PAC If you need to you can unsubscribe by . | | Sent via . **About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.
