Team,
Did you know that only 13 states and DC provide paid family and medical leave?
Like many of our other key ballot measure policies, paid leave is one area where there is a _major disconnect_ between working people and the elected officials who represent them. Arizona, Colorado, Michigan, Washington, and Texas are all places where we’ve helped get this issue in front of voters, and time and again voters took action to pass the paid leave policies that they needed.
We’re so proud of the work we’ve done to help change the lives of working families in these states, **_but the vast majority of the U.S. still hasn’t enacted paid leave laws._**
**We want to see paid family leave become a universal right across all 50 states.** It’s exactly why we’ve worked alongside voters in 5 states and cities (and are working with two more in 2024) to enact the paid family and medical leave policies they needed _directly at the ballot box._
**But we want to hear from you, team: Should paid family leave be a universal right across all 50 states?**
[YES →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77865632/451714370/724575027?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTJhZGRkZi00MWJkLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=csweC6c2lCBKJPShSh3VRk09iFsdWZJm9wAJgKgr8v4=&emci=1cf2bc1e-6cbc-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=512adddf-41bd-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=561582)
[NO →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77865633/451714371/724575027?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTJhZGRkZi00MWJkLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=csweC6c2lCBKJPShSh3VRk09iFsdWZJm9wAJgKgr8v4=&emci=1cf2bc1e-6cbc-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=512adddf-41bd-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=561582)
Your feedback is essential in shaping our mission to advocate for federally provided paid family leave that would benefit all working families nationwide. Together, we can make this crucial change for the better.
Thanks for your support and input!
Fairness Project

clean_body: | | | ONE QUESTION SURVEY: Should There Be Federal Paid Family Leave? Team, Did you know that only 13 states and DC provide paid family and medical leave? Like many of our other key ballot measure policies, paid leave is one area where there is a major disconnect between working people and the elected officials who represent them. Arizona, Colorado, Michigan, Washington, and Texas are all places where we’ve helped get this issue in front of voters, and time and again voters took action to pass the paid leave policies that they needed. We’re so proud of the work we’ve done to help change the lives of working families in these states, but the vast majority of the U.S. still hasn’t enacted paid leave laws. We want to see paid family leave become a universal right across all 50 states. It’s exactly why we’ve worked alongside voters in 5 states and cities (and are working with two more in 2024) to enact the paid family and medical leave policies they needed directly at the ballot box. But we want to hear from you, team: Should paid family leave be a universal right across all 50 states? Your feedback is essential in shaping our mission to advocate for federally provided paid family leave that would benefit all working families nationwide. Together, we can make this crucial change for the better. Thanks for your support and input! Fairness Project Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won over 30 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible.** = = Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions to the Fairness Project support its many efforts nationwide and any focus is at the Fairness Project’s sole discretion. Contributions will not necessarily be used to support activity in any one state. You can request to get only the most important emails from our team , or you can . body:
This past week America’s information crisis as long-standing institutions of journalism announced mass layoffs or mergers.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77865729/451714643/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDVhYTUxMjMtNDJiZC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZIvHMZJ78ytn8u3a182JeVeZemX9SshOLZxkV_B5Ty4=&emci=65ddaf9b-62bc-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=45aa5123-42bd-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=14016711)
2024 is here — and **off to a rough start for journalism and journalists alike.**
This past week, America’s information crisis deepened as long-standing institutions of good journalism like, _The Baltimore Sun, LA Times, Sports Illustrated_ and _Pitchfork_ all announced mass layoffs or mergers that will fundamentally undermine how these once heralded institutions covered the news.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77865731/451714649/-927058162?refcode=em20240127&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDVhYTUxMjMtNDJiZC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZIvHMZJ78ytn8u3a182JeVeZemX9SshOLZxkV_B5Ty4=)
**The impact has been immediate, Peter.** The continued shuttering of local newsrooms across the country, in addition to layoffs and acquisition from right-wing billionaires, has vastly changed our media landscape — and not for the better.
Courier was founded in part to fight the two-headed monster of shuttering newsrooms and the rise of right-wing conspiracy theories and bad information campaigns.
Unlike our mainstream counterparts, we don’t think paywalls and subscription fees should impede access to good, factual local news stories.
But in order to continue serving our communities, we rely on supporters like you: chipping in what they can, when they can.
**[If you too would like to invest in Courier's high-quality reporting, can you contribute $5 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77865732/451714650/-927058162?refcode=em20240127&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDVhYTUxMjMtNDJiZC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZIvHMZJ78ytn8u3a182JeVeZemX9SshOLZxkV_B5Ty4=)**
As more notable institutions of journalism shrink or disappear, we’ve seen those in the right-wing media ecosphere take advantage of this situation and replace quality news with right-wing propaganda, conspiracy theories, and election lies.
And with the 2024 election around the corner, you can bet that these bad information campaigns are having their intended impact seen and felt.
_But it's not all bad news._
In a world where quality, well-intentioned journalism is getting harder and harder to come by, Courier is here to be the good information antidote to the bad information landscape we’re living in. Our mission to build the largest left-leaning network of local newsrooms across the country has never been more vital.
**But none of this can be done without you.**
Peter, we're four days away from our _first_ end-of-month fundraising deadline and we're hoping to raise $15,000 by the end of this month. **[So can you pitch in $5 between now and next Wednesday to make sure we don't fall behind?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77865734/451714652/-927058162?refcode=em20240127&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDVhYTUxMjMtNDJiZC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZIvHMZJ78ytn8u3a182JeVeZemX9SshOLZxkV_B5Ty4=)**
Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77865736/451714654/-927058162?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em20240127&refcode2=45aa5123-42bd-ee11-b660-002248223197&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDVhYTUxMjMtNDJiZC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZIvHMZJ78ytn8u3a182JeVeZemX9SshOLZxkV_B5Ty4=) | [$15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77865737/451714655/-927058162?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=em20240127&refcode2=45aa5123-42bd-ee11-b660-002248223197&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDVhYTUxMjMtNDJiZC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZIvHMZJ78ytn8u3a182JeVeZemX9SshOLZxkV_B5Ty4=) | [$25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77865738/451714656/-927058162?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em20240127&refcode2=45aa5123-42bd-ee11-b660-002248223197&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDVhYTUxMjMtNDJiZC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZIvHMZJ78ytn8u3a182JeVeZemX9SshOLZxkV_B5Ty4=) | [$50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77865743/451714657/-927058162?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em20240127&refcode2=45aa5123-42bd-ee11-b660-002248223197&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDVhYTUxMjMtNDJiZC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZIvHMZJ78ytn8u3a182JeVeZemX9SshOLZxkV_B5Ty4=)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77865794/451714855/1033648996?refcode=em-1.27.24-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjhkZThhNGItNDJiZC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=e2liGAniHoo8gD_9HOvlJ7GTyy8vobXsbI_FA-62dd8=)

Peter, I want to share something important with you.

As you know, the Supreme Court’s _Citizens United_ decision unleashed virtually unlimited sums of cash into our elections process. It has tipped the scales toward special interests and corporations that can essentially buy politicians to get their agenda passed.

This should not have to be said, but massive corporations should not have the free rein to sway our politicians with massive checks -- and that goes for Big Pharma, Big Oil, and Wall St.

**I’m proud to share that I have never taken a dime of corporate PAC money in my campaign for Congress – and I never will.**

Not everyone in our race can say the same thing, Peter. Some of our opponents have access to massive sums from special interests. Meanwhile, I’m counting on individual donations from supporters like you.

clean_body: | = = Peter, I want to share something important with you. As you know, the Supreme Court’s Citizens United decision unleashed virtually unlimited sums of cash into our elections process. It has tipped the scales toward special interests and corporations that can essentially buy politicians to get their agenda passed. This should not have to be said, but massive corporations should not have the free rein to sway our politicians with massive checks -- and that goes for Big Pharma, Big Oil, and Wall St. I’m proud to share that I have never taken a dime of corporate PAC money in my campaign for Congress – and I never will. Not everyone in our race can say the same thing, Peter. Some of our opponents have access to massive sums from special interests. Meanwhile, I’m counting on individual donations from supporters like you. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | = In unity, Joanna =** | Joanna's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! To chip in to Joanna's campaign = To learn more about Joanna, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . PAID FOR BY JOANNA WEISS FOR CONGRESS Joanna Weiss for Congress PO Box 3122 Costa Mesa, CA 92628 United States

We’re excited to share that another public servant with a track record of helping the community has recognized Laura as the best choice for CA-30: **Los Angeles County Supervisor Holly Mitchell has endorsed Laura!** |
###
### _“Laura is a leader in advancing social justice and expanding the supply of affordable housing. LA needs Laura Friedman in Congress and I wholeheartedly endorse her."_
---
**[This endorsement is a big deal for us – will you join Holly in supporting Laura by pitching in $3 to help us meet our end-of-month fundraising goal less than 40 days before our election?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77866875/451716221/-1710610234?refcode=em-1.27.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzUyZTczYjAtNDNiZC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=i9RoSGoskI7G7OmLWlvr8a1kYYvwKfEa4HK1seDPGlo=)**
Holly’s record of serving Southern California families with bold, responsible leadership is one of the most distinguished in our state. Endorsements like hers bolster our efforts by signaling to voters that Laura is the best-equipped candidate in the race to succeed Adam Schiff.

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: Kari Lake’s Campaign Chair: “When you see a black surgeon you get a question in your mind.”
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
These people have no place in our country. This isn’t about DEI to them — it’s racism. End of story.
#

When most people see a doctor, they see someone they trust.
But not, apparently, Kari Lake’s Campaign Chair.
He actually said this:
_“Yet now, because of DEI, when you see a black surgeon you get a question in your mind. What you want, is you want the blacks that are on top, that do succeed, to be there on their merit.”_
These people have no place in our country. This isn’t about DEI to them — it’s racism. End of story.
And someone with a Campaign Chair like that has no place in the U.S. Senate.
But the GOP is going to throw their full weight behind Kari Lake. They will spend millions of dollars to take back Arizona’s Senate seat.
It is our job to stop them.
[**Help Ruben Gallego put an end to Kari Lake’s campaign. Make a donation today and help him defeat Kari Lake and Donald Trump.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan24.RCwesN&refcode=em240127-2-120-t2&t=1&akid=1871%2E734936%2E0IHQte)

name: Mark Takano
subject: I was outed as gay by MAGA Ken Calvert without my consent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
📎 photo attached

| Peter, in my first campaign for Congress, I ran against Republican Ken Calvert. I was ultimately unsuccessful in my first bid, and he’s still in Congress now.

But part of the reason I was unsuccessful is something that might seem unbelievable now in 2023 – **Ken Calvert publicy outed me as gay without my consent.**

It’s so hard to be forced to come out before you’re ready, _especially when that choice is taken from you by someone maliciously trying to hurt you._

In a bright pink series of mailers, Ken Calvert took away my autonomy and my right to share my sexuality when I was ready: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77867101/451716498/314310606?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20240127_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmVkMDY2MS00NGJkLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-sMnZow8AWzAJot7YA2TsxpuU0YMEAC8pmGACwcMdS0=) The fact that someone like that is still in Congress today – **that someone so blatantly homophobic is making our laws** – is absolutely horrifying.

But I’m working every single day to fight back against the MAGA Party’s extreme anti-LGBTQ rhetoric and policies – and I can’t keep fighting without your help.

[**If you’re as horrified by the extreme homophobic and transphobic agenda of the far-right, I hope you’ll chip in before my mid-month deadline to ensure hateful Republicans like MAGA Ken Calvert no longer hold the House Majority »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77867102/451716499/314310606?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20240127_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmVkMDY2MS00NGJkLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-sMnZow8AWzAJot7YA2TsxpuU0YMEAC8pmGACwcMdS0=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77867108/451716532/314310606?amount=7&amounts=7,10,15&express_lane=true&refcode=MTFC_20240127_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmVkMDY2MS00NGJkLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-sMnZow8AWzAJot7YA2TsxpuU0YMEAC8pmGACwcMdS0=)

Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. clean_body: 📎 photo attached | Peter, in my first campaign for Congress, I ran against Republican Ken Calvert. I was ultimately unsuccessful in my first bid, and he’s still in Congress now. But part of the reason I was unsuccessful is something that might seem unbelievable now in 2023 – Ken Calvert publicy outed me as gay without my consent. It’s so hard to be forced to come out before you’re ready, especially when that choice is taken from you by someone maliciously trying to hurt you. In a bright pink series of mailers, Ken Calvert took away my autonomy and my right to share my sexuality when I was ready: = The fact that someone like that is still in Congress today – that someone so blatantly homophobic is making our laws – is absolutely horrifying. But I’m working every single day to fight back against the MAGA Party’s extreme anti-LGBTQ rhetoric and policies – and I can’t keep fighting without your help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Thank you, Mark | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. **I’m not a typical member of Congress, and my lived experience shapes the policy I make today.** But none of this is possible without supporters like you, chipping in one dollar at a time.

www.torres.nyc

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

name: Jane Fonda
subject: 🌳🌺 What's your favorite way to connect with nature? 🌳🌺
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
This is what keeps me motivated.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77868190/451719315/1328794144?refcode=ea.6c7bcab6-46bd-ee11-b660-002248223197&ms=ea.6c7bcab6-46bd-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZjN2JjYWI2LTQ2YmQtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hNANLTI9oqnom0g2-bWKsBECXSIkgBTDw-gVLPZB-CU=&emci=c9ae9e9f-46bd-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=6c7bcab6-46bd-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=4823105)
---
As I reflect on my journey as a climate activist, my mind takes me back to my earliest memories in nature – whether it’s watching the beauty of a sunset as it paints the evening sky or just wandering through the woods by my childhood home, surrounded by the peaceful sounds of birds singing. It's these moments of connection with the natural world that have kept me grounded, reinforcing a love and respect for our planet that just grows stronger. But, let's face it, the urgency to protect our environment has never been more critical. The climate crisis is right on our doorstep. It's a reality now, not some distant future. And it's tough, _really tough,_ seeing the cherished places of my childhood at risk. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77868191/451719316/2105508926?refcode=ea.6c7bcab6-46bd-ee11-b660-002248223197&ms=ea.6c7bcab6-46bd-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZjN2JjYWI2LTQ2YmQtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hNANLTI9oqnom0g2-bWKsBECXSIkgBTDw-gVLPZB-CU=) **That’s exactly why I started the Jane Fonda Climate PAC. Our mission couldn't be clearer: to elect political leaders up and down the ballot who prioritize our planet over short-term profits and to challenge those who don't.** **[I know you're here because you care deeply, too. That’s why today, I'm asking you to take a stand with us. Make your first $5 donation to our organization. clean_body: This is what keeps me motivated. | As I reflect on my journey as a climate activist, my mind takes me back to my earliest memories in nature – whether it’s watching the beauty of a sunset as it paints the evening sky or just wandering through the woods by my childhood home, surrounded by the peaceful sounds of birds singing. It's these moments of connection with the natural world that have kept me grounded, reinforcing a love and respect for our planet that just grows stronger. But, let's face it, the urgency to protect our environment has never been more critical. The climate crisis is right on our doorstep. It's a reality now, not some distant future. And it's tough, really tough, seeing the cherished places of my childhood at risk. = That’s exactly why I started the Jane Fonda Climate PAC. Our mission couldn't be clearer: to elect political leaders up and down the ballot who prioritize our planet over short-term profits and to challenge those who don't. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = With hope and determination, Jane Fonda | = | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

clean_body: Democrats could be SHUT OUT from having a candidate on the November ballot: | = | Did you know there are only 9 DAYS until early voting starts for California’s critical primary elections? We have to take this primary election seriously. If two Republicans get the most votes in any of the upcoming competitive primary races, Democrats could be SHUT OUT from having a candidate on the November ballot. Simply put: How Democrats perform in the March 5th Primary will determine how possible it is for Democrats to take back the U.S. House in November. It’s that important. = = = = = = Listen, our organizers and volunteers are burning the midnight oil to organize before our critical Primary Election. But the closer we get to the primary, the more resources they need. How many donations we get in response to emails like this one will have a DIRECT impact on... 🚪 How many doors they can knock; ☎️ How many phone calls they can make; 📋 How many events they can attend; 📜 How much literature they can hand out. With only 9 days until early voting starts, we want to ensure our organizers and volunteers have EVERYTHING they need. That’s why we are asking:= = \- CADEM | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. And Peter, asking for donations is my least favorite part of running for office – but I’d be lying if I said deadlines like these weren’t important. Our first fundraising deadline of 2024 is in just a few days. What we raise this month is going to set the tone for the rest of the race, which is why my team has set a goal of raising $7,500 by midnight on the 31st. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = I ran for Congress with a promise to deliver meaningful results for Rhode Island – from lowering costs and protecting Social Security to defending abortion rights and ending gun violence. There is so much at stake this November, and we need to fight together if we want to take back our House majority and make meaningful progress. = Thank you, Seth | = PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress PO BOX 40993, PROVIDENCE, RI 02940 If you’d like to unsubscribe, . You can also =.

[](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=41e3b5426b6a4c97970c0fb68527e28d&_e=l5LMNiQN0hy7P4UUplenWp1WzFhryeSmuAPWdh8GAwoYQztrVXsEjsqIkoKdF2J6aZZNZ-T3IZl3VBp9vqzUo6MomzYxvFmZaodHqHjOI8Add5nRP9Cuz-gFLLp6r_8RJzWsbcwxX7LP09UPLVEwI9d8yEa-PpZyMoAhCAwh_y0tMcxCA6umzceG0fuMwAHgmybDBzkFOwawWLjHIRq2J1wEdB__VJCxhDHH7Eq0Wf6GtfBCTSno2GbIccO5z-ki4WM4NxsbBIewsf1B0-zQuT4W0bz2lkc8UQHkYwImIH7x1oKnqbaP3Zb7gb0kRku0KFD05UMWdAqyD8qcupwrqunak-iHtWUObNJMP2FkJKs%3D)
Friend,

When I stepped off stage in New Hampshire, here is the message I shared...

You've all heard the chatter among the political class. They're falling all over themselves saying this race is over.

Well, I have news for all of them. New Hampshire is first in the nation. **_It 's not last in the nation._**

**This race is far from over.** There are dozens of states left to go. And the next one is my sweet state of South Carolina!

At one point in this campaign, there were 14 of us running, and we were at two percent in the polls. Well, I'm a fighter. Now, we're the last one standing next to Donald Trump, and today we got close to half of the vote. We still have a ways to go, but we keep moving up.

For a lot of people, politics is way too personal. It's not personal for me.

I decided to run because I'm worried about the future of our country, and because it's time to put the negativity and chaos behind us.

We have an economy that is crushing middle-class Americans. We have a border that is totally open and dangerous, creating a disaster in our country. We have schools that are failing too many of our children. And we have a world on fire, with war in Europe and the Middle East, and a huge and growing threat from China.

And then you look at Washington. We have a Congress that fights about everything and accomplishes nothing. And we have Joe Biden in the White House, making one bad decision after another, when he's making any decisions at all.

Our country's in a real mess. _And the question is, who 's going to fix it?_

With Donald Trump, Republicans have lost almost every competitive election. We lost the Senate. We lost the House. We lost the White House. We lost in 2018, in 2020 and in 2022.

The worst kept secret in politics is how badly the Democrats want to run against Trump. They know Trump is the only Republican in the country who Biden can defeat.

You can't fix the mess if you don't win the election. A Trump nomination is a Biden win and a Kamala Harris presidency.

**I defeat Biden handily.**

With Donald Trump, you have one bout of chaos after another. This court case, that controversy, this tweet, that senior moment. You can't fix Joe Biden's chaos with Republican chaos.

The other day, Donald Trump accused me of not providing security at the Capitol on January 6th.

I've long called for mental competency tests for politicians over the age of 75. Trump claims he'd do better than me on one of those tests. Maybe he would, and maybe he wouldn't.

But if he thinks that, then he should have no problem standing on a debate stage with me!

Most Americans do not want a rematch between Biden and Trump. The first party to retire its 80-year-old candidate is going to win this election. I say it should be the Republicans!

**So our fight is not over, because we have a country to save.** | [JOIN OUR MOVEMENT](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=41e3b5426b6a4c97970c0fb68527e28d&_e=l5LMNiQN0hy7P4UUplenWp1WzFhryeSmuAPWdh8GAwoYQztrVXsEjsqIkoKdF2J6aZZNZ-T3IZl3VBp9vqzUo6MomzYxvFmZaodHqHjOI8Add5nRP9Cuz-gFLLp6r_8RJzWsbcwxX7LP09UPLVEwI9d8yEa-PpZyMoAhCAwh_y0tMcxCA6umzceG0fuMwAHgmybDBzkFOwawWLjHIRq2J26tw-eg-XPVMxyPRr2O4omLfCDVdbY7tAQnPLpFNM6I_Zq88PRNZen-f4wJZEqpX2vIj2mjf9XlnxORTlfMgoxq10UPhmKeYW3AiR8hSxDz2a3c71jzdUgeJamfgWA5-E3C0g92Z56PPBW0Hmfhhcg%3D)
---

In the next two months, millions of voters in over 20 states will have their say. We should honor them and allow them to vote. And guess what, in the next two months, Joe Biden isn't going to get any younger or any better. We'll have all the time we need to beat Biden.

When we get to South Carolina, Donald Trump is going to have a harder time falsely attacking me. The great people of South Carolina know I cut their taxes. They know I signed the toughest immigration bill in the country. They know we passed voter ID, and tort reform, and ethics reform, and they know we moved 35,000 people from welfare to work.

Every time I've run for office in South Carolina, I've beaten the political establishment. They're lined up against me again. That's no surprise. But South Carolina voters don't want a coronation. They want an election. And we're going to give them one.

Because we're just getting started.

**[Pitch in a donation to fuel my campaign and let's do this!](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=41e3b5426b6a4c97970c0fb68527e28d&_e=l5LMNiQN0hy7P4UUplenWp1WzFhryeSmuAPWdh8GAwoYQztrVXsEjsqIkoKdF2J6aZZNZ-T3IZl3VBp9vqzUo6MomzYxvFmZaodHqHjOI8Add5nRP9Cuz-gFLLp6r_8RJzWsbcwxX7LP09UPLVEwI9d8yEa-PpZyMoAhCAwh_y0tMcxCA6umzceG0fuMwAHgmybDBzkFOwawWLjHIRq2J28dp_cazCZAHglYDl8tpzxkWV3ox2g240wUDl1kgmfZqoU3mS-doTWW2pb5uv8SKYIsIJ--HAn6PwYhNibHG3Xd6_oYrdrSHUXbo1Gkjf7IsoMKdBccpXpBfYnmRRHErXZwpEwxIdxYcJIz5wbwYaU%3D)**

Let's do this!

My very best,

body:
Just when you think Trump and his campaign can’t go any lower, he called Gold Star Parents shills.
#
When Trump called fallen Americans who were laid to rest in a cemetery in France “suckers” and “losers,” it wasn’t just confirmed by the press.
His longest-serving Chief of Staff, retired Marine General John Kelly, confirmed it himself.
We hit Trump for those disgusting remarks in our newest ad, "**Gold Star Families** ," because he will never understand the sacrifice these families made. Because the public deserves to know what Trump really thinks of our honored dead.
But Brian Mast, the Chair of “Veterans for Trump,” just insulted those families. Just when you think Trump and his campaign can’t go any lower, he called Gold Star Parents shills. He called them “vile.”
Every person in that ad has a child who died in service to our nation. They are not shills. They are not vile. They are more courageous than Trump could ever be.
**[We need every single Veteran, every person who grew up in a Military family, every supporter, everyone reading this email right now to use this link, add your name, and support the Gold Star Parents that Brian Mast and the Trump campaign just maligned.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/240127_vv_goldstar/?source=em240127-1-30-f-v?refcode2=23670.3013755.qIZ-7L&akid=23670%2E3013755%2EqIZ-7L)
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/240127_vv_goldstar/?source=em240127-1-30-f-v?refcode2=23670.3013755.qIZ-7L&akid=23670%2E3013755%2EqIZ-7L)
---
We will not stand by while Trump and his campaign insult Gold Star Parents. And we need you to join us.
Please, sign on.
The team at VoteVets

body:
Governor proposes $51.82 billion state operating budget | | | |
---
| | |
# Capitol Report
January 27, 2024
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| **Contact Senator Roberts** 201 W. Capitol Ave., Rm 329
Jefferson City, MO 65101
(573) 751-4415
Steve.Roberts@senate.mo.gov
---
| | | | | | [](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=e03a47c33d&e=a088917f89)
---
| | [](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=41ad2e5ae3&e=a088917f89)
---
| | [](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=87fc7f9808&e=a088917f89)
---
|
---
| **Governor proposes $51.82 billion state operating budget**
In his sixth and final State of the State address, Gov. Mike Parson proposed a $51.82 billion state operating budget for the upcoming 2025 fiscal year, plus another $898 million for capital improvement projects. As is tradition, Parson, a Republican, delivered the speech before a joint legislative session in the Missouri House of Representatives.

The FY 2025 spending plan includes an additional $120.6 million in basic state funding for local K-12 public school districts, plus an additional $14 million for districts’ student transportation costs. Both increases would fund those budget lines at the minimum amounts called for by state law. Parson also asked for $51.7 million in state child care subsidies.

The governor is recommending a 3 percent increase in core funding for Missouri’s public colleges and universities, which would collectively provide the schools an additional $32.5 million. Parson also is asking for $314.7 million for capital improvement projects at college campuses.

Now that the governor has submitted his proposed budget, the process shifts to the legislature. House Budget Committee hearings on the governor’s plan are slated to start Jan. 29. Lawmakers face a May 10 constitutional deadline for granting final passage to the various appropriations bills that will make up the FY 2025 state budget. The new fiscal year begins July 1.

While offering details on his proposed budget, Parson spent little time discussing bills he wants the legislature to enact this year, usually a key feature of the State of the State. This perhaps was a tacit acknowledgement that GOP infighting in the Senate is likely to prevent much of importance from passing this year. Policy proposals he did mention were for lawmakers to expand child care tax credits and increase criminal penalties for fentanyl trafficking.

Parson devoted most of the speech to claiming victory for what he sees as his administration’ accomplishments since he took office in June 2018 after his predecessor resigned in disgrace. Those included eliminating abortion rights, cutting income taxes for the wealthy, consistently funding K-12 schools at the minimum levels set by state law and working through a large backlog of clemency requests – after taking no action on them during his early years in office.

During his victory lap, Parson omitted mention of his administration’s failures, including its mishandling of the pandemic, its bungled implementation of the state’s legalized medical marijuana program, the former Department of Health and Senior Services’ director disturbing practice of tracking women’s menstrual cycles without their knowledge or consent and the Department of Revenue smacking Missourians with surprise tax bills in 2019 because it issued flawed tax tables and then tried to cover-up its responsibility.
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| **Senate GOP hardliners punished for unrelenting obstruction**
Senate President Pro Tem Caleb Rowden on Jan. 23 retaliated against four members of the chamber’s hardline right-wing faction for their constant obstruction of proceedings by stripping them of their committee leadership posts. The hardliners responded by spending most of the rest of the week engaging in more obstruction.

The hardline Republican faction has long been a thorn in the side of Senate GOP leadership, with its obstructionist tactics sharply reducing the number of bills to win final legislative passage in each of the three previous years. From the outset of the current session, the hardliners have significantly escalated tensions by blocking the Senate from considering even routine business, finally prompting Rowden, R-Columbia, to take punitive action.

At a news conference, Rowden announced he had stripped committee chairmanships or vice-chairmanships from state Sens. Bill Eigel of St. Charles, Denny Hoskins of Warrensburg, Andrew Koenig of Manchester and Rick Brattin of Harrisonville. Hoskins also lost his position on the powerful Senate Appropriations Committee. Rowden was flanked by the more mainstream Senate Republicans during the announcement.

Because the Senate allows for unlimited debate, a small group of senators can force the chamber to a standstill by holding the floor for extended periods. However, the filibuster traditionally is invoked on a relatively limited basis and usually with the intent of encouraging compromise on a contentious issue. The hardliners, by contrast, have resorted to filibustering daily on procedural matters in an ongoing, but unsuccessful, effort to force the Senate to capitulate to their demands to pass a variety of far right-wing proposals that enjoy little legislative support.

| **HELP FOR SMALL BUSINESS AND NON- PROFITS **
The U.S. Small Business Administration approved Missouri’s request for assistance through the federal agency’s disaster loan program. This move makes low-interest disaster loans available to small businesses and private non-profits severely impacted by the Coronavirus (COVID-19).

SBA’s Economic Injury Disaster Loans offer up to $2 million in assistance for each affected small business or non-profit. These loans can provide vital economic support to small businesses to help overcome the temporary loss of revenue they are experiencing.

Applicants will be able to apply online, receive additional disaster assistance information and [download applications](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=fad99e5a2c&e=a088917f89). Applicants may also call SBA’s Customer Service Center at (800) 659-2955 or email [disastercustomerservice@sba.gov](mailto:disastercustomerservice@sba.gov) for more information on SBA disaster assistance.
---
|

| **SAFE SHELTERING RESOURCES** Sheltering in place can be difficult for anyone, and some of our neighbors might not be safe due to violence at home. If you or someone you know needs help, please visit [Safe Connections](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=d62abeb8fc&e=a088917f89) or call _314-531-2003_.

| **RX OUTREACH EXPANDS ELIGIBILITY **
Below is a memo from a trusted non-profit:

As a non-profit, mail-order pharmacy, Rx Outreach is uniquely positioned to help stop the spread of COVID-19 for people who are quarantined and those who may be afraid to travel outside of their homes to the clinic or pharmacy.

Rx Outreach lifted its income guidelines during this crisis so that **anyone, regardless of income, can participate in their program.**

Rx Outreach medication prices are generally 70-80% below retail and are transparent. Shipping is free.

---
|
---
| **LOW-COST INSULIN** Before COVID-19 insulin users were having a difficult time affording medication due to the tripling of the cost over the last decade. In the wake of COVID-19, it has become even more difficult for those who rely on insulin to afford the inflated cost. Eli Lilly and Company has introduced a program to purchase Basaglar insulin at significant cost savings. Please call Lilly Diabetes Solution Center at 833-808-1234 between 9 am and 9 pm, M-F to see if you qualify for these savings. More information can be found at the [Eli Lilly and Co. Website](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=0b25a73ddd&e=a088917f89).

Capitol Ave., Rm 329 Jefferson City, MO 65101 (573) 751-4415 Steve.Roberts@senate.mo.gov | | | | | | | | | | | | Governor proposes $51.82 billion state operating budget In his sixth and final State of the State address, Gov. Mike Parson proposed a $51.82 billion state operating budget for the upcoming 2025 fiscal year, plus another $898 million for capital improvement projects. As is tradition, Parson, a Republican, delivered the speech before a joint legislative session in the Missouri House of Representatives. The FY 2025 spending plan includes an additional $120.6 million in basic state funding for local K-12 public school districts, plus an additional $14 million for districts’ student transportation costs. Both increases would fund those budget lines at the minimum amounts called for by state law. Parson also asked for $51.7 million in state child care subsidies. The governor is recommending a 3 percent increase in core funding for Missouri’s public colleges and universities, which would collectively provide the schools an additional $32.5 million. Parson also is asking for $314.7 million for capital improvement projects at college campuses. Now that the governor has submitted his proposed budget, the process shifts to the legislature. House Budget Committee hearings on the governor’s plan are slated to start Jan. 29. Lawmakers face a May 10 constitutional deadline for granting final passage to the various appropriations bills that will make up the FY 2025 state budget. The new fiscal year begins July 1. While offering details on his proposed budget, Parson spent little time discussing bills he wants the legislature to enact this year, usually a key feature of the State of the State. This perhaps was a tacit acknowledgement that GOP infighting in the Senate is likely to prevent much of importance from passing this year. Policy proposals he did mention were for lawmakers to expand child care tax credits and increase criminal penalties for fentanyl trafficking. Parson devoted most of the speech to claiming victory for what he sees as his administration’ accomplishments since he took office in June 2018 after his predecessor resigned in disgrace. Those included eliminating abortion rights, cutting income taxes for the wealthy, consistently funding K-12 schools at the minimum levels set by state law and working through a large backlog of clemency requests – after taking no action on them during his early years in office. During his victory lap, Parson omitted mention of his administration’s failures, including its mishandling of the pandemic, its bungled implementation of the state’s legalized medical marijuana program, the former Department of Health and Senior Services’ director disturbing practice of tracking women’s menstrual cycles without their knowledge or consent and the Department of Revenue smacking Missourians with surprise tax bills in 2019 because it issued flawed tax tables and then tried to cover-up its responsibility. | | | | Senate GOP hardliners punished for unrelenting obstruction Senate President Pro Tem Caleb Rowden on Jan. 23 retaliated against four members of the chamber’s hardline right-wing faction for their constant obstruction of proceedings by stripping them of their committee leadership posts. The hardliners responded by spending most of the rest of the week engaging in more obstruction. The hardline Republican faction has long been a thorn in the side of Senate GOP leadership, with its obstructionist tactics sharply reducing the number of bills to win final legislative passage in each of the three previous years. From the outset of the current session, the hardliners have significantly escalated tensions by blocking the Senate from considering even routine business, finally prompting Rowden, R-Columbia, to take punitive action. At a news conference, Rowden announced he had stripped committee chairmanships or vice-chairmanships from state Sens. Bill Eigel of St. Charles, Denny Hoskins of Warrensburg, Andrew Koenig of Manchester and Rick Brattin of Harrisonville. Hoskins also lost his position on the powerful Senate Appropriations Committee. The hardliners, by contrast, have resorted to filibustering daily on procedural matters in an ongoing, but unsuccessful, effort to force the Senate to capitulate to their demands to pass a variety of far right-wing proposals that enjoy little legislative support. | | | | 2024 SENATE BILLS \- Creates the offense of unlawful possession of a firearm by a minor \- Modifies provisions relating to **Are you there? I still haven 't heard back from you...**

clean_body: The battle for Michigan’s 8th Congressional race is going to come down to the wire = The battle for Michigan’s 8th Congressional race is going to come down to the wire. But don’t take my word for it – just look at this poll conducted by a Republican super PAC: | December MI-08 Polling: Democrat: 46% Republican: 45% This poll from the House GOP’s top super PAC shows a generic Democrat with just a one point lead in this toss-up district. No wonder Republicans are already calling our race a “prime pickup opportunity.” Republicans are going to throw everything they’ve got at Kristen to win this district – they have already tested the field and begun trying to spread lies – because if they win, they’re one seat closer to keeping their House majority. We need to get to work right now to make sure our campaign has the resources to reach every single undecided voter and fight back against the GOP’s attacks. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks, Shane Kristen for Michigan, Campaign Manager | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Katie Porter
subject: Between 20-25% of voters remain undecided
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Election Day for our campaign is March 5.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=37036%2E3422442%2E5IspD9)
Derek,
Katie Porter here with three reasons I’m asking for your support:
1. Recent polls show that between 20-25% of voters are undecided about who they’ll support in this race.
2. Polls also show the race between second and third place to be extremely close. **If we finish second, we advance to the general election. If we finish third, my time in Washington comes to an end.**
3. My opponent is outspending us 8:1 on TV ads. We have to catch up ASAP.

Election Day for our campaign is March 5, so every single day between now and then is critical. **[Can you make a donation of $5 today to help us reach voters and pull ahead? I wouldn't ask if it weren’t going to make a powerful difference.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240127-1?refcode=em20240127-37036&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=37036_3422442_5IspD9&akid=37036%2E3422442%2E5IspD9)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240127-1?refcode=em20240127-37036&refcode2=37036_3422442_5IspD9&akid=37036%2E3422442%2E5IspD9)
Many thanks,
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. name: Congressman Frank Mrvan
subject: Northwest Indiana is my home
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, Northwest Indiana is my home, where I met and married my high school sweetheart, Jane, and built a family with our two daughters. **Being able to represent Northwest Indiana in Congress is something I take immense pride in** , and strive to do the best I can to advocate for more economic growth and good-paying job opportunities for everyone in our region and state. But to continue this focus on protecting American jobs and standing up for the fundamental rights of women to access reproductive healthcare, my team and I need to have resources to counter big incoming GOP attacks. **All eyes will be on IN-01 this November, with this district being the most competitive federal race in the state.** Not only that, I’ve been named a top target by National Republicans. We must be ready to fight for the values we believe in to defend this seat in Indiana. **[That's why I'm asking, Peter: Can you split a donation between my campaign and the Indiana Democrats to help us meet our first monthly fundraising goal of the election year? I'm so grateful for anything you can give to support our work.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77871284/451729492/-969499340?refcode=240127Frank&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzk1ZTg0Ni00ZmJkLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9QECAUn9x8kjNnycK-9gfwTBBsCl0E3pjHnSRNPUpSc=)** Here’s why I’m asking and how your support now can make a significant difference.

Ballots for the Primary Election will drop in _less than two weeks._ And that means we must reach households across CA-45 before then.

That’s why, in addition to our ongoing voter outreach efforts like canvassing, phone banking, and targeted social media, **we’re investing in our first piece of direct mail.

We must get tens of thousands of direct mail pieces to blanket every part of CA-45, from Garden Grove to Cerritos, Brea to Westminster — and all points in between.

**Here’s how you can help, because you understand the importance of flipping this district and electing a Democratic majority in Congress.**

clean_body: | | | ** Republicans are wasting our time attempting revenge impeachments, completely devoid of any merit. House Republicans are once again attempting an unfounded impeachment inquiry, this time shamelessly targeting Secretary of Homeland Security Alejandro Mayorkas. Their tactics have been rejected by members from both parties and lack bipartisan support. This is just another pitiful distraction campaign by Republicans, who began with a baseless impeachment inquiry into President Biden. The Republican party's reckless pursuit of political gains has hindered meaningful legislation, held up crucial border security funding, and worsened the border situation they blame Mayorkas for. The pathetic impeachment inquiry against Biden is nothing more than a desperate and embarrassing ploy to pacify the MAGA crowd and boost Donald Trump’s campaign. Republican obstructionism is hindering the Biden administration's efforts to address pressing challenges. It is high time for House Republicans to abandon their deceptive tactics and start serving the American people. name: Bob Lorinser
subject: Full transparency
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
Friend, Let me explain. I understand I'm not your typical politician. Maybe it's because I'm a Yooper (We're built different), but I'll tell you why I support reform here and most candidates do not. If you've recently contributed, I'm very grateful. Please consider this a campaign update.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
Yoopers are built different
I fundamentally believe in campaign finance reform. I understand I'm not a typical politician. Most candidates spend the majority of their time on 'call-time,' spending hours on end every day targeting high-dollar donors for big contributions.
That's not how we work here, and I'll tell you why.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Over 99% of our contributions through e-mail come from donations of $100 or less. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
RUSH $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
RUSH $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
RUSH $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
Friend,
I do about 2 - 3 hours of 'call time' every day, but I'm mostly checking in on local constituents, seeing what issues are important to them. As other candidates spend their time begging bigwigs for money, I'm out touring the district talking about healthcare, childcare, education, and jobs. Real issues.
Schedule a personal chat with me . [https://calendly.com/lorinser/quickcall?month=2024-02]
This week alone, I participated in a community event supporting local college political activists, an affordable housing forum, and did a digital town hall. Today, Peggy and I travel to talk about the childcare crisis with local caregivers.
Yet, our fundraising is still going very well! It's all thanks to everyday people like you responding to e-mails, giving what they can, be it $5, $50, and sometimes even $500.
Over 75% of our overall funds are 'small-amount' contributions, $200 or less. We outraise our Democratic colleagues and our GOP incumbent opponent in this category.
This category is most important to the race because it shows true grassroots, people-powered support.
However, because Rep. Bergman is mostly funded with PAC, dark money, and ultra-wealthy contributors looking for influence, we are outfunded.
We have three days to our end-of-the-month goal of $15,000 through e-mail and are just $1,320 away. With your help, we will crush that, but, if you can put us even further ahead, it will help me save funds for more direct voter contact.
Engaging voters is how to win elections.
That's where we're investing our time, money, and energy - in hardworking people. So, t oday, I'm asking you to chip in what you can to fuel that effort. Every single dollar counts. To continue running hard, I need you in my corner.
Thank you,
-Dr. Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan, Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/dbsignature.png]
Or, send a check to
FRIENDS OF DR. BOB
PO BOX 936
Marquette, MI 49855
United States
PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. BOB LORINSER

clean_body: | | | | Will you step up? Peter, sorry to reach out on a Saturday, but this is important. My wife Lori Chavez-DeRemer is facing a critical End-of-Month deadline. We’re still short of our goal - Can you rush in $1 or more to help us reach this goal? Dr. Shawn DeRemer Sent from my iPhone | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Shawn’s iPhone 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 == \-

Will you vote in the November General Election? | Thanks, Team DASS | Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the only organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States. Right now, Republicans are changing the rules and changing the players to try and change the outcomes of future elections. Democratic Secretaries of State are the last line of defense to protect our democracy and preserve the will of the voters. Please consider a donation to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda. | = = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . I’ll tell you what I told Lawrence O’Donnell: **“This victory is a testament to the fact that people shouldn’t forget and shouldn’t give up on Florida.”** [](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/uZvh29F68sNZ4ZmOU8gcRg~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnl_qJP0THaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDEyN19lbV9mcl9iMV9tc25iY19lbiZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yYlZPbG1ZVTJZZTNaVHd1U3lKTjFsdGx1ajcmcmVmY29kZTI9MmJWT2xtWVUyWWUzWlR3dVN5Sk4xbHRsdWo3JnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJiVk9sbVlVMlllM1pUd3VTeUpOMWx0bHVqN1cDc3BjQgplsYl1tWUrYa04UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~) | [FUEL OUR ORGANIZING ACROSS FLORIDA: CHIP IN $27 NOW >>](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/uZvh29F68sNZ4ZmOU8gcRg~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnl_qJP0THaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDEyN19lbV9mcl9iMV9tc25iY19lbiZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yYlZPbG1ZVTJZZTNaVHd1U3lKTjFsdGx1ajcmcmVmY29kZTI9MmJWT2xtWVUyWWUzWlR3dVN5Sk4xbHRsdWo3JnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJiVk9sbVlVMlllM1pUd3VTeUpOMWx0bHVqN1cDc3BjQgplsYl1tWUrYa04UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~)

Peter – DeSantis won this district by _eleven_ points last cycle. This victory shows that if we get out and share our message with enough people, we can defeat DeSantis’ fascists across the state.

**Florida isn’t a lost cause.** I know this, and my organizing team knows it. That’s why we’ve been working non-stop to reach folks and bring them into our movement – because when we all come together and build power in our communities, we win.

**So we’re going to keep fighting and keep organizing until we flip Florida blue. But to make that happen, we need the resources to ramp up our organizing program through Election Day. That’s why I’m counting on your grassroots support, Peter.**

clean_body: | ~~ Peter – This week, I joined Lawrence O’Donnell on MSNBC to talk about how our organizing team helped Rep. Tom Keen flip Florida’s HD-35 from red to blue. I’ll tell you what I told Lawrence O’Donnell: “This victory is a testament to the fact that people shouldn’t forget and shouldn’t give up on Florida.” ~~ | ~~ Peter – DeSantis won this district by eleven points last cycle. This victory shows that if we get out and share our message with enough people, we can defeat DeSantis’ fascists across the state. Florida isn’t a lost cause. I know this, and my organizing team knows it. That’s why we’ve been working non-stop to reach folks and bring them into our movement – because when we all come together and build power in our communities, we win. So we’re going to keep fighting and keep organizing until we flip Florida blue. But to make that happen, we need the resources to ramp up our organizing program through Election Day. That’s why I’m counting on your grassroots support, Peter. ~~ | | ~~ ~~ | ~~ ~ | ~ ~ Thanks, Maxwell Frost ~~ ~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Maxwell is an organizer representing Florida's 10th District in Congress. name: Team Emilia
subject: What Emilia accomplished in 2023 →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
We wanted our top supporters to see this:

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77873503/451737122/-1745565447?refcode=em_fr_2024.01.27_b1_te_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjg5N2E2NS01YmJkLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KKP0v2rKQJhmcOI-urZmX9oXOeCW_DM3UssJiOU4KKk=) Hi Peter,

From day one, Emilia has worked hard in Congress to fight for the issues most important to Northeast Ohio families. **Let’s take a look at just some of what Emilia has accomplished in her first year in Congress:** | **_LOWERING COSTS_**
Emilia knows that costs are too high for many working families in OH-13. That’s why she’s been working everyday to lower costs for Northeast Ohioans.

She introduced the _Lower Your Taxes Act_ , and co-sponsored the _Junk Fee Prevention Act_ and _Social Security 2100 Act_ to lower costs and put more money back in the pockets of hard working Americans.

**_DEFENDING OUR FREEDOMS_**
While extremist Republican members of Congress continue their assault on our freedoms, Emilia is fighting everyday to defend them.

As a co-sponsor of the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ , Emilia is fighting to ensure every woman can make her own reproductive healthcare decisions. She co-sponsored the _Freedom to Vote Act_ to protect voting rights and combat partisan gerrymandering.

_**PROTECTING OUR COMMUNITY**_
Emilia is working hard to make OH-13 a safe place to live and work. She introduced the bipartisan _RAIL Act_ to improve rail safety, and led the _Safer Homes and Families Act_ to protect families from abuse.

She’s also a co-sponsor of commonsense gun safety bills to create universal background checks, ban assault weapons, and enact safe storage laws.

_**PUTTING OH-13 FIRST**_
Emilia will always put people over politics. Over the past year, Emilia and her team **assisted 573 constituents with casework,** and**sent over 43,000 email responses to constituents** about the issues that matter most to them.

As an advocate for Northeast Ohio in Congress, Emilia has been able to **return over $2,244,527 back to constituents, and secured $103,506,867 in federal funding for local organizations and governments.**
---
It’s been a whirlwind year for Team Emilia, and none of it would have been possible without your support!

Thank you for being an essential part of our team,

_Team Emilia_

**P.S. We have an opportunity to build on the progress Emilia has made in Congress.[By contributing today, you can help ensure we’ll have the resources to run the strongest campaign possible this year to send Emilia back to Congress to keep delivering for Northeast Ohio.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77873504/451737123/-1745565447?refcode=em_fr_2024.01.27_b1_te_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjg5N2E2NS01YmJkLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KKP0v2rKQJhmcOI-urZmX9oXOeCW_DM3UssJiOU4KKk=)**
**[DONATE>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77873505/451737124/-1745565447?refcode=em_fr_2024.01.27_b1_te_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjg5N2E2NS01YmJkLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KKP0v2rKQJhmcOI-urZmX9oXOeCW_DM3UssJiOU4KKk=)**
**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country._Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results._ **

[**Can we count on you to chip in a few dollars to Emilia's campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77873506/451737125/-1745565447?refcode=em_fr_2024.01.27_b1_te_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjg5N2E2NS01YmJkLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KKP0v2rKQJhmcOI-urZmX9oXOeCW_DM3UssJiOU4KKk=) | [**DONATE »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77873507/451737126/-1745565447?refcode=em_fr_2024.01.27_b1_te_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjg5N2E2NS01YmJkLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KKP0v2rKQJhmcOI-urZmX9oXOeCW_DM3UssJiOU4KKk=)

name: The Diem Team
subject: 🚨Major endorsement!🚨
body:
| |
---
Peter, We just received a major endorsement from the Ohio Democratic Party. Honestly, we weren't expecting this. But it's an absolute honor to have the endorsement of the Ohio Democratic Party. It shows we have the best chance to defeat Max Miller and send responsible leadership to Washington.
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wDZWX9f_QGXYt8-x-WTsfwdGFe5Rr6BeQ1dHtzoRyn_M2JFFKNU81S9z6q3LSqEsON3ubTDZSiwmtkelrM3g1yyLiBkr1_XwDd_lMFiUblJZO5dgc-o_-G_-TGO5ECDGpbA1cCiKn7jsUZKmScXaXROykxbtvD0zpwvfd8ytpdsSdJj1d8IkMlU-tSbrfaR5WKiMKikEwQ725697T8EhhZLzKrQgiDHxvKti0ZBiY6C2nwoxc2l_Hb83RXV1AJvXT2c-dVvcO6q-a7Rud4xYdvxPgUmixqf1EQC7791PFbkQ/43c/H9lymlqvRLyWD-KpQF6CZA/h0/3f0o3RncQPl_b_0eLj-cJn2ZcUd62aPF5a9PFLWCf3Q)
---
The Ohio Democratic Party doesn't hand out endorsements before the primary willy-nilly. Usually they endorse uncontested races and that they made such a solid choice this early in the game speaks volumes. It's clear that we're the best chance to take down Trump ally Max Miller. name: Bob Casey
subject: Four
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1824%2E552475%2ErrEnou)
Peter:
**Four days.** That’s how long we have until the next major end-of-month fundraising deadline of my re-election campaign.
Right now, I’m facing a tough re-election fight to keep delivering real results for Pennsylvania’s working families.
That's why I need your help. Mitch McConnell has put Pennsylvania on his list of **top four** seats to flip to gain a Republican Senate majority next year — and there's no doubt that national Republicans will spend millions trying to buy Pennsylvania.
[**I am respectfully asking if you will pitch in just $4 today toward our end-of-month fundraising goal. Small donations add up, and for just four bucks, you can help defend a seat that is critical to holding our Democratic Senate majority.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240127-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240127-2&refcode2=1824_552475_rrEnou&akid=1824%2E552475%2ErrEnou)

| | Peter – I've dedicated my life to service – as an Air Force veteran, a trauma surgeon, and a health policy advisor. And now, I’m ready for a different kind of service to my community: Representing TX-32 in Congress.

As a trauma surgeon, I've witnessed firsthand the impact of policy decisions on people's lives. Working alongside Senator Chris Murphy and Speaker Nancy Pelosi, it was an honor to play a role in drafting and passing the most consequential gun safety law in thirty years.

[**But running for office isn’t easy – or cheap. With our March 5 primary quickly approaching, we need all hands on deck to hit our $75,000 end-of-month fundraising goal to ensure we have the resources to run a winning campaign. name: Debbie (personal)
subject: Rick Scott just called me a liar.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
his accusations don't scare me
| | |
---
Listen, I need you to hear this: My opponent, Rick Scott, has already spent $3 MILLION running attack ads.
Not only has he spent more than any other GOP Senate candidate so far, he's calling me a liar every chance he gets. Yesterday he went on the record to say that I lied about his stance on abortion.**Friend, let me make this clear:** _Rick Scott voted for a 15-week abortion ban._ **I am unapologetically pro-choice, and his accusations don't scare me. I will always fight to protect reproductive freedom.** His spending and his blatant attempts to smear me and this campaign might look like a sign of strength at first glance. But that couldn't be farther from the truth.
**In reality, Rick Scott is terrified. Honestly, I don't blame him — polling shows our team in the lead, and experts at CNN just ranked Florida as one of the most likely Senate seats to flip blue.**

Scott knows that he's more vulnerable than ever before. Last time around, he had to outspend his Democratic opponent by $50 MILLION to just barely win this seat — that race came down to just 10,033 votes. Now, he's trying to pull the same trick again in a desperate last ditch effort to save his campaign. We can't let him get away with it: **[_So, friend, if you have anything extra to spare today, will you chip in to help us win in Florida and defend Democrats' Senate majority?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77873724/451737975/1820369458?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk719-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWUwODBhN2QtNWZiZC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uxYsdrRas0k86bl9nInupI6F33ZgqnXJpOzhYrPKsF0=)**

Listen, friend, we cannot let these attacks go unanswered. He is lying, and he is spreading disinformation.
Rick Scott knows that he can't win this race by telling the truth about his record. He built his fortune as the CEO of a hospital chain convicted of what the Justice Department called the largest Medicare fraud scheme ever. He made off with millions, pled the Fifth, and faced no consequences. Now, he's pushing a far-right agenda that would ban abortions, raise taxes on working families, and end Social Security and Medicare.
My story is different. As a teen immigrant from Ecuador, I fought hard to create my own American dream. In high school, I worked early morning shifts to help my family afford rent for our one room apartment.
I studied hard to earn a scholarship that made college possible for me and dedicated my career to public service. Eventually, I ran for Congress, flipped a battleground district blue, and became the first South American immigrant elected to the House. In Congress, I fought tirelessly to expand Medicare access, lower the cost of living, end gun violence, and protect families like yours.
**I've spent my life giving back to the communities that gave me so much, and fighting to protect the opportunities that made my story possible. Rick Scott has spent his career getting rich and leaving working families behind. That's why I'm running for Senate to defeat him — because Floridians will suffer if he wins 6 more years.**
**But every day that we allow these ads to go unanswered, his lies and disinformation are reaching more and more voters, undermining our message, and jeopardizing our campaign. We've got to fight back, and I can't do that without your help:** So I'm personally asking — if you've made it this far, will you please chip in $5 to help us tell the truth about Rick Scott's record and flip Florida blue? With your help, this race is truly ours to win.
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77873729/451737983/1820369458?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk719-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWUwODBhN2QtNWZiZC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uxYsdrRas0k86bl9nInupI6F33ZgqnXJpOzhYrPKsF0=)
---
With immense gratitude,

Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
|
* * *
| | | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77873730/451737986/-31037693?refcode=jtk719-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWUwODBhN2QtNWZiZC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uxYsdrRas0k86bl9nInupI6F33ZgqnXJpOzhYrPKsF0=)

She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=5238%2E5257348%2EDDh81V ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, do you
recognize this guy?

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240127_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=5238%2E5257348%2EDDh81V ]Donald Trump speaking on a podium

This is Donald Trump. For four years, he worked to enrich himself,
blackmail America’s allies, and overturn a democratic election as
President of the United States.

He worked closely with this guy to get it done.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240127_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=5238%2E5257348%2EDDh81V ]Mitch McConnell holding up his fist

As Majority Leader, Mitch McConnell shamelessly worked to block President
Obama’s progress and steamroll Trump’s agenda through the Senate. He
pushed to confirm 3 conservative Supreme Court justices to a lifetime
appointment on the Supreme Court and acquit Donald Trump in both of his
impeachment trials.

Both Trump and Mitch are working to take back control in Washington — and
they have their eyes on this guy to do it:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240127_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=5238%2E5257348%2EDDh81V ]Steve Garvey

This is MAGA multimillionaire Steve Garvey. Garvey jumped in the open U.S.
Senate race and would be a rubber stamp for the GOP’s agenda if elected.
He has millions to try and get it done.

Here’s the person who can stop all of this from happening:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240127_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=5238%2E5257348%2EDDh81V ]Adam Schiff smiling and speaking into a microphone

This is Adam. Adam has fought tirelessly to deliver for the people of
California. He’s worked to bring millions of dollars back to our state,
stand up for access to affordable health care, and lower costs for
everyday Californians.

He’s not afraid to stand up to bullies. In fact, he served as the lead
manager in Donald Trump’s first impeachment trial — and secured the first
bipartisan vote in history against a sitting president.

Now, he’s ready to take that fight straight to the U.S. Senate and defend
California — and the America we know and love.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240127_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=5238%2E5257348%2EDDh81V ]Adam Schiff looking into the distance

subject: What can we say?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Folks — Adam’s end of month deadline is less than 4 days away. [Is there _anything_ we can say to convince you to make a split contribution to VPP and his Senate campaign?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/60415?t=6&akid=12597%2E878179%2EpvE1sR) | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/60415?t=7&akid=12597%2E878179%2EpvE1sR)
---
What if we told you that Adam’s multimillionaire, celebrity GOP opponent Steve Garvey is surging ahead to _second place_ in the polls — meaning that he could advance to the general election? If that happens Adam is the best candidate to beat him.

What if we told you that as we speak, we’re setting our campaign advertising budget to run **millions of dollars worth of ads** just to reach voters in some of the most expensive media markets in the nation?

Or what if we told you that all of these priorities — reaching voters, fighting back against GOP attacks, and sharing Adam’s message — depend on the grassroots support of people like you?

**Adam doesn’t take a penny of corporate PAC money, and your grassroots donation to this email is the ONLY way we’ll have a shot at hitting our end of month fundraising goal.**

That’s the truth, plain and simple. Your support doesn’t just mean the world to Adam — it is essential to building the kind of movement we need to win this race, protect our democracy, and make progress on issues from the climate crisis, to the economy, to affordable housing.

[With time running out before Adam’s end of month deadline, we hope you’re convinced. Will you chip in a split donation of $10 or any amount now between VPP and our campaign before our end of month deadline?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/60415?t=8&akid=12597%2E878179%2EpvE1sR)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/60416?t=9&akid=12597%2E878179%2EpvE1sR)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/60417?t=10&akid=12597%2E878179%2EpvE1sR)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/60418?t=11&akid=12597%2E878179%2EpvE1sR)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/60419?t=12&akid=12597%2E878179%2EpvE1sR)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/60415?t=13&akid=12597%2E878179%2EpvE1sR)
Thanks for everything you’re doing to support Adam’s campaign.

— Schiff HQ
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=12597%2E878179%2EpvE1sR). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=12597%2E878179%2EpvE1sR).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=12597%2E878179%2EpvE1sR) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=12597%2E878179%2EpvE1sR). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=12597%2E878179%2EpvE1sR)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=12597%2E878179%2EpvE1sR)
