name: Stephen Miller (America First Legal)
subject: Emergency Message (Border Crisis)
body:
( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=113694.36.1.661b97caa11cb8d23de43b928d32a5c4 )

Fellow Patriot,

\*\*This is Stephen Miller with an emergency message.\*\* This week, we are witnessing complete chaos at Eagle Pass, Texas, as our border is being completely overwhelmed with an illegal invasion.

This invasion is destruction by design. The scale of this monstrous scheme by Joe Biden and the radical left is so astounding as to truly defy description. The left is doing everything in its power to ensure this resettlement operation continues apace with devastating and deadly consequences for our Nation.

Of course, this is why we proudly partnered with Texas and 20 other states to stop one of the most prominent of Biden’s extreme open borders schemes, the resettlement of hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants through “parole.” And we have other active lawsuits to stop other lawless programs. _ \*\*But we must do even more!\*\* _

_Biden and the left have orchestrated a mass criminal invasion. Our borders are effectively nonexistent, our cities are flooded, and our families are afraid. As a Nation, we are humiliated, weakened, and are now facing long-term societal collapse if this continues... _

And just today, we learned that the Biden Administration is even closing the railway bridges at El Paso and Eagle Pass, Texas, so that the CBP officers working there can help transit the massive wave of illegal immigrants into our country faster. That’s right; they’re rushing as fast as they can to obliterate our country from the inside, as the media can barely continue to keep a lid on this surreal nightmare exploding onto every single American doorstep.

_This is an illegal, nihilistic rush to transform America into a Marxist cesspool and to end Western Civilization as we know it. Nothing could be more urgent for every American tonight than to demand a stop to this madness right now!_

_ \*\*Help Me & America First Legal Fight Back Right Now >>\*\* _ ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=113694.37.1.636e67464bd71957668242b537d8b01e )

We must light a fire of urgency to save our country tonight. We must recommit our nation to stopping this madness and saving America, or nothing else will matter. \*\*Please donate now to help us stop the illegal immigration disaster\*\*\*\* - thank you >>\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=113694.38.1.b08e18894c50de51c7ba3dccea87ee97 )

\*\*DONATE NOW >>\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=113694.39.1.80d157e18011a463a720b0eebbeb3fde )

Stephen Miller

_President, America First Legal _

America First Legal Foundation is an IRS-approved section 501(c)(3) public charity. Your donation to America First Legal Foundation is tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law.

America First Legal Foundation

611 Pennsylvania Avenue, SE | #231

Washington, DC 20003

Unsubscribe instantly from these emails by clicking here ( https://go.madmimi.com/opt_out?pact=113694-179148503-14716296317-a6a82e7d164d8a8fb531cea80977d0365c94ce6b ).

name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: trust me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9768?t=1009&amount=25&akid=977%2E52803%2EUa3GbA ]van hollen and angela

Peter, it’s Senator Chris Van Hollen.

You might already know that I am enthusiastically supporting Angela
Alsobrooks because she will be a strong progressive partner in fighting
for the issues that all Marylanders care about in the U.S. Senate.

But did you know that Angela is facing a critical End-of-Month deadline on
Wednesday?

And that if she doesn’t reach her $50,000 goal by Wednesday at midnight,
she’ll run the risk of getting drowned out by her self-funded,
multi-millionaire opponent in this ultra-competitive race?

Trust me, I know firsthand how important small-dollar, grassroots
donations are to running a people-powered campaign in a race as
competitive as this one. [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9768?t=1010&amount=25&akid=977%2E52803%2EUa3GbA ]So please, will you rush a $25 donation right
away to support Angela for Senate and help Maryland elect a leader we can
ALL be proud of?

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9768?t=1011&amount=25&akid=977%2E52803%2EUa3GbA ]Donate

Peter, Angela knows how to deliver real results for Maryland’s
working families.

She has spent her career in public service fighting for the issues that
matter most—and I would be honored for Angela to join me in the Senate so
that, together, we can stand up to deep-pocketed, powerful, special
interests and even the playing field for all Marylanders. Angela never
backs down in the fight for what’s right. She’s the partner I need to meet
the urgency of this moment in defending our democracy and protecting
abortion access.

But before we get there, Angela needs your continued support before
Wednesday’s all-important End-of-Month fundraising deadline.

So please, I’m personally asking: [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9768?t=1012&amount=25&akid=977%2E52803%2EUa3GbA ]Will you pitch in $25 before
Wednesday at midnight to join me in supporting Angela Alsobrooks for
Maryland’s U.S. Senate seat?

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

But did you know that Angela is facing a critical End-of-Month deadline on Wednesday? And that if she doesn’t reach her $50,000 goal by Wednesday at midnight, she’ll run the risk of getting drowned out by her self-funded, multi-millionaire opponent in this ultra-competitive race? Trust me, I know firsthand how important small-dollar, grassroots donations are to running a people-powered campaign in a race as competitive as this one. [ ]So please, will you rush a $25 donation right away to support Angela for Senate and help Maryland elect a leader we can ALL be proud of? [ ]Donate Peter, Angela knows how to deliver real results for Maryland’s working families. She has spent her career in public service fighting for the issues that matter most—and I would be honored for Angela to join me in the Senate so that, together, we can stand up to deep-pocketed, powerful, special interests and even the playing field for all Marylanders. Angela never backs down in the fight for what’s right. She’s the partner I need to meet the urgency of this moment in defending our democracy and protecting abortion access. But before we get there, Angela needs your continued support before Wednesday’s all-important End-of-Month fundraising deadline. So please, I’m personally asking: [ ]Will you pitch in $25 before Wednesday at midnight to join me in supporting Angela Alsobrooks for Maryland’s U.S. Senate seat? If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. [ ]Chip in $25 [ ]Chip in $50 [ ]Chip in $100 [ ]Chip in $200 [ ]Chip in $250 [ ]Other Amount Thanks for all you do, Chris Van Hollen [ ][IMG] We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [ ]click here. [ ]Text JOIN to 74064 to receive SMS updates [ ]Chip in a one-time donation [ ]Chip in a monthly recurring donation! You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate Alsobrooks for Senate PO Box 6058 Largo, MD 20792

name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: What if I told you..
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
Hi Folks, is there anything I can say to convince you to donate ahead of our first end-of-month deadline of 2024? **What if I told you** that despite obstacles from GOP leadership, I remain steadfast in the fight to get the Farm Bill across the finish line and expand job opportunities, put food on the table, and provide our farmers with the resources they deserve? **And what if I told you** that in 2022, folks like you who sent their support when we needed it most helped us flip this seat — and this election cycle, the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) named me as one of the most at risk seats in this year’s general election? **Or what if I told you** that Republicans are looking to expand their House majority and are raising record-breaking amounts of money to pour into frontline races like mine and flip my seat? **[Well, this is all true, friends. If you’re with me in this fight, can you pitch in before our end-of-month deadline expires on Wednesday? We’re 76% of the way toward our goal, and your donation could help us close the gap.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77874350/451740009/502232532?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20240127_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWE0ZWZkMS02M2JkLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RxWHRQggovMEpuYp2-9xdghafoDY2rFWI8mgan6QXmI=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77874351/451740010/2093963021?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20240127_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWE0ZWZkMS02M2JkLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RxWHRQggovMEpuYp2-9xdghafoDY2rFWI8mgan6QXmI=) ** | | **[CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77874352/451740011/-1000696272?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20240127_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWE0ZWZkMS02M2JkLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RxWHRQggovMEpuYp2-9xdghafoDY2rFWI8mgan6QXmI=)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jesse=20James=20Mullen?=
subject: We earned that on the Hi-Line
body:
This is the difference you donations made last week, earned media across the Hi-Line | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mullenformontana/we-earned-that-on-the-hi-line?e=805e709ff8)
---
[](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=c6ff7ce45f&e=805e709ff8)
[](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=feffaf6033&e=805e709ff8)
Hey team, it’s Jesse James Mullen, and I’m back in Deer Lodge after putting more than 1,000 Montana miles on the car last week.
**And it’s thanks to you.**
That’s the power of grass-roots campaigning and a small donation.
**Four days, four nights on the road, meeting with Montanans.**
**You’re making it happen.** I’m not asking for help to blow it on expensive D.C. consultants, and polls. When you donate, it turns into direct interactions in rural Montana.
[Like this one,](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=5e2146945a&e=805e709ff8) which earned us the top story in the Havre Daily News the following day. Above the fold, the top headline and a picture.
[](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=1d414f6821&e=805e709ff8)
**A day later,** it put us on one of the [highest-rated radio shows](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=da6c6238db&e=805e709ff8) in Montana, broadcast from Canada to Wyoming.
[](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=f9f6810b1d&e=805e709ff8)
On Thursday, we landed in Winnett and Lewistown and sat for long interviews with the local paper. Those stories will be published next week, extending your reach.
[](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=de5d366dea&e=805e709ff8)
A [small donation](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=9a4612fde2&e=805e709ff8) to this campaign goes a heck of a lot further than the donations PACs are making to my MAGA opponent. #ChristiWho has the backing of the Far-Right Radicals and their organized fundraising machine, but we work harder, smarter, and faster.
[Please chip in right now to help us continue the fight.](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=2024baef65&e=805e709ff8)
_**Donations this week will help us order signs, banners, and flyers**_ for the coming months. We order from Montana companies, so your money helps our small town businesses.
Thank you,Jesse James Mullen
| [DONATE HERE](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=5d2d14b204&e=805e709ff8)
---
|
---
[](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=f525168aa4&e=805e709ff8)
| | | [](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=dfbf2905b7&e=805e709ff8)
---

Our mailing address is:
Mullen for Secretary of State PO Box 811 Deer Lodge, MT 59722-0811 USA

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=e5274d80e6&e=805e709ff8&c=fbcf19d03b) or [unsubscribe](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=e5274d80e6&e=805e709ff8&c=fbcf19d03b)

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Will you take a moment to pray with me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter, I pray every day.

In the shuffle of politics and life, it can be easy to lose sight of the bigger picture, but I can always rely on my faith to keep me grounded.

body:
[View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kL1S6zAQhZ9m3cWzWlmWUqjITa4oGBhogJSyJRMxEnZkGydvzyQE2v35zjfHpiGG7qxB_gOiQ3AjEAHfANFxv6Q8f6T7u1U-bVbH-jGJy5K2QDSdB_93eYOUPtkQL1O5K5zmncOq8JpJrPlashqLg0arsGmUokahE8pJ5tArtxadbZgjXgRNSBUyksQZkSprr5AY-nUnWoaiggqvOaVNPofWsnFabM59n8q2T0XUh2kaxquYATJL7svPuY1-Hn_e2j4BmZsykPkCMvvTzJ-3b-n1Cbi5lsB3L_IY_lvxUGTthiXEGMZaQoXvv5TvAAAA__-sY19W)

# HIGH ALERT: Shocking Meat Shortages Are Coming – Prepare Now
**The USDA predicts meat production shortages for the first time since 2014, and the U.N. warns of "an unprecedented global hunger crisis".** Which means 2 dangerous things for you: 1\. Higher prices at the grocery store
2\. Less meat available That's why meat must be a vital part of your survival food stockpile. But there is a catch. Not all protein is created equal. And this is so critical to understand, especially in a crisis. See, your protein needs to meet 4 critical requirements: It needs to: Last a while
Taste great
Store without refrigeration
Can't break the bank **Spoiler alert: most protein options fall short!** Take peanut butter. Sure, most people see it as a survival food protein staple. But did you know most cans are full of added sugars? Plus, they don't last more than a few months. A year tops. Grocery store meat doesn't work either. First, it's expensive. If you've been to the grocery store recently, you know what I'm talking about. Meat prices are up big time over the past year. But it also needs to be refrigerated. So if a blackout hits and cuts power to your home, you might as well use it as a paperweight. But don't worry friend. **There is a protein option that checks all four boxes:** This option is guaranteed to last at least 5 years. It doesn't need to be refrigerated. And it come with an easy payment plan so it won't break the bank. And most importantly, it tastes delicious! **Introducing for the first time ever...** [**The BRAND NEW Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit!**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jk1PwzAMQH-Ne2tlO1_tIYfBVISQuHNCWZqwsEbt0o6xf486AUe_Z9nP5XlM8WbBPADzMQ0LMIPYAfP57ZrL5TO_PNXle1ef9WtWm-RHYF5vc_jf_D3ShOzSuFGzrwYr4oCyCpYMatEZ0lgdrWrFQQR2nRLshHQqKI8kyZkukouxSpaRJRIbFsTcNjq0yIShi8oTKgkS738al0NJ3tGyXl0p05QbP-VqtMd1nZd7WA_cy3ktJ8bNAfd-TP4Eol_LVxpA7ElIImC965_324idAtYuxvflcthAK7D-C6oXRPaIVBU7zNc0jmnRBiR-3Hv8lH8CAAD__1JaX30) [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jk1PwzAMQH-Ne2tlO1_tIYfBVISQuHNCWZqwsEbt0o6xf486AUe_Z9nP5XlM8WbBPADzMQ0LMIPYAfP57ZrL5TO_PNXle1ef9WtWm-RHYF5vc_jf_D3ShOzSuFGzrwYr4oCyCpYMatEZ0lgdrWrFQQR2nRLshHQqKI8kyZkukouxSpaRJRIbFsTcNjq0yIShi8oTKgkS738al0NJ3tGyXl0p05QbP-VqtMd1nZd7WA_cy3ktJ8bNAfd-TP4Eol_LVxpA7ElIImC965_324idAtYuxvflcthAK7D-C6oXRPaIVBU7zNc0jmnRBiR-3Hv8lH8CAAD__1JaX30) **And[right here on this page](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jk1PwzAMQH-Ne2tlO1_tIYfBVISQuHNCWZqwsEbt0o6xf486AUe_Z9nP5XlM8WbBPADzMQ0LMIPYAfP57ZrL5TO_PNXle1ef9WtWm-RHYF5vc_jf_D3ShOzSuFGzrwYr4oCyCpYMatEZ0lgdrWrFQQR2nRLshHQqKI8kyZkukouxSpaRJRIbFsTcNjq0yIShi8oTKgkS738al0NJ3tGyXl0p05QbP-VqtMd1nZd7WA_cy3ktJ8bNAfd-TP4Eol_LVxpA7ElIImC965_324idAtYuxvflcthAK7D-C6oXRPaIVBU7zNc0jmnRBiR-3Hv8lH8CAAD__1JaX30), you can score an introductory price plus some amazing FREE gifts.** Now, there is one thing you should know. Every time we've offered meat in the past, we've SOLD OUT. So when people find out about this brand-NEW Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit, we could see a huge rush. I don't want to alarm you, but there are no IOUs or rain checks on this meat kit. It's first-come, first-served. So if you're going to reserve your kit, **[you need to act fast](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jk1PwzAMQH-Ne2tlO1_tIYfBVISQuHNCWZqwsEbt0o6xf486AUe_Z9nP5XlM8WbBPADzMQ0LMIPYAfP57ZrL5TO_PNXle1ef9WtWm-RHYF5vc_jf_D3ShOzSuFGzrwYr4oCyCpYMatEZ0lgdrWrFQQR2nRLshHQqKI8kyZkukouxSpaRJRIbFsTcNjq0yIShi8oTKgkS738al0NJ3tGyXl0p05QbP-VqtMd1nZd7WA_cy3ktJ8bNAfd-TP4Eol_LVxpA7ElIImC965_324idAtYuxvflcthAK7D-C6oXRPaIVBU7zNc0jmnRBiR-3Hv8lH8CAAD__1JaX30)**. For starters, you get 5 meat options. Chicken, beef, pork, turkey and ground beef. So you aren't stuck with 1 or 2 types of protein. And the variety means you can use it in a ton of recipes. Chicken salad, burgers, tacos, you name it. **You're in control, not the stock boy at the grocery store.** Plus, you can actually pronounce the ingredients that we use. That's because there are only 2. Meat, of course, and salt for preservation. That's it! No funky chemicals. No artificial gunk. The only things in your food are food. [**Get Your Brand New, Delicious Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit!**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jk1PwzAMQH-Ne2tlO1_tIYfBVISQuHNCWZqwsEbt0o6xf486AUe_Z9nP5XlM8WbBPADzMQ0LMIPYAfP57ZrL5TO_PNXle1ef9WtWm-RHYF5vc_jf_D3ShOzSuFGzrwYr4oCyCpYMatEZ0lgdrWrFQQR2nRLshHQqKI8kyZkukouxSpaRJRIbFsTcNjq0yIShi8oTKgkS738al0NJ3tGyXl0p05QbP-VqtMd1nZd7WA_cy3ktJ8bNAfd-TP4Eol_LVxpA7ElIImC965_324idAtYuxvflcthAK7D-C6oXRPaIVBU7zNc0jmnRBiR-3Hv8lH8CAAD__1JaX30) Now, you may be wondering how we guarantee such a long shelf life for canned foods. It comes from our special, old-fashioned retort canning process. **We use small-batch retorts to cook your meat right inside the can.** That means 2 important things. First, your meat is slow cooked, so it retains all its natural juices and flavor. And it's ready to go right out of the can. And second, it kills off any germs in the can that might harm the shelf life. Sometimes, the old-fashioned way is the right way. And guess what? This is all done right here in the US of A. Our survival meats are home raised here in the states. So you know exactly where your food comes from. **And as a family-owned, American business, we take a lot of pride in that.** [**Get Your Brand New, Delicious Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit!**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jk1PwzAMQH-Ne2tlO1_tIYfBVISQuHNCWZqwsEbt0o6xf486AUe_Z9nP5XlM8WbBPADzMQ0LMIPYAfP57ZrL5TO_PNXle1ef9WtWm-RHYF5vc_jf_D3ShOzSuFGzrwYr4oCyCpYMatEZ0lgdrWrFQQR2nRLshHQqKI8kyZkukouxSpaRJRIbFsTcNjq0yIShi8oTKgkS738al0NJ3tGyXl0p05QbP-VqtMd1nZd7WA_cy3ktJ8bNAfd-TP4Eol_LVxpA7ElIImC965_324idAtYuxvflcthAK7D-C6oXRPaIVBU7zNc0jmnRBiR-3Hv8lH8CAAD__1JaX30) Look friend, there's no better time to claim your Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit than now. Meat is one of the first things to go in a crisis. Wildfires, hurricanes, cyberattacks or something else. And the last thing I want for you is to miss out. Or worse, leave you and your family stuck with a subpar protein option. Here at 4Patriots, our mission is to champion freedom and self-reliance for all Americans. **And with everything going on in the world, it's clear that survival food is no longer a luxury. It's a necessity.** Ask anyone who's lived through a crisis. There's no warning. You won't see a big billboard that says "emergency coming in 5 days! Stock up before then." Disasters come out of nowhere. And if you aren't prepared when it hits, it's too late. I mean, just imagine standing in line at your local supermarket. Shelves picked bare. And the people who didn't prepare scrambling and hoarding what little food they can find. All while you pray there's a sliver of meat left for you and your family. **This doesn't have to be you, friend. You can choose a different path.** When storms come knocking at your door, you can stay safely inside with your loved ones. You'll feel great knowing you and your family have delicious shelf-stable meat ready to go. And trust me, the peace of mind that comes with that, feels incredible. [**Get Your Brand New, Delicious Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit!**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jk1PwzAMQH-Ne2tlO1_tIYfBVISQuHNCWZqwsEbt0o6xf486AUe_Z9nP5XlM8WbBPADzMQ0LMIPYAfP57ZrL5TO_PNXle1ef9WtWm-RHYF5vc_jf_D3ShOzSuFGzrwYr4oCyCpYMatEZ0lgdrWrFQQR2nRLshHQqKI8kyZkukouxSpaRJRIbFsTcNjq0yIShi8oTKgkS738al0NJ3tGyXl0p05QbP-VqtMd1nZd7WA_cy3ktJ8bNAfd-TP4Eol_LVxpA7ElIImC965_324idAtYuxvflcthAK7D-C6oXRPaIVBU7zNc0jmnRBiR-3Hv8lH8CAAD__1JaX30) [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jk1PwzAMQH-Ne2tlO1_tIYfBVISQuHNCWZqwsEbt0o6xf486AUe_Z9nP5XlM8WbBPADzMQ0LMIPYAfP57ZrL5TO_PNXle1ef9WtWm-RHYF5vc_jf_D3ShOzSuFGzrwYr4oCyCpYMatEZ0lgdrWrFQQR2nRLshHQqKI8kyZkukouxSpaRJRIbFsTcNjq0yIShi8oTKgkS738al0NJ3tGyXl0p05QbP-VqtMd1nZd7WA_cy3ktJ8bNAfd-TP4Eol_LVxpA7ElIImC965_324idAtYuxvflcthAK7D-C6oXRPaIVBU7zNc0jmnRBiR-3Hv8lH8CAAD__1JaX30) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we are able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Joseph L.**
"I buy a lot of stuff at Wal-mart, but this is gonna out-do the stuff on Wal-mart shelves, which contains all kinds of preservatives. I did a taste test even though I've never found a bad product from 4Patriots. Hamburger Helper can kiss my butt – this stuff here is good! (Maybe not as good as my wife's cooking.) This is a good buy." **Danielle M.
4Patriots Employee**
"I was surprised at how good everything in the Ultimate Meat Medley really was. As an avid cook, I have high standards; I worried it might be salty or dried out. What I discovered was moist chicken and turkey that shreds easily for the fastest chicken salad ever or super fast BBQ turkey sammies. The pork and beef are in perfect chucks for adding to stews or burritos. Even the ground beef, which I could not envision being delicious, tasted just like the ground beef I typically brown and drain, but in zero time! This box is definitely going to become my "oh shoot, I forgot to thaw a meat" solution for everyday and I'll have to grab more to store." **Michael M.**
"My family won't be asking, "where's the meat when disaster comes." I bought the Meat Medley so we have beef, pork, chicken, turkey and ground beef to supplement our food stock. I was very pleasantly surprised at the amount of meat at the price I paid. My order arrived quickly and now I know I'll have the right answer when my family ask "where’s the meat"." **Ernest K.**
"It's a must have item for your food prep. inventory. Great as a companion item for some of the other items for added protein." [**Get Your Brand New, Delicious Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit!**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jk1PwzAMQH-Ne2tlO1_tIYfBVISQuHNCWZqwsEbt0o6xf486AUe_Z9nP5XlM8WbBPADzMQ0LMIPYAfP57ZrL5TO_PNXle1ef9WtWm-RHYF5vc_jf_D3ShOzSuFGzrwYr4oCyCpYMatEZ0lgdrWrFQQR2nRLshHQqKI8kyZkukouxSpaRJRIbFsTcNjq0yIShi8oTKgkS738al0NJ3tGyXl0p05QbP-VqtMd1nZd7WA_cy3ktJ8bNAfd-TP4Eol_LVxpA7ElIImC965_324idAtYuxvflcthAK7D-C6oXRPaIVBU7zNc0jmnRBiR-3Hv8lH8CAAD__1JaX30)

As an avid cook, I have high standards; I worried it might be salty or dried out. What I discovered was moist chicken and turkey that shreds easily for the fastest chicken salad ever or super fast BBQ turkey sammies. The pork and beef are in perfect chucks for adding to stews or burritos. Even the ground beef, which I could not envision being delicious, tasted just like the ground beef I typically brown and drain, but in zero time! This box is definitely going to become my "oh shoot, I forgot to thaw a meat" solution for everyday and I'll have to grab more to store." Michael M. "My family won't be asking, "where's the meat when disaster comes." I bought the Meat Medley so we have beef, pork, chicken, turkey and ground beef to supplement our food stock. I was very pleasantly surprised at the amount of meat at the price I paid. My order arrived quickly and now I know I'll have the right answer when my family ask "where’s the meat"." Ernest K. "It's a must have item for your food prep. inventory. Great as a companion item for some of the other items for added protein."

subject: Help me strike out this liberal lineup...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=0ec6abd6a690444b8e2cd5987c71a965&_e=OiyOc3K1uJIji6sEd47Yj_DeMUl_Z9yY_dg3vgRBrPCYnQTRYm3a7GiOWOEhHLaKb37QUE4mL4SP_--B9cWaEK_zw7b5xWjjMhK2f_-e2FA2nkUJN_2NFQOsmJ2VMj3ZrunUL2f3BywD1LhbyfIlv_aBHTdBavAfRBh0aOjwSRdDXtSI5NKzRBvoxbZwGBYi36rzzTa02A_US4CfmLJWM54R3xY47EDpXjywX74l7Xlkjluv2vJuxlGHqrtRGDCZcfKUqBnrhat2PQ4EsSxH6hgjPv3OBk-_Zht4eKByhFikFQtIO2nMg3yDgskZuqfIs-N5wLzaV9yqGQld5jfLNhAK2TKlsKoJKETTWYB1L4bMds03jbINLHfBv9mxJdE7WNaDByUy4EoJOm35uTJs_Q%3D%3D)
---
| | Fellow American, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=0ec6abd6a690444b8e2cd5987c71a965&_e=OiyOc3K1uJIji6sEd47Yj_DeMUl_Z9yY_dg3vgRBrPCYnQTRYm3a7GiOWOEhHLaKb37QUE4mL4SP_--B9cWaEK_zw7b5xWjjMhK2f_-e2FA2nkUJN_2NFQOsmJ2VMj3ZrunUL2f3BywD1LhbyfIlv_aBHTdBavAfRBh0aOjwSRdDXtSI5NKzRBvoxbZwGBYi36rzzTa02A_US4CfmLJWM54R3xY47EDpXjywX74l7XnSXPgtn521te-xamyQ6V-NUb-sS18xLCxtReF24qUr0XoU8WpIOqRFwYnN5wEAYlNr1VAnPKdkyJjI69ohILYy237NET3_kcwrBXdem8NuD_isok6xUzyn29hYwqw0cbk1YnbBYNjQf1m7P174-7D6K-Wdf9xQoxXtg3D1uoY1og%3D%3D)** That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. **[Will you step up and help strike out this"lineup of liberals" through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=0ec6abd6a690444b8e2cd5987c71a965&_e=OiyOc3K1uJIji6sEd47Yj_DeMUl_Z9yY_dg3vgRBrPCYnQTRYm3a7GiOWOEhHLaKb37QUE4mL4SP_--B9cWaEK_zw7b5xWjjMhK2f_-e2FA2nkUJN_2NFQOsmJ2VMj3ZrunUL2f3BywD1LhbyfIlv_aBHTdBavAfRBh0aOjwSRdDXtSI5NKzRBvoxbZwGBYi36rzzTa02A_US4CfmLJWM54R3xY47EDpXjywX74l7Xndmc7t_spiqOus32FUi7qsjkIfFkhpsd7-sDg1PGM07_CDShvLkZz8-pfOUtv2d4Mm85cWISnybcmHgPrGWhb-I2Vy5YZlOry2o-O_lvyOa81m4ozZCdNVtdvEXyOkYOss64qXuzw83r-gYbeDGZqWQx8UTzxfql4XtEexv5sPPA%3D%3D)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---

clean_body: This achievement is unprecedented, and cannot be overstated. | | | | This achievement is unprecedented, and cannot be overstated. | Dear Peter, The great untold story coming out of the New Hampshire primary—the story missed by many reporters, the mainstream media, and the Democrats and Republicans—was this: Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. collected over 3,000 signatures from voters in New Hampshire in 24 hours...which means he will appear on the ballot in November. This achievement is unprecedented, and cannot be overstated. With that historic victory in New Hampshire, our campaign presses on to achieve ballot access in all of the other states and the District of Columbia—and for that to happen we need your help. Please consider supporting Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. for President . Your contribution will propel this campaign into the mainstream news cycle, onto the debate stage, on your state ballot, and into the White House in 2025. Perhaps you are in a position to . body:
Republicans are at it again...
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=20694%2E4449941%2EBfZXFb)
---
_Republicans are working to SMEAR the Postal Service in a transparent attempt to discredit vote-by-mail options and influence the 2024 election:_ [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL-Post-Office-Approval_02-15?source=FFR_20240127_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=20694%2E4449941%2EBfZXFb) | [WE NEED YOUR INPUT, TEAM: Take our Emergency Postal Worker Approval Poll so we can fight back these allegations the MAGA crooks are trying to push and save our postal workers »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL-Post-Office-Approval_02-15?source=FFR_20240127_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=20694%2E4449941%2EBfZXFb)
---
With Trump appointee Louis DeJoy at the helm of the U.S.P.S., he’s liable to run it into the ground! **We must do ALL we can to protect the Postal Service!**

_Which is why we need 500 Democrats (including you) to take our emergency poll so we can stand by our diligent postal workers:_
**[_DO YOU SUPPORT YOUR LOCAL U.S.P.S. WORKERS? »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL-Post-Office-Approval_02-15?source=FFR_20240127_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=20694%2E4449941%2EBfZXFb)** | [YES, I DO! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL-Post-Office-Approval_02-15?source=FFR_20240127_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=20694%2E4449941%2EBfZXFb)
---
[NO, I DO NOT »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL-Post-Office-Approval_02-15?source=FFR_20240127_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=11&akid=20694%2E4449941%2EBfZXFb)
[I’M NOT SURE »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL-Post-Office-Approval_02-15?source=FFR_20240127_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=12&akid=20694%2E4449941%2EBfZXFb)
**_*WE NEED 500 RESPONSES FROM YOUR STATE FOR AN ACCURATE CONSENSUS*_**
Thank you for your help!

-FFR
_United States Postal Service is not associated or affiliated with Fight for Reform and has not sponsored or approved of this communication._
